Name: Catenon India
Description:
Catenon is a multinational executive search company with a technology-based approach operating under the web² model. 

Our vision, is to operate as a single office worldwide. 

We strive to identify, assess and find the right candidates for our clients from around the world. We do this by leveraging technology and our network of consultants that operate from offices located globally. Our differentiating factor would be the multimedia report used to present the final results to our clients. This report contains the methodology designed by Catenon that individually analyses and compares each candidate, providing our clients with a holistic view of each candidate and allowing them to make an informed decision.

Catenon was founded in order to take advantage of a new emerging market: the global search for professionals. This market arose from the need for the international mobility of talent and an expected trend in the next few years is continuous growth in this hunt for talent. Catenon aims to be at the forefront of this trend.

𝗜𝗻𝗱𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗮𝗹: Automation, Agtech, Chemicals, Ingredients, Flavours (Flavors) & Fragrances

We believe that our success is built on a foundation of strong values. We are committed to delivering high performance in everything we do, inspiring innovation through our creative and agile approach to executive search, and building purposeful partnerships with our clients and candidates, all while putting people first in our daily interactions.

Our team is comprised of niche industry specialists who have an in-depth understanding of the unique requirements and challenges each sector we work in presents. This, coupled with our ability to utilise technology, allows us to play to our strengths - the human element of executive search, allowing us to provide tailored recruitment solutions that cater to all our client’s individual needs. We have also built a robust network of candidates that spans different industries in every location, allowing us to quickly and effectively match the right candidates with the right roles.

Name: Mercuri Urval
Description:
MU is a science-based global Leadership Acquisition and Advisory firm. Our experts provide unique and precisely tailored, quality assured and ethical Executive Search, Professional Search, Leadership Assessment and Coaching services in partnership with private and public sector clients worldwide.

We exist to make sure organisations outperform through diverse and sustainably successful leadership.

We were founded more than 50 years ago to answer a simple but important question that leaders face: 

How can we make sure we have the most effective leaders in place – to deliver the best possible results?

And every day since, we have developed and refined our methods, so you can be confident in our experts' advice.

MU work with more than 3.000 clients - across all sectors - in over 60 countries every year. As we have grown, our services have expanded to include a range of services, built to meet our clients’ needs to strengthen their people’s performance.

Today it is clear, that securing effective leadership is one of the biggest challenges organisations face. Guided by science, we offer reliable leadership advice.

Name: Phoenix Search
Description:
Phoenix Search | Expert-led. Insight-driven. Value-creation focused.

At Phoenix Search, we help private equity firms, portfolio companies, and ambitious organisations unlock leadership potential and accelerate value creation. Founded in 2018, we have grown from a challenger in executive search to a trusted global advisory partner with offices in Dublin, London, Limerick, and New York.

With more than 900 searches completed across 30+ countries, we combine global reach with local expertise to deliver measurable impact where it matters most.

Our Services

Private Equity Value Creation – organisational due diligence, portfolio research, and leadership risk analysis across the investment lifecycle.

Executive Search & Assessment – precision hiring of investor-grade leaders aligned to value-creation priorities.

Leadership Advisory – evidence-based insights on governance, succession, and organisational effectiveness.

Why Phoenix

Expert-led: Our consultants are highly experienced search professionals,  former lawyers, accountants, and bankers from top firms. 

Insight-driven: We leverage market intelligence, AI-powered analytics, and global research to inform critical decisions.

Relationship-based: We act as long-term advisors, ensuring leadership choices directly support strategy, growth, and exit outcomes.

Global Reach. Local Expertise. Measurable Impact.

At Phoenix Search, we do not simply fill roles; we de-risk investments, accelerate performance, and build the leadership foundations for sustainable growth.

Name: Imperium Commodity Search
Description:
Imperium Commodity Search has been built from the ground up to provide a bespoke recruitment service to assist commodities, global markets and shipping firms in hiring the best talent in the market whilst ensuring our candidates are introduced to exceptional clients that share the same beliefs and aspirations as they do.  Built upon a global network and personal relationships with commodity firms internationally, our team have built a reputation for extracting talent that is not only the right professional fit, but the right cultural one too. 

We believe in attraction and retention in equal measure.  We operate on a strict framework to ensure we get to know our candidates and clients in a way that ensures the relationships we help create are lasting and beneficial to all involved. 

Our consultants operate within their own niche, providing specialist advice to clients and candidates alike.   We set ourselves apart in the introductions that we don’t make and strongly believe in partnering with clients that share our care in the recruitment process.   

Experience

Our commodity team have a global network across:

FICC Markets
Energy / Oil / Gas / LNG
Metals / LME / Steel 
Agriculture / Grain / Softs
Shipping / Shipbrokers

with a 100% placement rate on retained assignments from our clients.  We operate across both physical and derivative markets with a particular appetite for those positions that are tough to fill and require a headhunt/extraction led approach to secure the best talent for our clients. 

We pride ourselves on being able to attract passive candidates, offering them an opportunity that works for them, and a talent offering that exceeds the expectations of our clients over and above what a traditional advertising led recruitment method can provide.  Our team have worked mandates in every corner of the globe and operate a network that enables us to secure the best talent in a time and cost-effective way, ensuring that our quality is never compromised.

Description:

- Avaliação e Seleção de Executivos
- Gestão do Capital Humano
- Soluções para Conselhos

_____________________________________

A EXEC é membro da AESC. Com sede em Nova York, EUA, a Associação de Consultores de Busca Executiva (AESC) é a principal associação global para empresas de busca executiva e consultoria de liderança. A AESC promove os mais altos padrões da indústria e mantém um rigoroso código de ética e diretrizes de prática profissional. A AESC também trabalha para ampliar o entendimento público sobre projetos de busca executiva, por meio de projetos de retenção, e processos de desenvolvimento de liderança, além de defender os interesses de seus membros.

A EXEC é membro da Panorama, uma comunidade global de mais de 400 especialistas em liderança trabalhando juntos para promover uma perspectiva diversa de liderança, abraçando o pensamento criativo e compartilhando nossa expertise e experiência uns com os outros para trazer os melhores resultados para nossos clientes.

Somos mais de 20 empresas parceiras globais em mais de 25 países, com 50 escritórios e presença em todos os 5 continentes.

We partner with high-growth and market-leading companies navigating critical phases of expansion: entering new geographies, scaling commercial capabilities, executing buy-and-build strategies, or integrating newly acquired assets. Our expertise spans CDMO, CRO, Biotech, Medical Devices, Diagnostics, Digital Health, Healthcare AI, Consulting, and related services. With both regional insight and international reach, we deliver the people and teams who enable sustainable value creation and long-term growth.

As part of Luminary Group HQ, our mission is simple: empower Life Sciences companies in the Middle East with the leadership and talent required to transform futures.

Name: JS Legal Talent AB
Description:
Bespoke Recruitment
Established in 2006, JS Legal Talent is an exclusive consultancy specializing in the procurement of the finest candidates within the legal field. We are industry agnostic with a focus on both the professional and social profiles of competency. The focus has always been on quality, not quantity. Our business model is driven by reputation. The result is selected high quality, bespoke recruitment, tailored to the client as well as the candidate.

The vision in 2006 was to create a recruitment service tailored to the needs of both the company or organization as well as the candidate. To focus on the development of the individual and the group to which they would belong. In addition to assessing academic and work credentials, to zoom out and consider other variables as well, and to see the opportunity of mutual growth and development of the individual and organization. In the 2020’s, this is called Diversity & Inclusion. 

Jacqueline has a BA in psychology and a JD. She has worked within the field of social work and practiced law for nearly a decade in New York. Jacqueline’s experience in behavioral assessment as a social worker, and her education and years of practice as an attorney are truly invaluable when assessing both client needs and candidate profiles.

Name: WakeUup
Description:
“A maior habilidade de um líder é desenvolver habilidades extraordinárias em pessoas comuns”
Abraham Lincoln

Autoconhecimento: 
Comece por entender suas habilidades, paixões e valores. O que você gosta de fazer? O que você faz bem?
Identifique seus objetivos de carreira de curto e longo prazo. Onde você quer estar daqui a 1 ano, 5 anos, 10 anos?

Aprendizado Contínuo:
Mantenha-se atualizado em sua área de atuação. Isso pode incluir cursos, treinamentos e leitura regular.
Desenvolva habilidades relevantes para sua indústria. Esteja aberto a aprender coisas novas.

Networking:
Construa uma rede de contatos profissionais. Participe de eventos da sua área e conecte-se com colegas e mentores.
Esteja presente nas redes sociais profissionais, como o LinkedIn, para aumentar sua visibilidade.

Estabeleça Metas Claras:
Defina metas específicas e mensuráveis para sua carreira. Isso o manterá focado e motivado.
Divida suas metas em metas de curto prazo e longo prazo.

Mentoria:
Busque um mentor na sua área. Alguém com mais experiência pode fornecer orientação valiosa.
Esteja aberto a aprender com os outros e aceite feedback construtivo.

Gerenciamento de Tempo:
Aprenda a gerenciar seu tempo efetivamente. Priorize tarefas importantes e evite distrações.
Estabeleça um equilíbrio entre vida pessoal e profissional para evitar o esgotamento.

Auto-Promoção:
Não tenha medo de promover seu trabalho e conquistas. Comunique-se de forma clara e assertiva.
Destaque suas realizações em seu currículo e perfil profissional.

Adaptação e Resiliência:
Esteja preparado para mudanças e desafios. A adaptabilidade é uma habilidade valiosa.
Lide com o fracasso como uma oportunidade de aprendizado e não desista facilmente.

Crescimento Profissional:
Busque oportunidades de crescimento dentro da sua organização atual, mas esteja disposto a explorar novos horizontes se necessário.

Precisa de ajuda?

Name: Talent Rocket
Description:
Talent Rocket | Recrutamento que acelera negócios

A Talent Rocket é a unidade do Grupo Rocket especializada em Recrutamento & Seleção ponta a ponta, conectando empresas aos melhores talentos do mercado — do estágio ao C-level, em qualquer área da organização.

Nosso diferencial: não somos apenas uma consultoria de R&S. Atuamos como parceiros estratégicos, montando squads que combinam visão de negócio, metodologia comprovada e tecnologia de ponta para entregar contratações assertivas e times prontos para gerar impacto desde o primeiro dia.

O que fazemos:

Recrutamento & Seleção 360º: Projetos completos com triagem, entrevistas, avaliação técnica e comportamental.

Onboarding estratégico: Reduzimos curva de aprendizado e aumentamos retenção desde o primeiro dia.

Contratações de ponta a ponta: Do estagiário ao C-level, em todas as áreas da empresa.

Consultoria Hands-on: Atuação lado a lado com a liderança para formar times de alta performance.

Nosso objetivo: garantir que cada contratação seja uma alavanca de crescimento para a empresa, conectando as pessoas certas às oportunidades certas com agilidade e previsibilidade.

Quem atendemos: empresas em crescimento, startups em tração, negócios tradicionais em transformação e companhias nacionais e internacionais que buscam times escaláveis e sustentáveis.

Description:
Dynamite Search Group is a premier executive search firm. We specialise in providing top-notch recruitment services to the software market, focusing on FinTech and high-growth SaaS providers, traditional software providers, as well as private equity and venture capital firms. 

We cover a wide range of positions, including C-level executives, sales and relationship managers, marketing and RFP professionals, pre-sales experts, architects, project managers, IT developers and testers, software specialists, treasury professionals, core banking experts, SWIFT/payment specialists, compliance professionals, workflow specialists, data analytics experts, and API professionals.

We have successfully placed candidates from over 30 nationalities in over 20 different countries.

We understand the criticality of successful onboarding for new leaders. To mitigate risks and enhance success rates, we employ a thoughtful approach to executive onboarding, focusing on stakeholder management, team communication, and alignment with strategic objectives. Our consultants bring expertise from specialised industry backgrounds or strong recruitment specialist backgrounds. Our diverse and dynamic multinational team of consultants with varied backgrounds and specialties brings over 500 years of combined recruitment experience to deliver exceptional results.

Name: Graseffi & Co.
Description:
Graseffi & Co. é uma consultoria boutique de Executive Advisory em Human Strategy, especializada em decisões estratégicas sobre liderança, cultura e pessoas.
Atuamos lado a lado de CEOs, conselhos e diretores em dois pilares principais: o recrutamento de executivos para posições críticas e o diagnóstico estratégico das dinâmicas humanas que impactam os resultados organizacionais.
Com abordagem sênior, escuta estruturada e visão de negócio, entregamos inteligência aplicada para sustentar decisões sobre pessoas — seja na contratação de líderes, na leitura de barreiras culturais, ou na construção de alinhamento entre estratégia e capital humano.
Cada projeto é conduzido diretamente por Marcelo Graseffi, com rigor técnico, confidencialidade e profunda adaptação ao contexto de cada empresa.
Com sede em São Paulo e atuação nacional, atendemos empresas médias e grandes que valorizam profundidade, clareza e soluções personalizadas em temas que envolvem liderança, performance e confiança organizacional.

Executive Search

Personalberatung
Wir besetzen für Sie die so wichtigen Expert:innen-Positionen im Unternehmen – die mit und die ohne Führungsverantwortung.

Personalauswahl & Objektivierung
Sie haben selbst gesucht und brauchen jetzt eine objektive Entscheidung. Mit unseren Personalauswahlverfahren erzielen Sie ein faires Ergebnis.

Unternehmensberatung im Personalwesen
Wir begleiten Ihre HR-Arbeit und klinken uns schon vor der Personalsuche in Ihre Überlegungen und Abläufe ein.

propertyplacements  is committed to our core values-based approach, leveraging off our high calibre contacts and in- depth research process, which results in superior outcomes for all parties.

Name: Leo Jackson
Description:
Leo Jackson is a premier Executive Search Firm in Perth, redefining executive recruitment and human capital strategy across Western Australia. We specialise in C-suite recruitment, board appointments, and senior leadership search, delivering high-performance talent to organisations across mining, resources, engineering, construction, property, and commercial industries.

Our proprietary Leadership Synergy Blueprint ensures every executive hire is precise, predictive, and strategically aligned. Backed by decades of recruitment experience, our Perth-based team delivers tailored executive search solutions with meticulous care, deep market intelligence, and industry-specific insight. We connect organisations with directors, CEOs, COOs, CFOs, GMs, & senior managers seeking their next strategic opportunity. Our work strengthens operations, improves organisational capability, and drives long-term commercial success.

Every assignment is backed by an industry-leading 12-month replacement guarantee, ensuring confidence and continuity in every placement.

With extensive talent mapping, proactive market engagement, and a curated network of high-calibre leaders, we set the benchmark for Executive Search in Western Australia through quality, precision, and cultural amplification.

Disrupt. Recruit. Deliver. defines our mission-challenging the traditional recruitment model with a candidate-first, relationship-led, and advisory-driven approach. We champion diversity, strategic alignment, and leadership optimisation.

Leo Jackson stands for search excellence, corporate innovation, and long-term leadership.

Long-term Connections
Success is not built on quick matches but on real partnerships. We support businesses and talent throughout the entire process with foresight and trust.

Focus & Precision
Great matches do not happen by chance. With a sharp eye for potential and company culture, we identify top talent and connect them with the right businesses efficiently and accurately.

Partnership & Trust

Network & Full-Service
Successful recruitment requires more than just matching. With market expertise, a strong network, and a full-service approach, we support you from consultation to successful placement.

Name: Z1Partners Executive Search
Description:
A Z1Partners Executive Search é uma consultoria de recrutamento e seleção de executivos, que foi desenvolvida para apoiar organizações que buscam se transformar através de pessoas.

Acreditamos que cada cliente é único. Portanto, devemos atendê-lo com excelência e de maneira customizada. Com objetividade, entendemos a estratégia e a cultura da empresa, e os pontos chave do projeto.

Vivemos na busca contínua por desenvolver parcerias de longo prazo, pautadas na transparência e na confiança. Direcionamos nossos esforços para nos relacionarmos com líderes e empresas que potencializam o negócio e que exerçam seu papel com protagonismo.

NOSSOS VALORES: Transparência, Confiança, Objetividade, Customização e Transformação. 

Recrutamos para todo o Brasil, apoiando empresas de médio e grande porte, que estão em processo de transformação e crescimento. 

Conduzimos projetos de mapeamento de mercado e recrutamento e seleção para posições estratégicas de média e alta gestão, nas áreas de: Finanças, Tributária, M&A, Novos Negócios, Comercial, Marketing, RH, Jurídico, Tecnologia, Operações, Produção e Supply Chain.

Atendemos empresas de diversos setores, como: indústria, agronegócio, mineração, energia, óleo e gás, infraestrutura, construção, varejo, saúde, educação, tecnologia e serviços financeiros.

Recrutamos posições de Conselho, C-Level, Diretoria, Alta e Média Gerência, Coordenação e Especialistas Seniores.

NOSSOS DIFERENCIAIS:
- Nosso sócios executam todas as etapas do projeto. Somos uma consultoria verdadeiramente hands on.
- Trabalhamos de maneira ágil e consultiva, com profundidade, independentemente do nível da posição.
- Realizamos um processo estruturado de ponta a ponta, com metodologia clara, checkpoints definidos e alinhamento contínuo com o cliente.
- Desenvolvemos um relacionamento próximo e transparente, com comunicação objetiva, postura leve e foco em entrega. 
- Temos um modelo comercial flexível, adaptado ao perfil de cada cliente.

Name: Claro Talent Acquisition
Description:
Elevate your Hospitality Industry Executive search with Claro Talent Acquisition. Our vision is quite simple. Acquire only the most qualified candidates, carefully vetted, ready, willing and able to exceed our client’s expectations.

We’re experts, delivering Senior Leaders exclusively for the Hospitality Industry. But we’re much more than that. We’re stewards of exceptional customer experiences.

Advances in artificial intelligence and algorithmic technologies have driven profound innovation in the wider executive search space. But specific to hospitality, quantitative advancements have done little to provide qualitative benefits. Simply put, if cutting-edge technologies provide only a greater volume of unsuitable candidates, it’s more valuable to focus on fundamentals. Relationships matter.

The essential requirements for success in the hospitality industry remain relatively constant. The attributes that characterize exceptional servants-to-guest satisfaction are innate. Our ideal candidate is a hotelier, not solely a General Manager. She is a true restauranteur, not merely an Executive Chef. Unwavering dedication to this distinction is what sets us apart.

Our founder, Scott Barger, has been a Hospitality Industry thought leader for nearly four decades. He pledges to remain invested with each engagement until successfully completed.

We look forward to the conversation.

Visit us at claroexecs.com for the specific roles we support.
Our email address is info@claroexecs.com
Or call (978) 767-8370

Thank you

Name: We Compare
Description:
Vores forretningsområder er Rekruttering til fastansættelse og Interim konsulenter inden for IT til projektopgaver med mere.
REKRUTTERING, SEARCH & SELECTION – SÆT DET RIGTIGE HOLD!
Vi hjælper med at tiltrække og vurdere kandidater via rekruttering og search. 
Hos Compare Consulting betragter vi rekruttering som en strategisk ledelsesopgave. 
Jeres nye leder eller nøglemedarbejder skal bidrage til at opnå resultater og eksekvere jeres strategi.
Vi har en solid erfaring i at matche forretningsmæssige udfordringer med personlige og faglige kompetencer, hvad enten I søger en specialist, eller bare en ny værdsat kollega inden for IT eller en CTO. 
Vi er nichespecifik og arbejder udelukkende indenfor vores kerneområde, som er IT og fungerer ofte som trusted Advisor hos vores samarbejdspartnere.
For at tiltrække de dygtigste, både fagligt og personligt, må et ligeværdigt samarbejde/partnerskab finde sted, hvor I er med på banen og her er det essentielle at I tilbyder god ledelsesform og en ærlig/ åben dialog overfor kandidaterne. 
Det hele foregår i tæt samarbejde med dig når vi udarbejder et rekrutteringsforløb, der er tilpasset jeres virksomhed og de ambitioner og ønsker I har. Vores mange års erfaring og store succes kommer fra forskellige brancher, som sikrer jer professionel sparring på processen.
Vi er meget nærværende i vores proces, lægger handlingsplaner for forløbet med reserverede datoer for samtalerunde mm., netop fordi IT personel er nogle af de mest eftertragtede i DK.
Sidst, men ikke mindst handler det for Compare ikke om blot at skaffe kandidater til jer, men kandidater der har godt potentiale til at blive glad for sit arbejde hos jer og som i med god ledelsesform kan fastholde mange år fremadrettet, da det er vor faste overbevisning at glade medarbejdere levere bedre resultater!

Kompetencer: advisor · IT headhunting · IT-rekruttering · Teknisk rekruttering · Global rekruttering · Rekruttering · Teambuilding · Team-motivation · IT-strategi

The key mantra for our success has been our understanding of the Industry, Timely Delivery, and Dedicated Resources. Name: Maven Executive Solutions
Description:
Maven Executive Solutions exists to take the weight out of leadership hiring, without lowering the bar.

Hiring senior leaders is complex work. My role is to design the structure, manage the nuance, and handle the hard parts so my clients can focus on what matters most: meaningful conversations with exceptional people. The process feels calm, intentional, and even energizing ... because the heavy lifting is done behind the scenes.

When companies engage me, they’re not looking to “fill a role.” They’re looking for a thinking partner; someone who will challenge assumptions early, bring clarity to what’s really needed, and run the work like a consulting engagement, not a transaction.

Timelines are mapped upfront. Expectations are aligned early. Interview schedules are planned in advance, typically across a 5–8 week process, depending on the role and context. Nothing feels rushed, and nothing is left to chance.

What my clients value most is the truth. I don’t play games. I don’t inflate resumes. I don’t pad shortlists. You won’t see “two 10s, a 9, and a couple of 7s to make the 10s look good.” When a shortlist lands, every person on it belongs there, exceptional humans who are right for the role, at that moment in time.

Equally important is the candidate experience. The time, preparation, and care I invest in people is why I’m hired again and again. Candidates know where they stand. They are prepared properly. They are treated like adults. That confidence shows up in the room, and clients feel it immediately.

This work isn’t transactional. It’s deliberate, human, and built on trust. I genuinely love the complexity of this work, the strategy, the preparation, the nuance ... so my clients don’t have to carry it. They get to show up, ask great questions, and meet leaders who are truly aligned.

At the end of the day, it always comes back to the same thing: the right leader, at the right time, for the right role.

Vårt recept på framgång: 
Erfarenhet som ger trygghet.

Passion som driver oss framåt.

Name: RISQ-ESG Talent Consultants
Description:
The Background:

In today’s business scenario, with ever-evolving financial dynamics, regulatory requirements, technological disruptions, and global sustainability goals, there is a growing need for a specialized approach to hiring strategic talent in the areas of Risk Management, Quant and ESG. This need led to the formation of RISQ-ESG Talent Consultants by CxSearch Global Partners, a global executive search and leadership advisory firm.

RISQ-ESG Talent Consultants:

RISQ-ESG Talent Consultants is a specialized practice offering talent search services in the realm of Risk, Quants and ESG, fostering businesses across global locations.

Our practice focusses on hiring visionary leaders globally, encompassing diverse areas of Risk Management& GRC, Quantitative Research, Quantitative Modeling & Quantitative Trading Technology and ESG & Sustainability across industries and businesses. Driven by commitment to excellence, our approach offers client-centric solutions, relies on in-depth industry knowledge and a robust professional network. Utilizing our proprietary data platform and search methodologies, we assist in identifying the right leaders for the organization’s business needs.

Risk Management, Quants and ESG – The Triad Factor:

The integration of Risk Management, Quantitative Research, Modeling&Trading and ESG creates a synergistic approach to modern business. Effective Risk Management ensures that quantitative models and trading technology strategies are robust and resilient. Quantitative research provides the tools and techniques to incorporate ESG factors into investment decisions. ESG principles guide the ethical and sustainable framework within which risk management and quantitative trading operate. Together, these disciplines contribute to a more resilient, responsible and forward-looking financial system and businesses.

Name: Aristos & Mina
Description:
Aristos & Mina K.K. is a Tokyo-based recruitment agency that provides advocacy-based solutions to investment management companies facing talent shortages. 

Aristos & Minaは人材不足に直面している資産運用会社様のいわば代理人として動き、ソリューションを提供する在東京の採用エージェントです。

Nickについて

Nickは、2011年から東京で資産運用業界に特化した採用エージェントとして活動してきました。そしてこの仕事を通じて、ある一つの重要な真実にたどり着きました。

それは、転職は誰にとっても人生で最もストレスのかかる出来事のひとつ、ということです。

転職の応募を考えるだけでも、不安や迷いが押し寄せてくることでしょう。

「私は間違った選択をしているのでは？」

「今の会社を辞めて、すべてが悪い方向に進んだらどうしよう？」

「しかし、このまま今の会社に居続けて、もっと悪くなったら？」

「面接はどんな感じなのだろう？」

「きっと不採用になって、理由も教えてもらえないのだろう」

「転職先企業の価値観が違い過ぎるなら、応募すべきではないかもしれない」

「リクルーターは『履歴書を送って』としか言わず、大事な情報を教えてくれない」

「きっとリクルーターは良いことしか言わず、悪いことは隠しているのでは？」

 

どれもまったく自然な反応です。

というのも、すべての転職は、いわば一つの「メリットとデメリットの組み合わせ」を別の新たな組み合わせに置き換えることだからです。

 

だからこそ、「このポジションにはどんなメリットとデメリットがあるのか」を、曇りなく理解しておくことが重要です。
それは、オファーを承諾する直前だけでなく、応募を検討する段階から必要なことなのです。

 

誰だって、転職にまつわるあのフラストレーションは望んでいません。
Nickは、そうした「混乱の霧」の中で必死に道を探そうとしている人たちを、これまでに何度も見てきました。

 

そしてある時、Nickは決心したのです。自分がその霧を晴らすと。

 

どうやって？

Aristos (的確) & Mina (正直一途)の方針に基づき、他に比類なきレベルの採用企業情報を提供することによってです。

キャリア機会のメリットとデメリットに関する透明性がなければ、どうして応募できますか？

 

他に比類なき透明性を可能にするビジネスモデル

Nickは気づきました。他に比類なき透明性は、採用プロジェクトを100％担当することによってのみ可能になると。

そのためNickは、採用担当者と直接連絡を取ることができ、特定の採用プロジェクトに関して採用企業と独占契約を結ばない限り、採用プロジェクトへの関与をお断りしています。

特定の採用プロジェクトを100％担当するリクルーターは、世界でもほんの一握りしかおらず、Nickは現在その1人です。

Nickが採用プロジェクトを担当する場合、独占契約を結んでいるので、他のリクルーターはその案件にアクセスできません。

 

これがあなたにとって意味すること

このビジネスモデルとNickの信念により、Nickは求人を確実に埋めます。この記事を読んでいらっしゃるあなたが、ポジションにご関心があろうとなかろうとです。

つまり、誰かに無理に応募をお願いする立場にはいません。
だからこそ、もしご興味があれば、あなたのキャリアについてNickとリラックスした率直な会話をしてみてください。


他では得られないレベルの採用企業情報とキャリア機会に関する明確な洞察を、必要に応じて受け取ることができます。

Their relationships with high-performing sales professionals, hiring managers, senior sales leaders and C-Level executives allows technology companies to identify and hire top sales talent that know how to deliver results quickly and build long-term partnerships.

THE LEHIGH GROUP DIFFERENCE
Many recruiting firms place dozens of ads and sort through dozens of resumes to fill a role. They make a shortlist guided by what they see on a piece of paper and a brief phone call. Sometimes they fail to include great candidates and too often they send you bad ones. Often you work harder weeding out the bad candidates then finding the right one.

The LEHIGH Group does this differently.

The LEHIGH Group does not use a conventional approach to a sales talent search. Unlike most recruiters, we don’t play the volume game. We don’t place phony ads on job boards to build our candidate pool and we don’t send you a host of lightly vetted candidates with the hope that eventually you find a good one.

We know you’re looking for more than good.

You Are The Best. 
Quality is what defines you. Your sales team is the best. You are a company that only top-performers would be interested in joining. 

You Want The Best. 
You’re too busy and the opportunities in the market are too great to waste time coaching up an underperformer. 

The LEHIGH Group Finds You The Best.

 Garantie de qualité des alertes de matching :

Recevez une notification dès que votre profil atteint 70% de compatibilité avec une offre. 
Vous révélez votre identité uniquement si vous décidez de postuler.

Avec Manhattan, c’est le moment de prendre le contrôle de votre avenir professionnel.

 Des questions ? Contactez-nous à support@manhattan.ac

Manhattan n’attend plus que votre inscription.

 David

Name: PreparaRH Select
Description:
Estamos empolgados em anunciar uma emocionante atualização em nossos serviços de recrutamento e seleção! Após uma cuidadosa reflexão e análise do nosso compromisso com a excelência e a inovação, decidimos dar um nome exclusivo e vibrante ao nosso serviço de recrutamento e seleção: “Select”.

O “Select da PreparaRH” representa a nossa abordagem distinta e dedicada para encontrar os talentos certos para as suas necessidades empresariais. Ele personifica a nossa paixão em conectar talentos extraordinários às empresas que buscam o melhor para alcançar seus objetivos.

Desde que iniciamos a PreparaRH em 2019, já realizamos centenas de entrevistas e contratações, alcançando uma assertividade superior a 80% o que reflete nosso compromisso em identificar e conectar os melhores talentos às empresas que confiam em nós. Essa dedicação e carinho já foi inclusive reconhecida pela Gupy, que nos concedeu o prêmio de “Um dos 100 RHs que Inspiram” na categoria ENCANTAMENTO no ano de 2021.

Nossa equipe continuará a oferecer o mesmo nível excepcional de serviço personalizado e profissionalismo que vocês conhecem e confiam. Com o “Select da PreparaRH”, reforçamos nosso compromisso de proporcionar aos candidatos um atendimento mais ágil e humanizado e às empresas que nos contratam soluções de recrutamento e seleção que atendam às suas necessidades com precisão e eficácia. 

Estamos ansiosos para continuar essa jornada de sucesso ao seu lado, e a introdução do “Select da PreparaRH” marca um novo capítulo emocionante em nossa história. Estamos confiantes de que esta mudança trará ainda mais valor e excelência aos nossos serviços.

Agradecemos sinceramente pelo seu contínuo apoio e confiança na PreparaRH Soluções e fiquem atentos às próximas publicações, pois estaremos compartilhando ainda mais detalhes sobre o “Select” em breve. Enquanto isso convidamos vocês a conhecerem nossas oportunidades disponíveis em www.prepararh.com.br/vagas.

Why EXECUTIVE HUNT?

 Specialists in Emerging Markets Talent Acquisition: Focused expertise in Africa, the Middle East, and South Asia — regions where demand for skilled leadership is accelerating as economies open up and global businesses expand.

- REACTIVITE et EFFICACITE : candidatures sélectionnées et envoyées en 48H aux clients. Feedback auprès des candidats sous 48 à 72 heures.

- COMPREHENSION des enjeux métiers des clients et de leurs problématiques. Connaissance du réseau des développeurs, tech lead, PO, CTO, DSI... de leurs attentes et de leurs ambitions professionnelles.

- DISPONIBILITE : toujours à l'écoute des clients et des candidats.

- SUR-MESURE : auprès des clients pour leur proposer une démarche d'accompagnement dans leurs besoins en recrutement et auprès des candidats pour leur proposer une opportunité professionnelle correspondant à leurs attentes.

- CONSEILS auprès des clients et des candidats et coaching / préparation des candidats à leurs entretiens.

Name: Scalrr
Description:
Scalrr grew from roots planted in the world's most innovative companies. 

Our rich history and inside experience give us the unrivaled ability to find unique talent who meets you on your level. We focus on early-stage and high-growth companies, helping founders and visionaries fill critical positions across product, technology, and people roles.

Scalrr's distinction lies in leveraging real, lived experiences to connect founders and visionaries with transformative talent within three primary domains: 

Technology: 

Understanding that founders and visionaries are often pushing the limits of what’s possible. The capabilities of their engineers and scientists will lay the foundation that sets them apart. The talent with these skills are often highly sought-after, and finding those who share your vision can be the difference between making a technological breakthrough or not. 

Product: 

Product is where the magic happens. We build teams who know how to build products customers love. But it goes beyond this. Did they work on a 0-1 product in a specific domain? Were they involved in a successful launch or exit? Did they do this in a stage-relevant role? We want product people who create instant desire for your product with your customers.

People: 

People are a company's most important asset. As a company scales, attracting and retaining the right talent is hard. This is why we added HR and Talent recruiting to our services. Because companies tend to build out their People teams at a later stage, we work with early-stage through enterprise companies, helping them place the HR and talent leadership who enable high-performance cultures. 

We celebrate founders and visionaries not only by supporting today's startups but also by recognizing the next generation of inventors. We allocated 3% of our profits to support emerging inventors. 

Welcome to Scalrr. We’re excited you’re here.

Description:
Let's make 2026 the year you find more career satisfaction. 

Hi, I am Trish McGrath, founder of EDGE Career Solutions, a private US-based resume writing and career coaching practice. 

A Certified Career Transition Coach and Digital Career Strategist specializing in coaching for advancement and redirection, I help people make the right career moves to achieve professional success. Whether you’re pursuing the C-Suite or pivoting into a second career, modern hiring practices require new and better ways to differentiate yourself from the competition. I’ll help you climb the leadership ranks by establishing your personal brand and leveraging the strength of your network.

Recognized as a hidden job market expert with 20+ years of private practice, higher ed and corporate experience, I empower people to move from where they are to where they want to be. I learned firsthand that its never too late to pivot into a brand new career. I became a  resume writer & career coach in 2009 to help people who felt stuck in jobs that made them miserable or were out of work because they didn’t understand modern job search needs. My personal, 1:1 approach fills the void between costly high-end consulting firms and generic resume mills whose templates rarely win interviews. I work individually with each of my clients and learn what is important to them, so that we can collaborate in a meaningful way on their career. 

When you hire me, we’ll work together directly. I will conduct all coaching sessions and create all resumes, profiles and job search action plans myself – I do not utilize subcontractors. In addition, I can support your ongoing success with LinkedIn training, onboarding coaching, and outplacement services. 

 Want to learn more?  I invite you to email me at Trish.McGrath@EdgeCareerSolutions.com or call my office at (860) 658-6480. 
To your success,
Trish

Name: Purcell International Group
Description:
Founded in 1969, Purcell International Group is a premier retained executive search and recruitment firm, with an unsurpassed track record of successfully completing searches across North America, Latin America, EMEA and Asia Pacific. 

Purcell International Group’s consistent achievement in a very competitive environment is a result of several factors; foremost among them being the firm’s method of business operations, training, and an underlying dedication to partnering with our clients. Emphasis is placed on maintaining the highest level of quality, attention to detail, and work ethic, as well as our commitment to completing each search engagement in a timely and cost-effective manner.  

Purcell has a seasoned team of over 40 Senior Partners, Partners, Account Executives, Researchers and Support staff, all of whom are devoted to the successful outcome of each search, in addition to ensuring an exceptional client and candidate experience. 

Our Partners are responsible for leading large scale Retained Search Projects, Process Design, Organizational Transformation, Change Management and Diversity/Inclusion Initiatives for Fortune & Private Equity clients, as well as Small and Mid-cap organizations. Purcell’s success in leading Officer, Vice President, and Director level searches in Supply Chain Management, Manufacturing, Industry 4.0, Quality, Continuous Improvement, Engineering, Strategic Sourcing & Procurement, and Commodity Management, as well as General Management, Sales/Commercial Leadership, Business Development, Strategy, R&D, Human Resources, EH&S, Real Estate, Construction and Facilities is unmatched.

Purcell International Group provides an experience factor of over fifty years in the executive search arena and is known for acquiring a thorough understanding of client needs, innovation in multiple staffing situations, and an unrivaled rate of offers made/accepted, resulting in long-term retention of the leaders placed at client companies.

Executive Search for Mission-Led Technology  
C-Suite, VP and Director 

Our hedgehog is finding outstanding leadership, aligned to a company’s mission and able to execute on commercial and social goals. Great missions deserve exceptional execution.

We are retained for leadership roles at Director, VP and C-Suite level. Occasionally undertaking ‘hard to fill’ individual contributor roles. These roles cover the full range of leadership associated with tech enabled companies, including commercial, technical and operations.    

Recent successful mandates include CEO, CFOO, CTO and VP of Content for high-growth and PE backed companies.

Sienna Edge apply best practices to every executive search mandate, constantly evolving their methodology and innovative search processes to provide every client with an exceptional shortlist of talent aligned to their unique requirements. This is delivered through the use of our unique and robust search and assessment framework, Insight 360.

Mission led search strategy

Each assignment will commence with a thorough assessment of the company’s mission and culture. Our experience shows candidates aligned to mission, the organisations DNA, have a much greater likelihood of success.

Description:

Description:

With a wealth of industry knowledge and unparalleled regional knowledge, VA Consulting Group are experts at sourcing the best talent across multiple verticals, including Sales and Marketing, Finance and Accountancy, HR and Professional Support, Supply Chain/Logistics, Legal and C-Suite. For over three decades, Ray & Berndtson has been a top 10 global executive search firm. Founded in 1965, our firm draws on a consultant network with a vast pool of experience that goes back four and a half decades and spans 55 offices in 35 countries across the globe.

While retaining its name in select locations, our business model has undergone a change to respond to new business realities. This model is different from most of our competitors and the local mass-market recruitment firms. Across global locations, we seek to establish a model that allows Partners to retain their individual identities, while establishing a partnership with Ray & Berndtson. This provides us the opportunity to be more flexible and responsive to our clients’ unique needs and strengthens our credo of being a ‘truly global yet deeply local’ executive search firm.

Description:
Welcome to Odgers' Asia Pacific page, where you will find local news, updates, and insights from the Asia Pacific region. 

At Odgers, we assist private and public sector organisations in finding the right global leaders throughout the Asia Pacific region, including Australia, Singapore, Hong Kong, China, Japan, and India. 

Our experienced team has the scale, reach, and expertise to serve all major markets while remaining lean, flexible, and innovative.

Being a challenger is at the heart of our cultural DNA. We have a track record of anticipating our clients' needs and challenging the status quo. We are collaborative experts, located across all major global cities. 

Our clients come from every shape and size of organisation, from start-ups to multinational corporations, and span the private, not-for-profit and public sectors, with expertise in business, government, academic and public life. Many of our clients work with us time and again. All our clients understand the value of finding the right person for the right job at the right time – and in the right way.

Our cultures and Values:
Our culture and values are the key to our success. To maintain our challenger culture, our people are empowered to be curious, creative and agile. We are an inclusive and diverse organisation, and we encourage our people to be true to themselves. We are rigorous yet creative, results-driven, and committed to delivering on our promises.

In addition to great people who are trusted and uphold strong values, we utilise industry-leading technology throughout the search process. Our structure rewards teamwork between colleagues and collaboration with clients and candidates.

From operations leadership and project management to corporate support and executive roles, we handle a broad spectrum of positions. Our exclusive focus on the concrete industry means we conduct searches that are precise and effective, helping your team find the right fit and achieve long-term success.

Concrete Careers was originally founded by Gene Vineyard as Vineyard & Partners in 1976. Our rebranding to Concrete Careers marked a strategic shift to reflect our dedication to this niche sector. Today, we remain focused on maintaining our legacy and commitment to the concrete industry.

Name: Work/Life Recruiting
Description:
Work/Life Recruiting provides executive and management search services to technology companies in the B2B spaces of Life Sciences, Industrial Instrumentation & Automation, plus other exciting technologies. 

Every hire is an opportunity to upgrade a specific position. As a result, we strive to give our clients an unfair competitive advantage with every engagement. 

Our clients value how Work/Life Recruiting emphasizes the alignment between the company's job and the job the potential employee wants. As a result, companies struggling to compete on comp and benefits can be successful by emphasizing the work that the candidate will do. 

We place candidates executive and manager-level candidates across the following functions:
Engineering, Marketing, Operations, Quality, Regulatory, plus Sales/Business Development. 

Our approach to candidate evaluation creates a level playing field for all candidates. It supports DEI policies while making it easier for hiring teams to identify the A-caliber candidates you require.

Clients hire us for the results and how we achieve them.  

•	78.5% of our placements are with repeat clients
•	Average of 4.78-year retention rate of executive placements
•	Average of 4.75-year retention rate of non-executive sales placements
•	Average of 4.53- year retention rate of non-executive non-sales placements

How you meet your hiring needs is your business. Helping you exceed them is our business.

Name: Founders Keepers
Description:

Our team is diverse, international and entrepreneurial and we have over 20 years’ deep experience in executive search. This includes a mix of boutique and leading global executive search firms as well as broader HR experience. We have in-person contact with some of the most powerful and well-connected entrepreneurs, corporate CEOs and senior investors.

We are successful and we stand out. We are a close-knit team of enterprising and hardworking individuals. We bring the combined experiences, knowledge and networks of the whole team, and the broader Founders Forum ecosystem, to bear on each project.

We have offices in London and Amsterdam, and we work with clients and candidates internationally.

Description:

Name: Wirz & Partners Management Consulting AG
Description:
Wirz & Partners is a market‑leading executive search and recruiting boutique for NED, Board and C‑Level roles in Switzerland and Europe. We work with listed corporations, family‑owned businesses and PE-/VC‑backed companies that need critical leadership positions filled with precision, speed and discretion.
Our core focus is on Board and NED appointments as well as C‑Suite and senior leadership roles where strategic impact, governance experience and cultural fit are decisive. We support Chairs, Boards, CEOs and CHROs in translating their strategic agenda into clear role profiles and in identifying leaders who can execute in complex, regulated and technology‑driven environments. Executive search and recruiting are fully integrated – from role definition and market mapping through to offer and onboarding support.
Each mandate follows a research‑driven executive search and recruiting process, combining in‑house market mapping, targeted direct approach and structured assessment. Partner‑led delivery and senior involvement at every step ensure that stakeholder expectations, ownership structures and succession dynamics are fully understood. Shortlists are intentionally sharp and decision‑ready, not long lists of “maybes”, so that Boards and NEDs can focus on strategic discussion instead of screening.
We regularly recruit for NED and Board roles (including Committee Chairs), as well as CEO, CFO, COO, CTO, CIO, CDO, CHRO and other key leadership positions across core business, technology and corporate functions. Clients choose Wirz & Partners when they want the quality and reach of an international executive search firm, but with the transparency, flexibility and senior attention of a true boutique – a partner who understands how high‑stakes Board, NED and C‑Level recruiting really works in the Swiss and wider European market.

Name: Taylor Transportation Search Group
Description:

Our approach goes beyond standard practices, offering "in the trenches" insights into the industry, candidates, and clients. We take pride in providing a high-touch, hands-on experience throughout the executive search process. Whether you need help fulfilling immediate hiring needs, planning for the future, navigating complex hiring challenges, or simply seeking guidance on team dynamics, we are here to support you.

We specialize in filling roles at all levels, from C-Suite to Supervisor, including positions like CEO, COO, CFO, VP, Director, Manager, Supervisor, and professionals such as Engineers, CPAs, Project Managers, and Sales. Our expertise covers the Passenger and Freight Transportation industries, including Rail, Ports, Trucking, and Warehousing. What sets us apart is our deep industry knowledge, gained through direct engagement with clients, site visits, and hands-on experience. This allows us to provide tailored, strategic advice, prioritizing both cultural fit and technical expertise.

Our team’s diverse experience and continuous learning, supported by senior mentors, ensure we always bring the right expertise to each search. Ultimately, our focus is on delivering outcomes that align with your business needs—setting us apart from the competition.

Let’s talk! Reach out to us at 847-295-7097 or email Info@TTSGSearch.com to learn more.

Name: Odgers Berndtson Asia Pacific
Description:
We are a leading global executive search company that assists private and public sector organisations in finding the best leaders throughout the Asia Pacific region, including Australia, Singapore, Hong Kong, China, Japan, and India.

Our experienced team has the scale, reach, and experience to serve all major markets while also staying lean, flexible, and innovative.

Being a challenger is at the heart of our cultural DNA. We have a track record of anticipating our client's needs and challenging the status quo. We are collaborative experts, located across all major global cities. 

Our clients come from every shape and size of organisation, from start-ups to multinational corporations, and span the private, not-for-profit and public sectors, with expertise in business, government, academic and public life. Many of our clients work with us time and again. All our clients understand the value of finding the right person for the right job at the right time – and in the right way.

Our cultures and Values:
Our culture and values are the key to our success. To maintain our challenger culture, our people are empowered to be curious, creative and agile. We are inclusive and diverse, and we encourage our people to be true to themselves. We are rigorous as well as creative, results-driven, and committed to delivering what we promise.

As well as great people who are trusted and uphold strong values, we utilise industry-leading technology throughout the search process. Our structure rewards teamwork between colleagues, and collaboration with clients and candidates.

Three partnerships mean everything to us – the relationship between our clients, our candidates and our colleagues.

Name: PatchWorK
Description:
PoV : Le recrutement en 2023…
A y regarder de près, le recrutement n’a pas du tout évolué depuis 50 ans !
Alors oui, internet et le smartphone ont changé la donne.
Mais en vrai, depuis 1973, « On » recrute avec :
Les mêmes process… toujours trop longs,
Les mêmes entretiens… au feeling,
Les mêmes annonces… largement copiées collées,
Les mêmes CVs…et en plus une Lettre de Motivation,
Les mêmes (mauvaises) habitudes... de poker menteur,
Les mêmes pratiques... remplies de biais,
Les mêmes décisions… subjectives.
Résultat...
Les candidats sont désabusés,
Les entreprises sont déconnectées,
Les cabinets sont démodés,
Les recruteurs sont débordés,
Bref… Tout le Monde se cherche, personne ne se trouve…
Et si on osait changer cela ?
Allez venez, on invente le recrutement Nouvelle Génération.
Et nous avons choisi de le construire avec vous :
Talents, Entreprises, Managers et Professionnels RH de l'Afrique !
Oserez-vous rejoindre notre Patchwork-Lab ?
PatchWorK, 
The New Art Of Recruitment…
 
Do Not Follow Us,
Build With Us

Name: ProCapita Headhunter Indonesia
Description:

* We provide a 24/7 premier client service.

* We have built Indonesia's largest professional network; 450,000+ executives.

* We perform traditional "Direct Approach Only" executive search. We Never use online job ads. 

* We manually identify, long-list & contact all relevant professionals for every assignment. 

* 99% of our placements involve "passive candidates", executives that are happily employed when we approach them about our clients opportunity.

* All of our consultants are senior executive search specialists, possessing a minimum 15+ years of experience.

* We've faced almost every challenge that can occur during an executive hiring process. We know what to do and when.

Name: Extract Talent
Description:
Executive Search Specialists in C-Suite, Executives, and Leadership Roles in the Oil, Energy, and Renewables sector. We focus on roles in the downstream sector that deal in technology, operations, equipment, and commercial. 

Our method goes beyond traditional recruiting techniques, focusing on developing a deep understanding of both the candidate's aspirations and the employer's vision. This dual perspective ensures a more precise and harmonious alignment, benefiting both parties in the long term. This approach has consistently led to successful placements that foster both individual growth and organizational success, demonstrating the unique value of a coaching-informed recruitment strategy.

Our Clients

Our expertise is in building relationships with our clients so that we can fully understand the unique dynamic and culture of their company. This enables us to find not just qualified candidates but those that have the leadership skills to move your business further than you thought possible. 

We have hired C-suite executives, leadership roles, and technical specialists for industry leading companies as well as start ups in the energy sector. What matters to us working with companies that are doing inspiring and innovative work that makes an impact on our planet. 

Our Candidates

Nancy Newman, our Founder and CEO, has spent over 30 years building relationships in the industry. She is not just a recruiter but a trusted advisor to our candidates and helps them figure out what they want their future to look like and align that with companies that share the same vision. 

Our Team

We have a team of dedicated industry experts across the scope of downstream oil, energy, and renewables. We work with technical specialists in the heat transfer equipment and technologies in the areas of catalysts, FCC, Fired/Unfired, Burners, Combustion, HRSG, and WHRU.

Name: Artemia Executive
Description:
Artemia est une entreprise à impact sociétal, active dans toute la Suisse à travers des activités d’executive search et de conseil stratégique. Elle a été co-fondée au printemps 2018 par Eglantine Jamet et Sigolène Chavane, en partenariat avec le groupe UMEO, parmi les leaders du recrutement en Suisse. 

Artemia œuvre à transformer durablement le monde du travail en améliorant l’équilibre entre les femmes et les hommes dans les postes de direction et en accompagnant la création d’une culture inclusive. 

Agir en faveur d’une plus grande mixité, cela veut dire: 

- s’assurer de la présence de suffisamment de candidates dans le processus de recrutement, en allant les chercher de manière proactive puisque, plus le poste est élevé, moins les femmes postulent statistiquement. 
- questionner les critères traditionnels d’évaluation du leadership et réfléchir à ce qui est réellement nécessaire, en termes de compétences et de qualités personnelles, dans l’exercice d’un poste à responsabilité. 
- intégrer une vision innovante du recrutement: réfléchir en termes de potentiel et valoriser les compétences transférables, pour favoriser une diversité de parcours et de points de vue. 
- accompagner les comités de sélection afin de s’assurer que le processus soit le plus équitable et inclusif possible, en limitant les interférences liées aux biais. 

L’ensemble des services d’Artemia soutient le développement d’un monde professionnel plus inclusif. 

 Nos services : Executive Search · Conseil stratégique · Assessment · Coaching.  
Lausanne · Genève · Neuchâtel · Berne

Description:
Optima provide fractional tech recruitment services tailored for startups and high-growth scale-ups. Our flexible approach helps you access expert recruitment support without the cost of a full-time hire, whether you need to fill key roles quickly or scale your team efficiently.

We take the time to understand your company’s culture and hiring needs, ensuring that every candidate aligns with your vision. With years of experience and an extensive network of top-tier talent, we help you secure the best candidates, fast.

We also prioritise a best-in-class candidate experience, ensuring every interaction is professional, transparent, and engaging.  

With a flexible and adaptable service model, we offer several options to suit your business requirements:

Day/Hourly Rate: 
This option works well for start-ups and scale-ups that need recruitment support for a specific period or project, without long-term commitment.

Contingency Search:

Our model allows clients to work with us to develop a  plan that works for their unique circumstances.

We recognized that "one size does NOT fit all" and as a result TWG is recognized as a valued business partner by a wide range of Fortune 500, not-for-profit and emerging organizations across all industry segments. Since its inception, our firm has been based on helping our clients experience transformation through our proven systems and streamlined processes which lead to the identification of ideal candidates.

The Woodmansee Group is an owner led retained executive search firm built to remove the risk from high-stakes executive hiring.

We don’t start with resumes. We start by helping leadership teams define exactly what success looks like; outcomes, execution expectations, incentives, and cultural fit. That clarity prevents mis-hires before a search ever begins.

We run a disciplined, performance-driven search process designed to identify executives who don’t just interview well, but perform, integrate, and stay. Our work is selective by design and focused on senior roles where the cost of getting it wrong is measured in years, not weeks.

Every engagement is structured around accountability. If the executive we place does not perform or does not remain in the role within the agreed window, we stand behind the outcome, not just the hire.

O que a Jobí Hub pode fazer pela sua empresa:
– Assumir a vaga que precisa ser fechada com urgência e cronograma estruturado de entrega
– Formar o RH para contratar com eficiência e visão de negócio
– Entregar pessoas alinhadas com cultura, competência e resultado

O que a Jobí pode fazer pela sua carreira:
– Desenvolver sua capacidade de contratar com mais segurança
– Ensinar um método validado que gera resultado

Name: Epicene RH
Description:
Aujourd'hui et plus que jamais, l'entreprise veut acquérir les talents qui constituent un élément différenciant de taille. Pour répondre au changement de paradigmes - les business modèles qui émergent font appel à de nouvelles compétences qui raréfient les candidatures - Epicène cumule plusieurs méthodes d'identification. A une époque où la digitalisation et le télétravail se sont brusquement accélérés, le recrutement doit placer l'humain au coeur de son process, Epicène apprécie les soft skills et les aspirations du candidat, qui est un individu dans toute sa singularité, et prend en compte l'entreprise comme organisation humaine avec son histoire, sa culture et ses valeurs.
EPICENE s'engage sur :
- un calendrier déterminé avec le Client, en début de recherche,
- un suivi d'intégration (d'autant plus crucial dans le cadre du télétravail),
- une reprise en garantie de 6 mois.

Name: ST Search & Consulting
Description:
Since 1902, ST Search & Consulting (ST) has been dedicated to helping schools find and support exceptional educators, with the mission of aiding member schools in providing the best possible education to their students. 

Our staff collectively brings hundreds of years of experience in education and private school leadership, and we are deeply committed to our mission.
We apply this personal experience and dedication to all our services, whether administrative placement, AD development, CFO coaching, or retained leadership searches.

Name: Signera Rekrytering - Vi kan samhällsnyttiga organisationer
Description:
Rätt person på rätt plats - en rekryteringspartner med skyhöga mål!

Signeras konsulter står bakom hundratals tillsättningar av ledarroller, specialister och andra nyckelfunktioner inom den samhällsnyttiga sektorn. Här gör vi det vi brinner för - rekryterar morgondagens ledare och specialister till organisationer som gör skillnad på svensk arbetsmarknad. 

Vi hjälper även samhällsnyttiga organisationer och företag att snabbt hitta chefer och specialister för tidsbegränsade uppdrag. Genom vårt omfattande nätverk och gedigna erfarenhet levererar vi snabba, kvalitativa lösningar som säkerställer kontinuitet och stabilitet i er verksamhet.

Name: The Search & Consulting Group at CS&A
Description:
The Search Group at Carney Sandoe focuses exclusively on retained searches for school leaders such as heads of school and other top administrators. Our consultants share decades of leadership experience in schools, on boards of trustees, and in the non-profit and corporate sectors alike. We have completed hundreds of successful leadership searches for independent and charter schools throughout the United States and abroad.

Our comprehensive, flexible, and disciplined process, along with our global network, allows us to identify, approach, recruit, and evaluate top leadership candidates extensively and efficiently. We know and recognize extraordinary leaders who are passionate in their commitment to children: leaders who create and embody true vision, who communicate articulately and inspire, and who have proven track records in the world of education. We are devoted to our professional practice and to offering a process characterized by thoroughness and integrity. And we guarantee our results.

Name: Premi Homme

Name: Sapphire Human Capital
Description:
Founded in 2008, Sapphire Human Solutions is a premier human capital firm specializing in high-end retained executive search across India, with offices in Mumbai and New Delhi. Our expertise spans five industry-focused practices: BFSI, Real Estate & Infrastructure, Consumer & Retail, Technology (including ITES), and Pharma, Healthcare & Life Sciences—each led by senior professionals with deep sector knowledge and proven search expertise.

Our guiding principle is simple: create value. We achieve this by partnering with clients to identify and hire the right leadership talent for sustainable growth, helping candidates make informed career choices, and growing alongside both.

What sets us apart is our deep relationship-driven approach, high closure ratios on retained mandates, and a track record of placing transformative leaders who deliver measurable impact. We leverage a robust network, market intelligence, and discreet search processes to ensure precision and quality in every assignment.

Backed by the Anand Rathi Group, we combine resources, insights, and commitment to deliver exceptional outcomes in leadership hiring—consistently earning the trust of leading Indian and global organizations.

Name: AVIVA Talent Advisors

We help companies build their future faster - with the right leaders in place and the global teams to accelerate delivery.

Precision + Scale

Whether you're hiring a Chief Product Officer or assembling a team, AVIVA delivers both strategic talent and execution support - all through one trusted partner.

Let’s build your team - with Precision.

 Learn more: www.avivata.com

#ExecutiveSearch #ProductLeadership #WomenOwned #StartupHiring #DataOps #DigitalTransformation #PrecisionSearch

Name: Newpeople
Description:
Newpeople has been a thought leader in the field of digital leadership for the past 16 years. We offer different services in executive search and interim solutions. In this, we work for organisations transitioning from ‘old to new’ which are in differing phases of the digital transformation process and we work for ‘pure players’ that started out digitally from the beginning and where growth is a key point of focus (start-ups, scale-ups and grown ups). 

Within the digital domain we work on commercial as well as technical senior and executive positions, and we also assist in digital supervisory board searches.

We inspire our clients to think differently and to work on a sustainable future together. We achieve this by defining a number of stages of digital maturity and set the stages to the right kind of leadership and to the relevant team.

We are the proud founders of the Digital Transformers Awards, Online Tuesday and the Newpeople Executive Study Tour, to name a few. These have taken place in Silicon Valley, China and Israel amongst others. This is our way of bringing different knowledge together in order to remain up to date regarding market trends and developments.

From our vision on the different types of digital leadership, it follows that we work together with our clients to define the kind of leadership needed depending on the stage of transformation the company is in and to examine the challenges that come coupled with this. We offer advice on the design and diversity of the (digital) teams, which is also based on our vision.

We help our clients with the advantages of innovative and inclusive search strategies as well as offering a unique insight into the market.

Name: Acuity Associates
Description:
Acuity Associates provide skills-validated Finance Directors and CFOs into organisations either on a Project or Executive Search basis.

Acuity Associates uses The Acuity Method to validate (or not!) the key skills of Finance Directors and CFOs as explored in the White Paper 'The 5D FD' before presenting to clients. 

The Acuity Method ensures that the candidates presented to clients have the required skills reducing the risk of hiring an Finance Director or CFO that are missing the competencies required for a particular business. Acuity's extensive benchmarking shows that only 1 out of 5 Finance Director or CFO candidates have the right skills for emerging mid market businesses.

Services include:

* Readying businesses for sale so they survive buyers' due diligence processes
* Providing right-skilled CFOs/FDs into business post liquidity event

* Part time CFO / FD support for projects or on-going
- Creating data rooms
- Supporting existing finance teams through the sales process
- Enhancing systems, processes and reporting

* Interim CFO / FD support
- Creating data rooms
- Supporting existing finance teams through the sales process
- Enhancing systems, processes and reporting

* Executive Search - uniquely only putting forward candidates who come in the top quartile of candidates against The Acuity Method benchmarks and percentiles.
- FDs / CFOs
- FCs

Name: MintSkill HR Solutions LLP
Description:
MintSkill HR Solutions is an Executive Search firm that strives to be the provider of quality HR outsourcing services. We have been creating partnerships with clients to add value to their businesses. MintSkill is headquartered in Mumbai.

Name: Sterling International
Description:
Sterling International is a global provider of Retained Executive Search and consulting services in the Fashion, Retail and Luxury Goods sectors, with offices in Paris, Milan, New York and Brussels.

Our multi-cultural team members come from leading companies in the fashion and luxury industry, and possess extensive executive search experience from top firms. For more information or inquiries regarding our services, please contact us at: info@sterling-conseil.com

Name: Treehouse Partners
Description: For us, the treehouse symbolizes our unique vantage point, our creativity, and our ability to offer a different perspective on human capital.
