Please contact us if you'd like to learn more!

Name: Urrly
Description:
Urrly is a portfolio-wide executive search partner for lower middle market private equity firms.

We help PE-backed companies execute faster by hiring target-state leaders. These are executives who have already scaled the exact type of business your portfolio company is becoming.

Our work is most concentrated in operationally complex sectors, including healthcare services and regulated business models, where execution mistakes are expensive and leadership gaps surface quickly.

Traditional executive search optimizes for access and pedigree. Urrly optimizes for execution.

The result is lower leadership risk, faster time-to-impact, and improved exit readiness across the portfolio.

Name: Offor
Description:
Career navigation shouldn't be something you figure out alone.

We help leaders in two ways:

 What We Offer
Offor Talent - Career management for executives. You get a dedicated agent, a 360 review of your brand, and a personalized strategy. We work with you as your goals evolve—not just for one transition.

Executive Search - We place leaders using The Offor Method. We figure out your culture and context first, then build a profile for who this leader needs to be to succeed in your organization. The work starts before we ever talk to candidates.

 How We're Different
Your search will be different because we are different. People come to us because they want an innovative solution to an evergreen problem—finding and hiring leadership. We think differently. You get a stacked team with leaders who've needed to be creative and thoughtful throughout their careers. We will get you a leader that will succeed.

That means if you're our talent client, you understand hiring from the inside. If you're our search client, you get the strategic work that leads to good hires.

Our process centers on honesty. We tell you what we see—strengths, blind spots, what's blocking you. Straight talk.

Ready to stop figuring this out alone?
 www.offor.co
 www.offortalentnetwork.co

Name: VEM AB - Rekrytering och interimslösningar av ledande befattningar
Description:
När det behövs en ny medarbetare till en ledande befattning, måste alla faktorer stämma. Vi på VEM har lång erfarenhet av rekrytering och interimslösningar av ledande befattningar och hjälper dig gärna.  

När vi rekryterar är det inte vad som är det centrala. Det är inte vad som leder fram till målet eller som slutligen fyller en plats i ert företag eller i er styrelse. Kärnan i vår rekryteringsprocess är vem. Det är alltid viktigare än vad. Vem handlar om att finna rätt person. Att hitta kompetens som sträcker sig längre än cv:n. Att upptäcka en personlighet som passar i er företagskultur och med de värderingar som finns innanför era väggar.  Ni vet vad som behövs. Vår uppgift är att ta reda på vem som behövs. Det har vi lång erfarenhet av och genom åren har vi skapat ett mycket starkt nätverk av personer på ledande befattningar.

VEM startade 2002 och sedan dess har våra uppdragsgivare varit allt från mindre lokala företag till internationella koncerner. Vårt huvudkontor är beläget i Jönköping och vi har även kontor i Växjö och i Värnamo. Under flera år har vi blivit utsett till Gasellföretag av Dagens Industri, tack vare vår stabila tillväxt och det är vi stolta över. 

Vill ni veta mer om VEM eller komma i kontakt med oss är ni  välkomna att ringa oss på 036-570 11 80 eller läs mer på www.vem.se där kan du också registrera dig i vårt nätverk.

A future oriented recruitment company focused on recruitment and interim management of coveted and qualified executive and specialist posts. Our recruiters have extensive business experience and qualified posts and we have a wide and contiousely expanding network with attractive employers.

Name: Orion Global Talent
Description:
Orion Global Talent / TeamITAR is a highly specialized executive search and talent acquisition agency with a proven track record of placing senior and mid-level talent across industries. We excel in filling roles from CEOs to technical and engineering positions, supporting sectors such as medical equipment, biotechnology, aerospace, injection molding, consumer products, and global consulting. Our deep industry knowledge and extensive network allow us to successfully complete hard-to-fill and highly confidential placements. With a talent database spanning over 40 years, particularly in legal and regulatory compliance, we have access to top professionals in law, corporate governance, and government agencies, enabling us to leverage both direct engagement and high-level referrals for critical roles.

We specialize in sourcing passive talent—those not actively seeking employment but open to exclusive opportunities—and have a global reach that allows us to fill highly specialized international regulatory positions. Our expertise shines in high-pressure situations, including pending consent agreements or when confidential hires are necessary. We take pride in marketing our clients' career opportunities to attract top-tier passive talent.

Our philosophy centers on aligning clients and candidates with roles that prioritize work-life balance and long-term success, fostering mutually beneficial, empowering, and profitable relationships. Beyond talent acquisition, we are dedicated to giving back through initiatives like the Igniting Power Program, which supports careers in recruitment; Rebecca’s Journey, offering intimate small group tours and retreats for breast cancer survivors; and the Platelets for Life Foundation, which promotes platelet education, donorship, and research. These initiatives reflect our commitment to making a positive impact in both our industry and the communities we serve.

Name: FINCO Search
Description:
As of 1st May 2024 FINCO Search will become the dedicated provider of Financial Markets and Regulatory professionals as part of specialist Search firm Imperium Commodity Search.

Search, Hunt, and Deliver. 

FINCO Search provides bespoke hiring and recruitment solutions to a range of senior and strategic roles within Brokerage & Trading, Asset Management, Wealth Management, Private Banking, Family Offices, Investment Advisory and FinTech.

Using our market leading data driven methodology, we provide a bespoke, fully visible market mapping and recruitment search process, in collaboration with our clients, to deliver a real choice of both active and passive talent without compromising on quality or speed.

Our approach ensures that we deliver a credible platform in which to drive competitive growth through strategic hiring. 

Retain us to guarantee your next hire; we love the challenge and always deliver.

Name: High Potential Talents
Description:
High Potential Talents est un cabinet de recrutement spécialisé dans l’identification et la mise en relation des talents les plus prometteurs avec les entreprises à la recherche d’excellence.

Nous publions régulièrement des offres d’emploi dans divers secteurs d’activité, offrant aux candidats des opportunités uniques pour accélérer leur carrière. Grâce à notre expertise et à un large réseau de professionnels qualifiés, nous accompagnons les entreprises dans le recrutement de profils stratégiques et à fort potentiel.

Name: HR Connections Executive Search
Description:
HR Connections was started by Debbie Barr Shapiro in 1993 to provide experienced service in the Human Resources executive and professional HR staffing market. Our motto, “we match the best HR people with the best HR jobs” was adopted based on feedback we received from our clients and our candidates regarding our service.

Prior to starting HR Connections 30 years ago, Debbie Barr Shapiro spent 12 years as a HR professional with PepsiCo and Texas Instruments. Debbie holds a Masters degree in Human Resources and Labor Relations from Michigan State University and a Bachelor of Arts degree in Human Resources and Marketing from Michigan State’s Broad School of Management. This experience and education provided her with a clear understanding of the critical success factors with the HR function. This has been a competitive advantage over many other recruiters who do not understand Human Resources today.

Jaclyn Shapiro, Vice President and Executive Search Specialist, has a solid foundation within Staffing and her aPHR and PHR, paired with an understanding of people and leadership dynamics with a commitment to strategic talent acquisition. In her recent years within the executive HR search domain, she has successfully managed searches across diverse industries. 

HR Connections is a service driven business looking forward to servicing your needs.

Client Value:

    Strong Client relationships built on regular communication.

    Ability to understand client’s needs and partner with client.

    Experience spanning 21 years in HR search plus 12 years in Corporate and Field HR leadership positions.

    Proprietary and confidential database of over 35,000 HR professionals.

    Reliable and high integrity business partner who can deliver candidates in a timely and efficient manner.

    Candidates who match company culture and job requirements.

    Candidates who not only have the technical knowledge but also the business acumen and interpersonal skills

Name: CAREER PRO
Description:
Pracując jako rekruter i zauważyłem, że ludzie wracający po latach na rynek pracy, często mają problem w odnalezieniu się w nowej rzeczywistości. Mechanizmy działające na rynku pracy ulegają ciągłym zmianom, a szum informacyjny utrudnia odnalezienie rzetelnych treści. 

Wiem też, że trudno jest samemu rozpocząć działanie w kierunku wprowadzania zmian. Z moim wsparciem zaplanujesz i wdrożysz konkretny plan. Przejdziesz z punku A do B, niwelując przy tym ryzyko popełnienia krytycznych błędów.

Poza tym na pewnym etapie kariery warto mieć zaufanego doradcę. Kogoś kto z dalszej perspektywy spojrzy na Twoje doświadczenia, niekoniecznie oceni ale wysłucha i zada właściwe pytania oraz pomoże wyznaczyć kolejne kroki w drodze do celu. 

Jeśli trafiłeś/aś do mnie z polecenia to wiesz, że stawiam na sprawdzone metody, dopasowane do Twojej sytuacji zawodowej i wymagań rynku/branży.

Rozwiązania wchodzące w zakres programu to suma moich ponad 10 letnich doświadczeń. Sukcesów i porażek we współpracy z managerami i specjalistami z branż / sektorów rynku takich jak: IT & Telco, Media,  Finanse & Banking, Consumer Goods & Retail, Healthcare & Life Sciences, Manufacturing & Transportation czy Real Estate.

Najczęściej współpracuję z osobami na stanowiskach: CEO | CFO | CIO | COO | CTO | CISO | CSO | CMO | Country Manager/GM | Marketing Manager | Digital Manager | Sales Manager | IT Manager | Security Manager | Production Manager | Export/Import Manager | Product Manager | Project Manager oraz ekspertami/specjalistami.

Name: Lyneer Search Group
Description:
For over 25 years, Lyneer Search Group has redefined recruitment and executive search by establishing enduring partnerships with select clients. Focused primarily on finance roles, we engage deeply with each organization, supporting their entire finance departments to ensure both organizational growth and individual career success. Our nationwide presence spans across industries primarily focused on Insurance, Financial Services, Wealth Management, allowing us to connect premier accounting and finance talent with some of the most dynamic firms, from early-stage startups to established global corporations.

Lyneer differentiates itself by offering a dual approach: permanent placements and flexible, high-caliber contract or consultancy solutions. Our talent acquisition process is far more than transactional; it’s a journey marked by integrity and respect, fostering a collaborative process that ensures the best possible match for both client and candidate. We pride ourselves on understanding the broader aspirations of each individual, treating them not as commodities but as partners in a significant life decision.

Guided by core values of transparency, critical thinking, and continuous improvement, we challenge conventional approaches to deliver fresh, tailored solutions to our clients. Every search is executed with urgency, professionalism, and a client-first mindset, from the initial conversation to the successful integration of new hires. Our team’s commitment to excellence continues well beyond the signed offer, ensuring smooth transitions and lasting partnerships that reflect our principles of integrity and effective communication.

This dedication to personalized, high-impact recruitment drives our mission: to lead companies & individuals on a path to their greatest potential. Lyneer Search Group is not merely a recruitment firm; we are a trusted advisor and advocate for clients & candidates alike, relentlessly pursuing excellence in every search and placement.

Name: Talento iVagas
Description:
A Talento iVagas é uma consultoria especializada em Hunting Imobiliário. Atendemos imobiliárias, construtoras e incorporadoras de diversos portes em todo o Brasil, oferecendo soluções sob medida para atrair, desenvolver e reter talentos estratégicos — sempre com foco em resultado, agilidade e alinhamento cultural.

Somos mais do que headhunters. Atuamos como parceiros estratégicos de gestão de pessoas, ajudando líderes e decisores a estruturarem áreas, desenvolverem lideranças e implantarem práticas atuais e sustentáveis de gestão.

Nossos serviços incluem:

• Recrutamento e seleção estratégica (tático e executivo)
• Hunting de profissionais para vendas, locação e gestão geral
• Mentoria para diretores e gestores imobiliários
• Implantação de estruturas e políticas de RH
• Assessment, coaching executivo e gestão do desempenho
• Desenvolvimento de lideranças e programas de treinamento sob medida
• Suporte em governança corporativa e compliance em RH
• Interim management e apoio em processos de mudança organizacional

Nossa abordagem valoriza a diversidade e a inclusão como pilares para o crescimento sustentável das empresas. Atuamos com padrão técnico, escuta ativa, metodologias validadas e entregas ágeis, mantendo índice de retenção acima de 2 anos nas posições contratadas e níveis elevados de satisfação e recorrência entre nossos clientes.

Se sua empresa atua no mercado imobiliário e busca soluções eficientes em gestão de pessoas, conte com a Talento iVagas.

 Solicite uma proposta ou fale com a gente diretamente pela página.

Name: Larouche Raymond Headhunters

Whether you are an employer seeking to strengthen your team or a professional aiming to advance your career, we are dedicated to guiding you through every step of the recruitment process with integrity, transparency, and professionalism.

Name: Quest Consulting Services, LLC
Description:
Quest Consulting is proud to have placed 800+ executives and professionals into construction and real estate leadership roles across the US.
We have collaborated with world-class general contractors, construction managers, real estate developers, and specialty contractors. We function as an extension of a client company and assist them in securing construction professionals across the general building, real estate development, heavy civil, solar, industrial, mechanical and electrical sectors. 
Our proven process follows these 8 steps:
•	Learning: We analyze the full scale and scope of your business including project history, strategic direction, competition and employees. We use this information to effectively sell the benefits of working for you, and to help ensure we are targeting candidates who will best fit your company’s environment. 
•	Profiling: We work with you to develop a detailed job description. 
•	Researching: Quest develops a comprehensive strategy for locating and attracting candidates who will best fit your needs. 
•	Contacting: We then contact prospective candidates and sources within the specific companies identified in our research. 
•	Evaluating: Background and reference checks are conducted for the most impressive candidates. Quest objectively weighs the benefits of each candidate in relation to how he or she will complement your construction operation.
•	Interviewing: We present you with customized resumes, references and other background information on the top candidates, and you tell us which individuals you want to interview. 
•	Negotiating: Quest will also assist with compensation negotiations, as well as monitoring the resignation process and guiding the candidate through your official hiring procedures.
•	Retaining: For six months following the placement, Quest will occasionally contact both you and the selected candidate to assure everyone’s continued satisfaction.

Name: PATH2
Description:
PATH2 is a nationwide executive search and leadership advisory firm partnering with mission-driven, technology-powered healthcare companies from startup through scale-up. We help founders, operators, and investors build leadership teams aligned to the stage, complexity, and pace of their growth.

The talent that gets you started is rarely the talent that gets you to what’s next. That’s where we come in. PATH2 goes beyond traditional search by combining executive recruiting with leadership assessment, coaching, and advisory services to reduce hiring risk and accelerate performance.

We operate in the new world of work—rapid technological change, remote and hybrid teams, evolving workforce expectations, and constant market disruption. We don’t post jobs. We win talent through deep relationships, targeted outreach, and a transparent, bold search process.

With 50+ collective years on the front lines as both operators and executive search consultants, we partner with modern leaders with grit, resilience, strong EQ, business acumen, and the ability to build trust and influence in complex environments.

At PATH2, we don’t just fill roles. We help build leadership teams that scale.

How our Model Works? 
-We do not post our jobs - We have deep and lasting relationships. 
-We are experts at targeted outreach and building new relationships.
-We are transparent with our pipeline and process: we are direct and bold in our communication, we are creative and relentless in this difficult war for top talent and we can be flexible to adapt to the need of our clients ever changing business climate. 
-We believe in pricing simplicity. We have two simple pricing models.

Name: Orion Consulting ME
Description: Orion Consulting is a boutique executive search firm based in UAE that offers a variety of sector coverage for both local and international clients. We bring forth over 15 years of solid business experience in executive search, selection and placement in the Middle East and provide a purely tailor-made service at global standards that is shaped around our clients’ needs and requirements.

Name: Wecruit
Description:
Wecruit is a trusted and established recruitment firm headquartered in Singapore, recognised for delivering high-quality executive search and staffing solutions across permanent, contract, and temporary roles.

Our team of dedicated consultants brings deep industry knowledge and a personalised approach to every search, enabling us to serve a diverse range of sectors, including Healthcare, Information Technology, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime.

At Wecruit, we understand that no two organisations are the same. That’s why we take the time to understand your company’s unique culture, goals, and hiring needs. By leveraging targeted headhunting strategies and a vast network of qualified professionals, we help our clients attract and secure the right talent to drive business success.

With a proven track record of over 1,000 successful placements and a reputation built on reliability, responsiveness, and results, Wecruit is committed to being your long-term recruitment partner.

Whether you're scaling your team or seeking niche talent, connect with us today to discover how our tailored solutions can support your hiring objectives.

Name: MontaRosa
Description:
MontaRosa is a global human capital service for business leaders.  We operate at the ‘nexus’ of leadership, investing and strategic management consulting.

We work in long-term partnership with private ventures and investors to build business capability, raise capital, prepare for market launch, reach stretch growth targets and position for strategic exit.

Our talent curation and growth advisory are powered by distinct capabilities: We transform business leadership by providing coaching and development programmes tailored to the needs of individuals and teams at C-suite and board level.

We leverage our worldwide network of relationships to offer premium search services, profiling, sourcing, hiring and nurturing top executive talent. 

Our customised search solutions are sought and recognised in the market as the go-to choice for hard to fill roles, scarce talent and specialist technical operators.  We work relentlessly for clients at the highest levels in FinTech, banking, insurance, PE PortCo and entrepreneurial business leadership.

Name: Marquee Search
Description: Marquee Search, founded by sports and entertainment executive search veteran Jeff Yocom, was acquired by global search and talent consultancy SRI Executive in the summer of '21. Jeff and team remain focused on delivering top executives to clients in the sports and live event industries, while now being part of a global team of partners serving the entertainment, lifestyle and culture business.

Name: Panache Talent Inc.
Description:
Panache Talent is a consulting firm providing executive recruitment, coaching and talent services for SMB, global and not-for-profit employers. Our services aim to attract and develop Quebec-based leaders through various industries. 

Our mission is to foster sustainable relations in every interaction, with our clients as individuals, with our client organizations, with the Talent, and with our partners and suppliers. We thrive on the dependability of our network and recognize the value of cooperation and generosity.

We are dedicated to representing our clients' brands and culture dutifully and promoting our candidates' true ambitions, skills and values, ultimately ensuring we effectively align talent to purpose. 

Is Panache a quality your business seeks? Are you looking for confident, brave, inspiring, innovative, caring, trustworthy leaders to drive your corporate culture forward and business performance upwards? If so, give us a call.

Name: Recruiting Excellence
Description:
Helping You Achieve Success

Executive Search Professionals that empowering your business with senior talents that are guaranteed with superiority and intelligence 

About Us: 

15 years of shaping careers and lives

We are one of the honoured and existed executive search consultancies, with a global mindset of more than just a recruitment professional. Over the past 15 years, we have built a greater capabilities that focus on quality and agility. Our goal is to be the successful partner to our clients to help them shape their success and glories. Our services blend entrepreneurship with solid business experience, and are able to recognize the opportunities and challenges you face. Our partnership is unique, created over many years by bringing together top talents carried with the required capabilities. Our strength lies in our collective expertise and track record, rooted in local responsibility and spanning a global network of talents.

Our Science:

Transforming lives through pushing recruiting boundaries

It has been proven over the years that the human elements are the major success factor in all businesses success and growth. However, finding the right talents who could drive your business succession is difficult within today's competitions among companies.  

Attracting the best qualified talents requires specialties and eagle vision to bring the right talents who are carrying intelligence, knowledge, visions, superiority, power, and business acumen to build your business success. We are successfully carrying all the skills, capabilities, and connections to bring this science into our clients hand and make the journey with us worthful.

Name: HillierRose Executive Search & Strategy
Description:
HillierRose provides specialist, executive hiring and workforce solutions to a diverse range of organisations looking to embed or transform senior leadership capability. Our holistic approach blends an extensive knowledge of people development with a creative ability to access and engage the right talent. We believe that to thrive in the coming years, organisations will need to invest in talent management strategies that engage candidates from their first interaction with the organisation right through to supporting ongoing personal and professional development. Leaders themselves are increasingly making decisions on where they work based on the developmental opportunities and cultures available to them. At HillierRose, we help you find, engage, onboard, and retain the leaders that you need.

HillierRose is led by Emma and Michelle who have blended their extensive experience of business ownership and senior level hiring with leadership development and workforce planning. Our entrepreneurial backgrounds and combined expertise mean we see people and leadership through a rather different lens.

Name: Journey Search Partners
Description:
Our vision is to connect the world to better talent faster. 

We guide companies on their journey to find the right people, building executive and direct hire searches from the ground up. 

Using our PATH Search Process, we work with urgency and target with surgical precision to connect you with leaders before they hit the open market. We don’t settle until you hire someone you’re truly excited about.

Name: Executive Advisory Inc.
Description:
Executive Advisory is a well-known research and recruiting firm that has been helping executives seek board seats for two decades. We can help qualified candidates reach one of the 20,000 board seat vacancies that open every year. 

We practice a unique method of executive search, often referred to as "Reverse Headhunting.” It is our belief that the greatest challenge in the search process is obtaining direct access to decision makers. Based on our clients’ qualifications and governance skills, we penetrate target companies to identify the appropriate individual and the best way to reach them directly. This targeted research allows the clients to achieve their goals quickly and efficiently. We will also provide you with powerful tools and personal coaching to guarantee that you meet your transitional objective.

Executive Advisory brings a premium level of talent and senior-level experience to every engagement. We pride ourselves on having a strong work ethic and uncompromising integrity, as well as a commitment to quality service. Our staff members have diverse backgrounds in business, industry and academia, as well as substantial experience in executive search and research. Every client is assigned to a team, rather than to an individual researcher, to capitalize on intellectual contribution and to guarantee quick turnaround time.

Name: Bonn Search Partners
Description:
Bonn Partners enables growing companies to hire at scale without agency fees or recruiting tech complexity.

Through The Bonn Way, our subscription model replaces tools and one-off recruiters with an embedded hiring team delivering vetted sales and GTM talent throughout the year.

For critical leadership roles, we provide executive search focused on placing leaders with repeat-scale experience.

Built for growth. Designed to scale.

Name: Specialized Recruiting Group - Stillwater, MN
Description:
If you’re reading this, you’re looking for a new approach to the hiring process. You recognize that average doesn’t build empires, and you know it’s time to go beyond hiring. It’s time to level up.

Our APEX Search Model fuses insider access, surgical precision, decades of experience, and our refusal to settle for anything less than industry-defining talent.

We start every search from scratch by diving deep into your company’s culture, challenges, and ambitions. We connect with professionals before they even enter the market, delivering game-changing leaders who aren’t just qualified on paper but are built to thrive in your ecosystem. 

Who you hire will always be your choice. We put our reputation on the line, standing behind every candidate with a guarantee.

Name: Delve Search & Recruiting
Description: Founded in 2017 by a team of veteran executive recruiters, Delve Recruiting is an executive search firm focused on placing top talent in Leadership, Sales, Client Services, Operations, Marketing, and Legal positions with leading companies.

Name: ENLACE Headhunting Digital
Description:
Enlace Headhunting Digital (Lulli & Asociados S.A.C.), con 13 años de trayectoria como expertos en el servicio de Headhunting DIGITAL, con un equipo de headhunters especializados por nivel del puesto y sector económico, somos la única empresa que a través de nuestra plataforma digital FLOW, una herramienta de gestión y administración de procesos de selección altamente eficaz, que ofrece visibilidad ONLINE para clientes con clave secreta de acceso. puede garantizar efectividad en las siguientes 5 etapas del proceso de selección de talentos: 

1) Relevar Perfiles de Puestos de manera "profesional" con detección de habilidades blandas requeridas

2) Publicar las ofertas laborales con o sin marca empleadora (reservada) en las redes (Multiposting) y Bolsas / Portales de Empleo, con gran cobertura y convocatoria de candidatos, al tener contratos con todas

3) Atraer talentos por invitación realizando headhunting en el sector específico u orgánicamente - Inbound Recruitment (estrategías de marca empleadora y de segmentación en las Redes "Sniper"),

4) Long List: Evaluar requisitos, competencias técnicas, sistuación financiera, habilidades blandas con la metodología KUDERT, que psicométricamente evalúa ONLINE las 3 dimensiones psicológicas (Conducta-DISC + Cognición + Emoción) y entrevistas por competencias por un especialista headhunter

5) Short List: Seleccionar a los mejores talentos, con el sustento de diversos reportes ONLINE e informes, registro de la calificación de entrevistas, sueldos promedio, con ranking y puntajes - KPI´s.

ÁREAS DE ESPECIALIZACIÓN: Gerencia General, Administración y Finanzas, Comercial - Marketing y Ventas, Logística y Comercio Exterior, Seguridad Física y Electrónica, TI - E-Commerce e E-Business, Cloud Computing, Recursos Humanos, Industrias - Producción y Legal. 

SECTORES DE ESPECIALIZACIÓN: Minero, Salud y Belleza, Educación, Banca y Finanzas, Energía y Petróleo, Tecnología - TI, Industria, Comercial y Servicios.

Name: Alder Brooks
Description:
Alder Brooks is the only search firm exclusively focused on recruiting Commercial leadership for Investors and CxOs in Life Sciences and Healthcare—where AI is transforming Tools, Diagnostics, Devices, and Services.

We help organizations recruit leaders who scale teams, drive revenue, and create a lasting competitive edge.

Founded by a former Chief Commercial Officer with deep executive search experience, we follow a proven process backed by a 12-month placement guarantee.

Our range of diverse candidates hit the ground running, shape and execute strategy, and have an immediate impact on growth.

Clients choose Alder Brooks for our focus, speed, and insight—connecting them with leaders others overlook.

Save Time. Grow.

Name: Stanton Chase Istanbul
Description:
Stanton Chase is one of the top 10 Executive Search firms in the world, with over 72 offices in 45 countries.

Stanton Chase Istanbul was established in 2006. The Istanbul office provides Executive Search,Board Services, and Leadership Assessment services for both local and international clients in Turkey, Central Asia, the Caucasus region, and North Africa. Collectively, we have more than 50 years of experience in Executive Search, with a solid understanding of the industries we serve, and the local markets involved. 

We are more than just headhunters; we pride ourselves on the close involvement of our senior consultants in each search mandate. 

Our Istanbul office aims for client service excellence by conducting all assignments to the distinguished global standards of Stanton Chase.

Follow us to learn more: 
https://www.linkedin.com/company/stanton-chase-istanbul/
https://instagram.com/stantonchaseistanbul

Name: Profectus
Description:
Profectus is a leading executive search and business consulting firm dedicated to building high performing, accounting and operations teams through human capital. Our firm is a dynamic organization operating in a competitive and challenging business environment. We deliver effective, tailored solutions for our clients' needs; human capital resources that are well presented and add value beyond what was envisioned or thought possible. 

Our firm is built on a simple concept in making our clients’ businesses better. We do this by truly understanding their needs, asking the proper questions about the outcome they hope to achieve and harnessing our skills, knowledge and industry experience. We bring more than 30 years of dedicated experience in helping privately held to Fortune 500 companies throughout the country.

Name: Elzear Agri Business
Description: Elzéar Agribusiness is a recruitment agency specialized in the agribusiness sector. Our vocation is to assist a limited number of clients in their recruitment for all types of functions and geographical areas.

Name: The Grant Partners
Description:
Changing companies. Changing lives.

Your talent is your most important asset.

At The Grant Partners, our pledge is to empower your company to increase the value of those assets. We are one of the premier executive retained search and talent strategy consultancies, committed to helping you win the war for talent through strategic search, unrivaled service and a process that focuses on you — your timeline, your organization and your culture.

Let’s pursue better together.

Name: CL Search Group
Description:
CL Search Group works with companies, CPA firms and organizations to hire the best accounting and finance professionals.  We work closely with clients and candidates to determine the exact qualifications and skills that are required for a successful hire.  Our recruiting expertise separates us from other professional search firms. 

Please follow us and join our professional network at LinkedIn.

Name: Ace Talent

Name: Sigra Recruitment Partners
Description:
Sigra Recruitment Partners  is a woman-owned search firm that specializes in matching the right talent to the right organizations across the United States.

At WeplaceUS we strive to make our clients happy by helping them achieve their organization goals because we believe that, Our success is driven by Our Client's success. When they grow, we grow with them!

Name: Human Solutions - Conseil en recrutement
Description:
Cabinet de conseil en recrutement spécialisé dans la recherche et l'évaluation de managers expérimentés, de cadres supérieurs et de cadres dirigeants sur tout le territoire national.

Notre offre : rechercher, identifier et sélectionner des candidats performants.

Notre ambition : réaliser des prestations de conseil en recrutement qui conjuguent performance et humanisme. Notre approche garantit le respect de la déontologie du recrutement la plus exigeante.

Notre motivation : une relation de confiance avec nos clients et nos candidats, leur apportant la meilleure satisfaction et fondant les bases d'un partenariat durable.

Name: JUNTO Executive Search
Description:
A JUNTO Executive Search é um escritório especializado em Executive Search, com atuação focada em posições de diretoria, C-level, sucessão de liderança e transições executivas sensíveis.

Desde 2005, apoiamos organizações em decisões críticas de liderança, conduzindo cada mandato com critério, confidencialidade e responsabilidade pelo resultado.

Name: MeilleursChasseurs
Description:
MeilleursChasseurs est une plateforme qui aide les Dirigeants et les Directions des Ressources Humaines, à recruter les meilleurs talents du marché, pour toutes les populations de cadres et cadres dirigeants.

Le modèle est simple et efficace: pour toute recherche qui nous est confiée, nous mettons en concurrence les 2 meilleurs chasseurs de tête du marché pour identifier et recruter le candidat idéal.

Nous intervenons dans 40 domaines d'activités (Industrie, Services, IT, Distribution, Retail, Grande Consommation, Agroalimentaire, etc ...) et recrutons plus de 200 type de profils (Commerce, Marketing, Finance, Ingénierie, Communication, Ressources Humaines, Comptabilité, etc ...).

MeilleursChasseurs disrupte le marché du recrutement avec des outils innovants et exclusifs: simulateur d'honoraires de chasse de tête, plateforme de mise en concurrence de chasseurs de tête et moyens de sourcing les plus importants du marché.

Nos engagements:
- Expertise: nos chasseurs de tête sont triés sur le volet, ils sont expérimentés dans un domaine d'activité en particulier et ont déjà recruté plusieurs centaines de candidats dans leur carrière.
- Efficacité: nous recrutons en moyenne en 42 jours.
- Réactivité: nos process sont agiles afin de répondre au mieux aux besoins de nos clients, pour cela nous lançons les missions en 24h et présentons la 1ère candidature en moins de 7 jours.
- Transparence: nous donnons de la visibilité en temps réel à nos clients sur les datas de la mission (retour via les annonces, les candidats chassés, les candidats reçus en entretiens, la bonne conformité des dossiers, etc ...).

Name: Radium Search
Description:
Radium Search is a dynamic firm of headhunters specializing in the financial services industry. Our mission is to connect top-tier financial advisors with leading US wealth management firms. With a keen eye for talent and a commitment to excellence, we collaborate closely with our clients to build robust talent attraction strategies and streamline their recruitment processes.

Our unique approach involves targeting high-performing advisors on behalf of our partner firms. We understand that exceptional talent drives success, and we take pride in identifying and securing the best candidates. At the same time, we are equally passionate about supporting financial advisors in achieving their career goals. Whether it’s finding the perfect fit or advancing to the next level, Radium Search is dedicated to making meaningful connections that benefit both advisors and firms.

Join us in shaping the future of wealth management by connecting with Radium Search today!

Name: Good Bridge
Description:
We are professionals with experience in different areas and sectors, maintaining the spirit of that young person who has just entered college: a feeling of Day One and a world ahead to develop. 

Our goal is to help you and your team recruit, in an agile and quality way, the best talents for your company, from operational positions to C-level and board members.

Name: Goldrick
Description:
We realise purpose through human potential.

Goldrick is a boutique executive search and advisory practice that serves local, regional and global brand leaders in the energy, mining and minerals, chemical, infrastructure, and technology sectors.

Name: Allcroft Associates
Description:
Allcroft Associates – The Bridge to Leadership Excellence.

At Allcroft Associates, we excel in connecting top-tier talent with prestigious organisations across the UK. With a deep understanding of the business landscape, we are dedicated to identifying, engaging, and securing exceptional leaders who drive success and innovation.

Why Choose Allcroft Associates?

Unrivalled Expertise: We possess a nuanced understanding of the executive search process. We are experts in sourcing high-calibre candidates for key leadership roles.

Tailored Solutions: Every organisation is unique, and so is our approach. We take the time to understand your specific needs, culture, and strategic goals, ensuring we deliver candidates who are not only qualified but also the perfect fit for your team.

Discreet & Confidential: Trust and confidentiality are the cornerstones of our business. We conduct our search processes with the utmost discretion, safeguarding the integrity of both our clients and candidates.

Proven Track Record: Our success speaks for itself. We have a strong track record of placing executives into large and complex organisations across the region. Our clients return to us time and again, confident in our ability to deliver results.

Our Services

Executive Search: 
We specialise in identifying and placing executive and senior management roles. Our comprehensive search process ensures we find the right leaders who can make a tangible impact on your organisation.

Leadership Consulting: 
Beyond recruitment, we offer strategic insights into leadership development, succession planning, and organisational design, helping you build a strong and resilient leadership team for the future.

Market Intelligence: 
Our deep industry knowledge and extensive networks provide you with valuable market insights, helping you stay make informed decisions about your talent strategy.

Name: Taplow Group Bulgaria
Description:
The Taplow Group in Bulgaria is a member firm of the International Executive Search Firm, The Taplow Group S. A. headquartered in Luxembourg. 

With 39 offices in 21 countries covering 90% of the global economy, 150+ consultants bring local expertise and international resources to projects across numerous industry sectors.

Our clients benefit from a clear and concise methodology that brings added value to Human Capital solutions for their businesses locally and internationally.

Name: Kestria Zambia
Description:
We are a proud representative of Kestria, the world's largest alliance of boutique executive search firms in 'country'. Kestria's reach currently spans 40+ countries and 90+ cities and counting. What sets us apart is our shared entrepreneurial spirit and drive to deliver excellence in executive search.
Wherever the location, whatever the industry, we provide you with consistent first- class service. With globe-spanning connections and local knowledge you have a single point of contact for your international and local search requirements. We've successfully completed 40,000+ searches for over 4,000 clients, serving everyone from game-changing start-ups to major global players. 50+ nationalities, 40+ languages spoken and 52% female-led businesses. This diversity enriches our awareness of cultural differences – and means we have every imaginable base covered with regards to industry, region and size of company.
Find out more on www.kestria.com.

Name: FPC Peachtree
Description: FPC is a nationally recognized executive search firm with over 65 franchised offices, connecting top talent with premier opportunities across various industries and disciplines. Since 1959, FPC has been dedicated to delivering strategic, win-win recruiting solutions, ensuring the right fit between professionals and organizations. With a strong nationwide network of executive recruiters, FPC provides job seekers with unparalleled access to career opportunities. Forbes has consistently ranked FPC among the top 10 on its esteemed annual list of America’s Best Executive Recruiting Firms.

Name: Eames Partnership
Description:
Our comprehensive services extend beyond conventional executive search, encompassing invaluable market insights and rigorous leadership assessments.  

We provide our clients with a deeper understanding of the talent landscape. We are a firm focused on high-quality execution, rather than just selling it. 

Our Partner-led approach means you have constant access to the assignment partner who takes personal responsibility for execution. There is no loss of accountability, which you might see with better-known firms who assign junior associates to your key positions.

We enjoy unprecedented levels of repeat business and can afford to be thoughtful about our client base to ensure our clients always have unfettered access to talent versus the “who’s left” strategy employed by some of our better-known competitors who are constantly managing a long list of institutional off-limits.  

We leverage the global footprint of a larger group but maintain the benefits of a boutique firm, meaning our clients get region and niche-specific expertise coupled with international reach.

We are part of the Eames Group.

Name: VIP Executive Search
Description:
Are you looking for exceptional talent to fill your permanent roles? Look no further! At VIP Executive Search, we are dedicated to finding the best candidates for your company, becoming true partners in your success.

We collaborate closely with you to enhance your internal teams, streamline recruitment processes, and train your staff on the latest best practices. Our mission is to deliver outstanding results quickly and efficiently, focusing on high-quality candidates.

Whether you need to outsource recruitment for entry-level positions or senior executive roles, VIP Executive Search has you covered. Our team of seasoned recruiters has the expertise to find the perfect fit for your company, regardless of industry or job function.

Why choose VIP Executive Search? Because your success is our priority. We take the time to understand your company culture, business goals, and specific recruitment needs. With our Vision, Innovation, and Proficiency, we are committed to finding the best candidates for you. We are always available to answer your questions and provide ongoing support.

Name: NEO Search Partners Inc.
Description:
NEO offers a new approach to executive and retained search.

Listening to our clients for the past 10 years, we developed a project based hiring method that makes high quality retained search possible through all layers of leadership, not just the board room.

Our system is designed to solve the vacancies that other agents find too challenging, or too risky, to fill on a contingent basis. This could be a highly technical profile, a specialised commercial position, or finding the start-up members for a new market entry.

We take on these challenges because our decade long experience in the APAC and European markets enables us to find talent that does not actively signal their availability.

Name: TeamndTalent
Description:
Buscamos, seleccionamos e incorporamos directivos especialmente capacitados para dirigir equipos en tu organización

Aplicamos modernas técnicas de análisis técnico, de personalidad y comportamientos para generar un grupo de tres a cinco candidatos finalistas. Sin dejar de asesorarte, te animamos a quedarte con el candidato que más te convence, teniendo en cuenta que habitualmente todos los ofrecidos son aptos para la función en tu organización.

Te ofrecemos garantía de al menos un año de permanencia, durante el cual desplegamos un programa de incorporación, con un acompañamiento tanto al candidato como a la organización, que incluye un paquete de coaching y formativo a medida. De esta manera maximizamos las probabilidades de éxito.

Name: 33ELEVEN
Description:
We find next-level leaders for high-growth markets, partnering with you to find executives who grow your business, create culture, and drive revenue. 

Why Top-Tier Firms Choose Us

Renowned private equity, venture capital, and high-growth companies entrust us with their most critical missions—to find the next-gen leaders who can transform their portfolio companies from promising contenders into market dominators. 

We make milestones happen—from early stage to IPO. 

Leadership at Every Level

We are experts at identifying top talents for a range of executive roles:
Board Members | Shaping Strategic Directions
C-Level Executives | Crafting and Executing Innovative Visions
VPs & Directors | Driving Operational Excellence

We are committed to the process and fully invested in your success. We don’t stop until we find the right leader for your company. To us, success means placing leaders in your organization who exceed your expectations and continue to accelerate your growth way after their start date—executives who ensure your business doesn't just grow but defies expectations.

Name: KYC Executive Search

Name: Green Future Search Limited
Description:
Executive Search for a Sustainable Future:

Green Future Search is a boutique executive search partner dedicated to supporting organisations at the forefront of sustainability; driving decarbonisation, circular solutions, and innovation across the chemicals, alternative energy, and renewables sectors.

As companies undergo transformative shifts to meet sustainability goals, the demand for exceptional leadership has never been greater, particularly at the top. I work closely with clients to help embed future-ready expertise and leadership, align organisational culture, and foster strong stakeholder relationships.

In the niche and emerging markets I serve, the right talent often isn’t local. That’s why I take a global approach, leveraging my international network to support businesses across Europe and North America in uncovering and attracting world-class leaders and niche technical experts, wherever they may be. Every search is consultative, personally led, and tailored to your unique strategic needs.

Tailored Talent Solutions:
• Executive Search: Identifying and securing technical experts, leadership, C-suite, and non-executive board appointments
• Market Insights & Intelligence: Strategic data to inform hiring and growth decisions
• Salary Benchmarking: Accurate compensation analysis to stay competitive
• Leadership Assessments: Evaluating potential, capability, and cultural alignment
• Research Projects: In-depth talent mapping and market research
• RPO Support: Scalable recruitment project delivery for growing teams
• Succession Planning: Proactive talent strategies to future-proof leadership

If you're building a leadership team to accelerate the pathway to net-zero and sustainable innovation, let's start the conversation.

To learn more about my services or arrange a confidential chat to discuss how I can support your business needs, please get in touch and visit: https://greenfuturesearch.com

Name: Myers McRae Executive Search and Consulting
Description: Myers McRae Executive Search and Consulting has been providing the highest caliber of service to higher education and not-for-profit organizations for more than 40 years. This national firm employs a thoughtful, thorough approach to assisting clients in identifying, recruiting, and selecting the leaders they need to thrive. Name: JG Search Group
Description:
JG Search Group (JGSG) is a boutique executive-search and Talent-Ops firm that helps innovation-driven companies hire critical leaders up to 3× faster. Headquartered in Kansas City and operating across United States, we blend 20 years of human recruiting craft with autonomous AI agents, predictive analytics, and skills-based hiring frameworks.

What Sets Us Apart:

Autonomous TalentOps – OpenAI-powered sourcing, vector-search enrichment, and programmatic outreach surface 5× more qualified candidates in ≤ 48 hours.

Fastlane Search – Vetted finalist slates for engineering, product, finance, and GTM leadership in < 5 days; 90% first-year retention.

Transparent 17% Fee Cap – 50% invoiced at shortlist, 50% at offer accept—fully aligned incentives.

Impact by the Numbers:

46% reduction in average time-to-hire.
94% retention at 18 months.
$60k+ average savings per search versus traditional 25% fee models.

Ideal Partners:

Series A–C scale-ups racing to hit ARR milestones.
Fortune 1000 divisions launching digital transformations.
Healthcare & FinTech disruptors navigating regulatory change.

JGSG designs solutions that flex with your roadmap.

Mission
Connect brilliant humans with bold missions—faster, smarter, and more equitably than ever before.

Let’s eliminate your hiring bottleneck: book a discovery call or email jeremy@jgsearchgroup.com.

Name: Marble Hill Partners - a Henley Insights Group company
Description:
Since 2008, Marble Hill Partners has been succesfully delivering Executive Search services and Interim Management solutions to PE-backed portfolio businesses owned and their Private Equity investors in the UK, finding the very best boardroom leaders that create sustainable businesses that can generate healthy returns. 

We understand the nuances of private equity investment and are well known for truly partnering with our clients to ensure they secure the very best talent in the market.

We work exclusively with PE-backed clients who want to drive value and change throughout the entire private equity investment life-cycle, from pre-deal, to post-investment and exit preparation, by building the most capable Executive teams, often complemented by Interim Managers.

Our work spans all sectors and multiple functions, including CEO, CFO, COO, CIO, Sales, Marketing, HR, and Commercial.

We have;
- strong relationships with lower and mid-market private equity funds
- an exceptional network of portfolio company Chairmen and CEOs
- an Elite Interim Network of experienced multi-disciplinary interim executives
- tracked all UK PE deals since 2008, so we know where the talent is
- a proven track record of placing outstanding individuals that add real value

Name: ECI Group
Description:
ECI is a global network comprising independent companies, each with its own solid reputation in its domestic executive search market. Our organisational model enables our partner firms to focus on what they do best: satisfy and exceed the expectations of their clients. ECI has no standard models or pre-packaged solutions.

Every solution is precisely honed through the skills, market intelligence and insights of expert consultants in each sector and geography - experts who think outside the box with a global and multi-disciplinary perspective.

Supported by our International Office, which coordinates and deploys partnership-wide expertise, our local teams work closely with our clients’ leadership structures to create unique and distinctive research strategies, tailored to fit the exact circumstances and nuances of every individual requirement.

This is our boutique approach, and has been our signature for over 50 years.

Name: Index Search
Description:
Index Search is an executive and professional search firm exclusively focused on manufacturing and supply chain. We support professional and executive roles across industrial verticals, partnering with mid-market organizations as well as larger enterprises on complex, high-impact operational, supply chain, and business-critical needs.

Our work is grounded in how manufacturing and supply chain organizations actually operate. Searches are led by experienced professionals and executed through a proactive, high-touch model, with recruiters aligned to specific functions and role types to ensure deep contextual understanding and more accurate assessment.

Index is led by a former manufacturing executive with more than 25 years of operating experience. That perspective shapes how roles are defined, how candidates are evaluated, and how searches are executed. The result is faster, more confident hiring decisions and professionals who perform in real manufacturing and supply chain environments.

We partner closely with clients through flexible engagement models, ongoing communication, and shared market insight throughout the search process.

Name: Credit Search Partners
Description:
The only executive search firm focused solely on credit — placing elite talent across the liquidity spectrum, from investment professionals to law firm partners.

Our deep specialization allows us to navigate the full spectrum of credit strategies, from direct lending and CLOs to the most complex and esoteric structures. We believe that true expertise is built through specialization and daily engagement with the market. By operating exclusively within credit, we understand not only the roles but also the strategies, capital flows, and structural nuances that shape the industry.

Name: Ants Executive Search
Description:
All of our Executive Recruitment Consultants have tech and executive search experience. Why? In today's digital world, having an IT-department is in many ways mandatory. We are familiar with the challenges of being the bridge between business and tech, while also having a vision for the future that lays ahead. Many of our partners are currently scaling up or going through a digital transformation, what our Executive Recruiting Consultants then offers is guidance and advice on how you best can structure and optimize your IT department and workflow. We can therefore see that the key success factor is having a flexible and agile mindset where you always put the business first.

At Ants, we know that executive recruitments are one of the most important decisions a company can make. It can be the difference between gaining business and losing business. Therefore, it's crucial to have a substantial and effective recruitment process where you can see both the competence of candidates, but also the potential. At Ants Executive Search we help you with end-to-end recruitment of your new talents. We do everything from sourcing, writing job ads, having first screenings, creating cases, coordinating the process and selecting the best candidates for your company. We are here to tailor the perfect recruitment process in partnership with you. If you need help with e.t.c. EVP videos or having a course in interview technique, we got that too!

Want to know more?
rekrytering@ants.se

We have the best part of two decades working within the sector. During which we have cultivated a genuine interest and belief in our clients and the wider global impact of the industry; sustainability and food security.

The key to our ongoing success is partnership. We have hard-earned, time-served understanding and expertise within the agriculture and biotech industries. This enables us to offer a consultative and full-bodied service to businesses of any size, as well as unique search products to assist challengers in scaling up as a subscription-based catalyst for their growth. 

We are globally renowned for having aided some of the most significant agricultural input organisations on the planet. The continued success of companies within the most important sector on our planet is our objective; proudly onboarding the people that are shaping the future of our food chain for generations to come with the very best businesses the sector has to offer.

Recolocação, orientação e consultoria para um novo emprego.

Significa ter as rédeas da sua vida profissional, depender pouco, ou até não depender, de um emprego formal.

Name: Bureau Executive
Description:
At Bureau Executive, we believe the future of talent is not defined by algorithms alone.

In an age where AI brings speed, scale, and powerful analytics, we embrace technology as a force that elevates our work rather than replaces it. AI sharpens insight and accelerates understanding; human sensing and judgement give it meaning. Together, they bring colour to the data — revealing ambition behind a résumé, chemistry within leadership teams, and culture beneath strategy.

As a women-led, independent boutique, we work with focus, care, and conviction. Every engagement is deeply personal and thoughtfully curated. We listen before we advise, designing each search with intention — recognising that leadership decisions shape not only organisations, but people and communities.

As HR and business leaders navigate unprecedented change, our role is to be a trusted thinking partner — balancing intelligence with empathy, progress with purpose.

Because the most meaningful leadership decisions are, and will always remain, profoundly human.

In a sector facing unprecedented shifts, having the right leaders in the right place at the right time has never been more critical. We’re in the early stages of bringing this vision to life, and with technology supporting our approach, our focus is on the people who lead supply chains, the entrepreneurs who innovate with technology, and the experts with decades of knowledge and experience who understand the pitfalls and enablers that keep global supply chains running smoothly. The services we provide today are just the beginning of our journey. While they might give the impression that we operate as a traditional business, we are anything but conventional. As we successfully deliver these offerings, we are expanding our market reach, stabilising our cash flow and building a firm financial foundation enabling us to invest in our future solutions and achieve our long-term goals. Establishing a solid framework for the business allows us to advance into the next phase of growth, where we will launch our optimal solution, aimed at enhancing our value to clients and transforming the sector. But we won’t stop there; we are committed to an ongoing process of refinement and adaptation to stay ahead of the curve.

At Cyrio, we’re evolving executive search for the Private Equity world by combining deep industry expertise with a modern, de-risked hiring model aligned to your investment strategy. Our solutions-driven approach ensures you secure high-impact talent without the significant risk attached to a traditional search firm, enabling confident hiring that fuels long-term value creation.

 If building transformative GTM or leadership teams are central to your growth objectives, we’d welcome the opportunity to connect.

 +44 0330 043 0886
 info@cyriosearch.com

Name: 180one

180one helps businesses make hiring great leaders a habit. 180one is an executive-level recruiting firm based in Portland, Oregon and partners with our clients in recruiting senior-level management (Director, VP and C-Level), using a targeted sourcing approach to support our clients’ needs. 

We have substantial experience recruiting across a variety of industries, including Manufacturing, Distribution, Food & Beverage, Technology, Higher Education, Nonprofit and Professional Services, and for critical positions in Sales/Marketing, Supply Chain, Finance, Human Resources, Executive Leadership (CEO, COO, GM, etc.) and more. Our business is about providing a better recruiting solution, not a different one. Learn more about our recruiting process and the clients we work with at www.180one.com.

Name: Lacuna Search
Description:
Lacuna (n). a blank space. 
A concept designed to be filled with purpose.

 Industries.

 Roles. 
We target C-level, VP, Director, and Manager with a typical compensation range of $100-$300K+ . We are open to searches below that threshold for sales roles or bulk hiring needs. 

 Partnerships. 
We want to be the recruitment branch for multiple businesses. Lots of owners want to find great leaders, but simply don't have the time to invest in the actual process it takes to find them. The goal is that every first search done well is the start of a multi-year partnership.

Name: JijenZij BV
Description:
Jijenzij is jouw partner in Recruitment & Selection, Executive Search, Interim Management, Advisory en Talentpooling.

Onze oorsprong ligt in Finance, Control en Data. Vanuit die stevige basis hebben wij geleerd hoe belangrijk het is om processen scherp te organiseren en kwaliteit te waarborgen. Die expertise gebruiken wij nu breder en bemiddelen wij ook in andere sleutelposities. Waar de vraag ook ligt, ons doel blijft hetzelfde: organisaties verbinden met de juiste mensen én professionals begeleiden naar de plek waar zij het verschil maken.

Wat ons onderscheidt, is de manier waarop wij werken. Wij combineren een procesmatige aanpak met de inzet van nieuwe technologieën en data-gedreven inzichten. Daardoor kunnen we sneller en beter matches maken, zonder in te leveren op kwaliteit. Tegelijkertijd staat de mens altijd centraal. We kijken verder dan een cv of een functietitel. Het draait voor ons om drijfveren, talenten en de vraag of iemand écht past bij een organisatie en cultuur.

Wij geloven dat succes begint bij authenticiteit en duurzame relaties. Daarom richten wij onze processen en systemen zo in dat er voor onze consultants meer tijd overblijft voor wat er werkelijk toe doet: aandacht, verbinding en partnerschap.

Met ruim 25 jaar ervaring in Finance en Data combineren wij inhoudelijke kennis met een breed netwerk en een oplossingsgerichte blik. Dat stelt ons in staat om opdrachtgevers op alle niveaus te adviseren, of het nu gaat om het vinden van een nieuwe CFO, het inzetten van een interim professional die direct impact maakt of het opbouwen van een strategische talentpool voor de toekomst.

Bij JijenZij draait het om meer dan invullen van vacatures. Wij bouwen bruggen tussen mensen en organisaties en creëren oplossingen die vandaag resultaat opleveren én morgen toekomstbestendig zijn.

A founder says they’re stepping back—but nothing’s changed.
The next generation is ready—but no one’s said it out loud.

These aren’t problems to fix. They’re moments to think through—with structure, clarity, and care.

Name: Tipping Point Global Executive Search
Description:
Your Mid-Market & Private Equity Executive Search Firm Partner.


We are an executive search firm specializing in providing executive search services to high-growth private equity firms and mid-market, owner-led, private companies, across all disciplines, functions, and locations.

Who We Are
Tipping Point Global Executive Search is a Mid-Market and Private Equity Executive Search firm. We specialize in providing executive search services to high-growth private equity firms and mid-market, owner-led, private companies. Since 2008 we have offered incomparable executive search services and value to our clients, maintaining our reputation for reliability and excellence.

Over the past 15 years, Tipping Point Global Executive Search has been intrinsic in supporting and facilitating our clients’ growth and scaling plans. Our specialized Mid-Market and Private Equity Executive Search services have provided an essential and effective service to clients looking to accelerate growth, revenue, and market share. Our clients rely on us to source and recruit CEO, C-Suite, and Senior Executive level talent, across every industry, discipline, and function.

Who We Work With
Our Mid-Market and Private Equity executive search clients are typically from $20 million in revenue to Fortune 1000’s.

Our client base extends across Canada, the USA, the UK, and Europe. We source candidates globally.

Long-term relationships with our clients are the cornerstone of the Tipping Point Global Executive Search business philosophy. Since our inception we have built sustainable long-term partnerships, delivering executive search services that provide our clients with a competitive advantage in the recruitment, engagement, and retention of key leaders and critical business enablers. Tipping Point Global Executive Search clients engage us as an intentional investment strategy to ensure they have the right people at the right time to deliver their business.

Description:

Our deep industry expertise and relationship-first approach transform businesses in weeks, not months, by tailoring strategies to each client's unique needs.

Led by Managing Partner Jamie Hersh and Executive Partner Bryn Adams, we excel at uncovering hidden talent and aligning candidates' personal motivations with our clients' strategic goals. This ensures long-term success and high-impact placements that align with organizational vision and culture.

Our expertise, particularly in the accounting and finance sectors, positions Transcend as the go-to partner for hiring top talent. We serve small to mid-sized companies, especially those that are private equity-owned or privately held, with revenues between $50-750 million. Our industry reach includes technology, manufacturing, healthcare, professional services, e-commerce, and digital services.

Ready to propel your team to peak performance? Reach out to Transcend Search & Strategy, and let's excel together!

Name: Berkshire Executive Search Inc.
Description:
Welcome to Berkshire Executive Search.   

As a boutique retained Executive Search practice committed to acquiring the best possible C/V/D-level IT Management and Technical leaders for mid-market companies, I work full-time on just one search at a time

I serve the CEO, CIO or VP with a pressing need for a visionary, difference-making leader to enable their company to thrive in the Digital Age.   

In IT search, "Experience Matters" and I've been building IT teams for four decades.  Leveraging my relationships with the massive network of IT leaders I've built over those years, I can quickly and accurately identify, assess, and attract exceptionally talented individuals with the skills and mindset to add the most value to your organization.   

By working on every aspect of a search from start to finish personally I ensure consistency in the delivery of the opportunity message to prospective candidates and the application of the tangible and intangible selection criteria. 

From both clients and candidates, I repeatedly hear the phrase "You are the best recruiter I have ever worked with",  a compliment attributable to my experience, passion, and singular focus on scouring the market for the "best possible" as I work on just one search at a time. 

No matter which side you're on, candidate or client, I can help. 

Schedule a Zoom on my website to get clear on your goals and how I can help you achieve them.

Name: EGM Executive: Search | Interim | Board | TCP
Description:
We noticed a gap in the market for pure, specialist Executive Search. Search Firms do not recruit middle management, there's much more. It requires relentless specialisation, deep expertise in industries, functional roles and geographies.

We had to create something separate from EGM Recruitment that recruited senior management roles and we needed to ensure our Executive Search Recruiters had the best technology, experience and education to understand you fully.

EGM Executive is part of the EGM Partners Group that focusses on Executive Search, Interim Management, Board Search and The Catalyst Project. 

With the Catalyst Project as part of EGM Executive, we’re not only finding the best talent globally but also building and nurturing a cohort of exceptional individuals for Australian organisations.

Our Executive Search Recruiters have walked in your shoes. They have done the AICD directors course, they have degrees, they are board members and they have 20 years experience on average in Search.

Executive Search is more than simply posting a vacancy on a job board or listing it in a newspaper.

The art of "Search" comes from having strong networks, market mapping research and the craft of being able to identify and attract talent. EGM combines this with our love of data and our profiling tool Interpr8 to find the best match for your organisation, your people and role.

Our Executive Search & Interim Management team has been responsible for key senior appointments across Australia, London and Europe.

Our team are specialists and have years of experience: this means you will always talk to an expert who can grasp your needs quickly, bring new ideas and alternatives to the table and work with you to develop an accurate and compelling candidate brief.

Please reach out through the connect button to discover more.

Name: Narratology
Description:
All businesses have a story: ups, downs, twists, turns, anecdotes of the roles played in making the organisation what it is today. We work with an anthology of businesses all at different stages of their stories but all requiring leaders to play key roles in shaping, growing and developing the company's story and writing the next chapter in their success. 

Who's writing the next chapter of your company's success?

Narratology is an Executive Search firm based in Belfast, Northern Ireland. Stories are our passion. We know our clients' journeys. We place leaders in businesses where they make an impact, evolving the company narrative and taking it to the next level. Our expertise in managing complex and bespoke recruitment solutions spans across industry sectors including Professional Services, Banking, Insurance, Manufacturing, Agri, Engineering, Construction, Legal, Retail and Business Services. 

But our focus remains on commitment to delivery and a positive experience for all.

We place leaders who are writing their own stories, the next chapter in their careers. Leaders who look for real companies, places they can add value, solve problems, bring about growth, play their part. Old and new companies. Businesses with a technical product or Not for Profit associations. PLCs and SMEs. 

With an in-house research team, market analysis and creative, carefully managed processes, we ensure the right “fit” to build on our clients’ stories, strengthening their leadership and navigating them to greater heights. 

We have the capability to recruit for C-Suite, Director and Functional Senior Manager appointments in Ireland and beyond, but the local understanding to truly appreciate our clients and their cultures. 

Discreet, targeted search and widely marketed reach are just our methods. 

Your story is our business.

Licensed under Singapore’s Private Investigation framework, EXELLAR delivers discreet and high-stakes risk services including AML/KYC screening, whistle-blower case handling, and capital market due diligence. Since 2020, we've supported 1 in 2 successful SGX listings, and played a critical role in projects tied to BURSA and NASDAQ.

 NexusHire Solutions – NexusHire was established as a direct continuation of a leadership advisory operation originally launched in 2019 for a global executive search firm. When that firm exited the Asia market due to strategic global constraints, our team was entrusted to take over — preserving client trust, operational continuity, and leadership expertise built under the former brand.

Today, NexusHire offers flexible, data-driven talent solutions across Asia-Pacific. With over 50 years of combined experience, we specialize in executive search, leadership development, succession planning, and market mapping — particularly within biotech, pharmaceuticals, medical devices, healthcare, technology, and industrial sectors.

 Trusted across IPO, compliance, and senior hiring
 Licensed, discreet, and regionally embedded

Name: Electi Talent
Description:
Professional, executive and multi-hire recruitment search services for the industrial business to business and SaaS sector, in the Thames Valley and South East.

In today's resource marketplace, companies have to be creative when it comes to attracting executive talent. It's a particular challenge winning great candidates over since the pandemic, with the forced uptake of flexible and remote working.

Knowing where to find your ideal candidate, how to engage with them and knowing how to attract them is difficult. It's even tougher to retain them once you've recruited successfully. 

With the lowest unemployment rate on record, paired with the largest talent shortage there has ever been, it's very much a candidate's market.

1 million people didn’t return to workplace after the pandemic.

In today's marketplace, direct hiring processes alone aren't enough. You may be advertising yourself, or have tried a contingency recruiter.

After an initial successful engagement, it can be very frustrating and disappointing when your ideal hire gets counter-offered by their existing employer or receives a competitive offer from elsewhere.  

You may be going through ineffective hiring processes that aren’t getting you a result. You're at a loss in terms of knowing what to do.

Whatever your journey or experience in this process, now it's time to let us help you navigate this challenging recruitment landscape.

For a free no obligation conversation, get in touch below.

• Nous travaillons au plus près des entreprises pour comprendre leurs ambitions, leurs défis et leurs stratégies. 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗱𝗲́𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗹 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗽𝘁𝗲, 𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗯𝗲𝘀𝗼𝗶𝗻 𝗲𝘀𝘁 𝘂𝗻𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲.

𝗡𝗼𝘁𝗿𝗲 𝗲𝗻𝗴𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 :
• Recruter avec 𝗲𝘅𝗶𝗴𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲, 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝘂𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗲𝘁 𝗮𝘂𝗱𝗮𝗰𝗲, sans compromis sur la valeur humaine.

Chez Rivyr, 𝗻𝗼𝘂𝘀 𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗼𝗻𝘀 𝗹𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗿𝘂𝘁𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗲𝗻 𝗹𝗲𝘃𝗶𝗲𝗿 𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲́𝗴𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲, en plaçant les leaders au cœur de votre réussite.

Commitment to Quality: We thoroughly vet every candidate to ensure they align with our clients’ needs and culture.

Whether you’re a company seeking skilled professionals or a candidate ready for your next challenge, QS Recruiting has the expertise, network, and insight to help you thrive in an ever-evolving job market.

Name: HerStory by HRIC- Podcast
Description:
𝗪𝗵𝗼 𝗪𝗲 𝗔𝗿𝗲
We bring women leadership stories into the spotlight, sharing journeys from childhood dreams to defining moments, exploring the resilience, vision, and values that shape them.

Through authentic conversations, we explore the personal and professional journeys of women in leadership, because every story has the power to inspire, and every leader starts somewhere.

 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆
Leadership should reflect the world we live in, but it doesn’t. Across industries and regions, the path to the top remains uneven:

➝ Latin America – Only 4% of companies have a woman as CEO; just 8% hold board seats.
➝ United States – Women make up 10.4% of Fortune 500 CEOs—an all-time high, but still far from equity.
➝ Globally – Fewer than 7% of CEOs in the world’s largest corporations are women.

This isn’t a lack of talent, it’s a lack of visibility, opportunity, and systemic change.

 𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗩𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻
HerStory by HRIC isn’t just about highlighting women’s leadership, it’s about expanding the conversation on leadership itself. By amplifying diverse voices, we redefine what leadership looks like and open doors for the next generation.

We believe in the power of representation.
We believe every leadership journey deserves to be heard.
We believe in a future where leadership reflects true talent, opportunities are open to all, and barriers no longer define who gets to lead.

 𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 𝘂𝘀 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗴𝗲𝘁 𝗶𝗻 𝘁𝗼𝘂𝗰𝗵:

No Recrutamento e Seleção, destacamos-nos por identificar profissionais perfeitamente alinhados à visão e valores da sua empresa. Utilizando métodos inovadores e uma abordagem personalizada e humanizada, garantimos a formação de equipes que impulsionam a excelência e o crescimento sustentável.

Em nosso compromisso com o Desenvolvimento de Líderes, oferecemos programas adaptados às necessidades específicas da sua organização. Capacitamos seus líderes a alcançarem seu potencial máximo, promovendo habilidades de liderança eficazes e estratégias que impulsionam o desempenho da equipe.

No âmbito do Desenvolvimento da Cultura Empresarial, trabalhamos em estreita colaboração com sua equipe para criar um ambiente que inspire a inovação, a colaboração e o comprometimento. Com uma abordagem centrada nas pessoas, promovemos uma cultura corporativa sólida, refletindo os valores fundamentais que impulsionam o sucesso a longo prazo.

Na Ataire, acreditamos que o capital humano é o ativo mais valioso de qualquer organização. Estamos aqui para ajudar sua empresa a alcançar novos patamares, construindo equipes sólidas, líderes inspiradores e uma cultura empresarial vibrante. Juntos, moldamos o futuro do seu negócio.
