Name: NorthStar Search Partners
Description:
We are your recruiting and search partner. 

Keeping it simple, we introduce exceptional talent to incredible organizations. This strategy allows our clients to find the right people for their team, and our candidates to find the right position.

UNDERSTANDING EMPLOYER NEEDS

A successful search means more than just filling a seat. Finding a candidate with the right skills, experience, and attitude is critical for the long-term success of our clients.  If a search comes up short in any of these areas, the costs can be significant.

It's important to make the right decision.

Northstar Search Partners understands why it's important to get your hiring decision right. A strong hire will increase productivity, effectiveness and, of course, drive revenue. Our proven process for helping companies make smart hiring decisions - and truly caring about your outcome - is what makes us an attractive partner. 

CONNECTING CANDIDATES TO FULFILLING CAREERS

Making a career change can be both exciting and stressful. We specialize in making sure our candidates are fully prepared and feel comfortable when it's time to make a move forward.  

THE RIGHT BALANCE

A great hire is the result of multiple pieces coming together in perfect synchronization. By keeping things simple, Northstar Search Partners makes synchronization look easy. We expertly manage every aspect of your search, taking time to do things right. 

WE ARE NORTHSTAR SEARCH PARTNERS

We have been responsible for hundreds of placements in over 30 industry niches, with most hires outperforming industry standards. Our vast experience includes engagements with privately held, mid-size, and Fortune 500 clients. We have also successfully worked with Private Equity/Venture Capital to build out teams for portfolio companies. 

Helping you find the perfect candidate, the perfect position. Helping you find your True North. 

FIND THE PERFECT CANDIDATE.  FIND THE PERFECT POSITION.

We build our foundations on the strong relationships we form with our clients and are highly successful at being rewarded with repeat business and referrals.

There are numerous online resources today at your disposal and yes, they make it a bit easier to identify candidates, but the task of finding the right candidate remains critical for our clients and this typically comes with the burden of time constraints within their own lean environments.  Our team forensically screens beyond the keywords to identify high performers.  We are dedicated to understanding the drivers, goals, and objectives behind every placement.  We go to great lengths to improve your bottom line and deliver. Foundations Talent Group is known for their strategy behind your needs.

We are not in the business of just placements and filling openings; we genuinely want to be your partner in transforming your talent, workforce and people needs. Name: Entretien Garanti
Description:
Entretien Garanti est un service d’accompagnement à l’emploi nouvelle génération, conçu pour aider les candidats à obtenir plus rapidement des entretiens qualifiés, grâce à une approche orientée résultats.

Nous combinons :
-l’optimisation stratégique des candidatures (CV, lettres de motivation, profil LinkedIn),
-une prospection active et ciblée auprès des recruteurs et une garantie contractuelle de résultats pour les profils éligibles.

Contrairement au coaching emploi traditionnel, nous ne vendons pas du conseil abstrait ou du temps passé, mais un objectif clair : décrocher des entretiens.

Notre promesse
 3 à 5 entretiens qualifiés garantis, sous conditions d’éligibilité, ou remboursement partiel.

À qui s’adresse Entretien Garanti ?

-Jeunes diplômés et cadres juniors
-Profils en reconversion professionnelle
-Candidats actifs qui envoient des candidatures sans obtenir de réponses
-Personnes souhaitant structurer et accélérer leur recherche d’emploi

Notre approche
-Sélection et qualification des profils en amont
-Candidatures ciblées, cohérentes avec le marché réel
-Traçabilité complète des actions menées
-Accompagnement pragmatique, orienté efficacité

Notre ambition
Redonner aux candidats le contrôle et la visibilité sur leur recherche d’emploi, dans un marché de plus en plus sélectif, en apportant de la méthode, de la transparence et une vraie prise de responsabilité sur le résultat.

 Nos chiffres clés :

Name: Orbition Group
Description:
Orbition Group is a global, award-winning, executive and leadership search & advisory firm dedicated to the Data, Analytics & AI (DAAI) market.

We combine board, executive and leadership search, interim and fractional advisory, leadership development and assessment, research, talent & market intelligence, and workforce advisory, all underpinned by the industry’s leading DAAI leadership community and powered by our in-house media production firm, Driven by Data Productions. 

Every organisation is on the journey to evidence-based decision-making, enable by DAAI, driving the next wave of innovation, transformation and growth. Consequently, it’s the most significant area of growth and investment for modern organisations. 

To deliver these new data initiatives and reap their benefits, businesses are making significant investments across their DAAI teams/capabilities. 

However, delivering meaningful impact from these investments, at the speed and scale desired has proven problematic for most organisations.

Orbition Group enables organisations and their leaders to deliver improved business performance and generate competitive advantage, by unlocking greater value from those investments. 

We work with boards, executive teams, and CDAOs to close the gap between ambition and execution, by addressing the leadership, structure, and capability gaps that stall transformation, innovation and improved decision-making that limits ROI. 

While many traditional search firms remain slow, transactional and disconnected from the communities they serve, we operate at the epicentre of the DAAI ecosystem, shaping the industry. 

We are the only search and advisory firm in the DAAI space that amplifies credibility, trust, reach, influence, and access with an integrated, in-house media production firm. This serves as the engine behind our industry-leading podcast, global events and industry content, but also as a platform for organisations to build their own hiring brand.

Name: AJ Conseil Recrutement et RH
Description:
L'équipe du cabinet AJ Conseil Recrutement et RH vous souhaite la bienvenue sur cette page !

Depuis 1993, notre ambition est de valoriser les métiers de service en général et ceux de l’Hôtellerie, de la Restauration, du Luxe et du Tourisme en particulier.

Dans ces secteurs d’activité plus qu’ailleurs, le développement des entreprises repose sur une sélection précise des collaborateurs-clés. Mais, recruter les candidats les plus pertinents n’est pas chose aisée : pour des raisons de temps, d’expertise et de confidentialité.

Devenue une référence du Recrutement par approche directe et du Conseil stratégique en Ressources humaines dans l’univers du Luxe, de l’industrie hôtelière, de la gastronomie et des loisirs,  AJ Conseil Recrutement & RH vous accompagne, en France et à l'international, pour toutes les questions liées à l’optimisation du management de votre organisation avec 2 Agences : Paris-Nice.

Nous accordons une importance capitale à comprendre votre environnement, votre culture d’entreprise et vos attentes. Notre objectif vise en effet à créer de véritables partenariats avec les entreprises.

De la compréhension de votre besoin à l’intégration de nouveaux salariés, nos consultants vous offrent un service sur-mesure et une écoute de tous les instants.

Nous pratiquons la même méthode avec chacun de nos candidats, aujourd’hui au nombre de 78.000 cadres ou en devenir. Ils  bénéficient de conseils de carrière personnalisés en adéquation avec leurs parcours professionnels, leurs envies d’évoluer et leurs aspirations profondes.

AJ CONSEIL RECRUTEMENT & RH est present pour la 4ème. fois dans le palmarès des Echos qui recense les 250 meilleurs cabinets de recrutement en France


Site institutionnel : www.ajconseil.fr
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/ajconseilrecrutement/

Name: CARTESIO
Description:
Votre vie est singulière, notre vision du recrutement aussi !

Le cabinet de recrutement CARTESIO développe depuis plus de dix ans sa vision d’Human Matching : chaque candidat a une empreinte, une personnalité et un parcours différents.
Notre métier ? Détecter et faciliter la compatibilité entre un projet d’entreprise et un projet professionnel, souvent couplé à un projet de vie.

Pour CARTESIO, quelle que soit la performance des technologies d’aujourd’hui et de demain, l'appréciation humaine restera le moteur primordial d’un recrutement réussi.

CARTESIO est un cabinet de recrutement, d’évolution de carrière et de conseils RH situé à Rennes. Nous accompagnons les TPE, PME, grands Groupes nationaux et internationaux ainsi que des Start-up dans leurs projets de développement RH.

CARTESIO figure dans le prestigieux palmarès 2025 Les Echos - Statista, parmi les 300 meilleurs cabinets de recrutement en France. 

Pour la troisième année consécutive, CARTESIO a obtenu : 
 5 étoiles en Executive Search, et sommes le seul cabinet breton à recevoir la note maximale ! 
 5 étoiles en recrutement de manager & spécialistes.

Name: Cubical Operations LLP
Description:
Cubical Operations LLP is a dynamic, forward-thinking Executive Search and Recruitment Consulting firm that partners with organizations to identify, attract, and place top-tier talent across a wide spectrum of industries and functional domains. Our unwavering commitment to excellence, combined with a deep understanding of organizational needs and market trends, enables us to deliver tailor-made talent solutions that fuel business growth and enhance competitive advantage.

At Cubical Operations, we believe that recruitment is more than just filling vacancies it is about building future-ready organizations through people who make a difference. We align our search process with your strategic objectives, corporate culture, and long-term vision to ensure you hire not just the best talent available, but the right talent for your unique context.

With a team of seasoned recruitment professionals, industry specialists, and talent advisors, we have consistently demonstrated our ability to match top talent with high-impact roles. Our consultants bring decades of experience and a wealth of knowledge in various domains including Information Technology, Consulting, Cyber Security, Audit, Tax, Telecom, Startups, and more.

Our Mission 

To deliver innovative, customized, and quality-driven recruitment solutions that bridge the gap between top talent and top organizations, ensuring mutual success through strategic alignment, cultural fit, and career development.

Candidate-Centric Philosophy 

While we are committed to fulfilling our clients’ talent needs, we are equally invested in the career progression of our candidates. We act as career advisors, not just job matchers. From CV guidance to interview preparation and post-placement integration, we support professionals throughout their journey.

We recognize that a career move is a significant step in a person’s life, and we treat every interaction with empathy, respect, and confidentiality.

Name: Richardson Executive Search

Traditional recruitment is dead. We refuse to be mere headhunters. We are architects of organizational potential.

Leadership is not a transaction. It’s a strategic weapon. The right leader doesn’t just fill a role. They fundamentally change a company’s trajectory. Technology moves fast. Exceptional leadership moves faster.

Most organizations don’t struggle to find candidates. They struggle to hire the right leader at the right moment.

A single executive mis-hire can quietly cost 12–24 months of momentum through stalled growth, cultural friction, missed targets, and leadership fatigue. The resumes look strong. The interviews go well. And yet the business doesn’t move the way it should.

That’s because great companies are not built by job descriptions. They are engineered by visionary leaders who see around corners.

We partner with Founders, Executive teams, Boards and HR leaders across the United States and Canada, supporting $100M+ scaleups and global brands navigating growth, transformation, and complexity. Our searches span North America, with deep access to leadership talent experienced in operating across markets, functions, and growth stages.

Our proprietary A-WAY Assessment & Methodology surfaces what traditional executive search misses. Before presenting candidates, we align stakeholders and challenge assumptions to uncover leadership gaps, cultural and execution blind spots, and what success truly looks like 12, 24, 36 months out. This rigor allows us to move quickly while reducing mis-hire risk.

With nearly 20 years of digital, innovation, and executive search experience, we specialize in leadership roles across product, marketing, sales, emerging tech, e-commerce, operations, finance. 

We are not impressed by resumes. We are fascinated by potential. Our mission is to find leaders who turn strategy into velocity and become a lasting competitive advantage. 
At Ari Agency, we are your Growth Leadership Partners.

We provide a differentiated offering to our clients, not only taking the time to deeply understand your needs but also working faster and harder, utilising our extensive reach/network - a refreshing approach to search-to-search.

Name: Catenon Singapore
Description:
Catenon is a multinational executive search company with a technology-based approach operating under the web² model. 

Our vision, is to operate as a single office worldwide. 

We strive to identify, assess and find the right candidates for our clients from around the world. We do this by leveraging technology and our network of consultants that operate from offices located globally. Our differentiating factor would be the multimedia report used to present the final results to our clients. This report contains the methodology designed by Catenon that individually analyses and compares each candidate, providing our clients with a holistic view of each candidate and allowing them to make an informed decision.

Catenon was founded in order to take advantage of a new emerging market: the global search for professionals. This market arose from the need for the international mobility of talent and an expected trend in the next few years is continuous growth in this hunt for talent. Catenon aims to be at the forefront of this trend.

Name: Castle Peak Group
Description:
We are an executive and board search consultancy, partnering with like-minded organisations that share our belief in the importance and benefits of diversity and inclusion in the workplace.

We know that diversity, through the lens of ability, race, neurodiversity, ethnicity, sexual orientation, and beyond, strengthens organisations at every level.

Diversity brings:

•   Greater innovation and creativity
•   A broader range of skills and perspectives
•   Deeper empathy, internally and externally
•   A richer and more varied talent pool
•   Increased productivity
•   More engaged and fulfilled employees
•   Stronger business performance and sustainable growth

Yet there is still progress to be made. At Castle Peak, we are committed to being part of that change.

We embody the spirit of fairness, advocating for and shortlisting diverse executive and board talent based on skills and cultural fit. We believe every individual deserves equal opportunity for professional growth and career advancement. Our search process is rooted in fairness, ensuring all candidates are evaluated on their strengths and potential.

Your search deserves the same level of commitment and expertise you expect from your own leadership team. At Castle Peak, every search is executive-led, meaning the senior consultant who begins your journey will guide you through every stage with consistency, experience, and dedication.

Name: Smpro Staffing
Description:
With 10+ years of excellence, Smpro is a leading tech and product hiring partner for your talent needs. 

Smpro Executive Search is a recruitment partner specializing in Technology and Product Leadership Hiring for high-growth startups, scale-ups, and enterprise tech organizations.

With a focus on strategic roles across CTO, CPO, Head of Engineering, AI/ML Leaders, Data & Analytics Heads, and Principal Engineers, we help companies build future-ready leadership teams that accelerate innovation and business growth.

Whether you're an early-stage startup or a mature enterprise, our consultative and insights-driven search process ensures you find leaders who not only meet your technical requirements but align deeply with your organizational culture and vision.

What Sets Us Apart?
We go beyond resumes and job descriptions. At Smpro, we blend domain expertise with deep leadership evaluation to identify and place talent that fits not just the role, but the mission.

Our Leadership Search Framework includes:
- In-depth hiring strategy aligned with business goals
- Executive mapping and targeted outreach
- Multi-dimensional talent evaluation (Tech IQ + Leadership EQ + Cultural Fit)
- Detailed candidate reports and recommendations
- End-to-end support from negotiation to onboarding and post-placement integration

We’ve successfully partnered with top product and technology-driven companies to close senior and niche mandates. Our growing list of clients includes some of the most respected names in the ecosystem.

Ready to find leaders who build, scale, and inspire? Let’s connect.

Name: Hogarth Davies Lloyd
Description:
Hogarth Davies Lloyd is a leading Global Executive Search firm with offices in New York, London and Singapore. Founded in 1995 by former bankers, we partner with world class Hedge Funds, Investment Banks, Asset Managers and Private Equity firms, building deep relationships, many of which span decades. 

Our track record as a trusted adviser is undisputed; working across disciplines and markets we help our clients to shape their businesses globally, delivering strategic build-out projects, succession planning and C-Suite hires. We run a tried and tested process, searching beyond sectors, borders and job titles to provide a truly thorough and bespoke service.

Name: Yellow Bricks Talent Search
Description:
Yellow Bricks is a specialist executive search and people strategy firm supporting Financial Services and growth-stage organisations to build leadership teams that actually work.

We believe hiring doesn’t end at the offer, it’s where the real work begins.

The people you appoint into senior roles shape culture, performance and risk for years to come. Get it right and businesses accelerate. Get it wrong and the damage is often invisible until it’s too late.

That’s why we don’t just fill roles. We design leadership.

We partner with founders, CEOs, boards and Chief People Officers who understand that their next phase of growth depends on the quality of the people they put in charge. From Chief People Officers and Finance Directors to Operations, Risk and Transformation leaders, we help organisations attract and secure senior talent who can lead through complexity, scale and change.

We work quietly, intentionally and with judgement because the most important hires rarely come from job boards.

We also support senior professionals who aren’t actively job-hunting, but who are ready for their next chapter. If you are trusted, well-paid and carrying real responsibility, we understand what it takes for a move to make sense and we connect you to organisations where your strengths and ambition can truly align.

Alongside executive and senior search, we provide people and workforce strategy support, helping organisations align structure, leadership and capability with where the business needs to go next. Our temporary staffing division, @YBProfessionalTemps, delivers compliant, high-quality professionals across operations, finance, HR and business support.

Because growth isn’t driven by strategy alone.
It’s driven by who sits in the room.

Name: Huntsor International
Description:
Established in 2014, Huntsor International was founded on the basis of providing middle to senior management executive search services to the growing Great China region. Today Huntsor has successfully served clients across multiple industry sectors throughout the Great China region, ensuring clients experience Quality, precision and results when partnering with us. 
Huntsor’s mandate is to, at all costs, serve our clients, candidates we place, and our workforce by combining our experience, knowledge and resources. We ensure that the best fit person is appointed to each vacant position we are commissioned to search for. 
Our success has been founded on understanding our clients requirements, utilizing tried and tested search methodology and consistently gaining insightful feedback from our clients. 

Aside from our executive search services,  Huntsor provides clients with focused and customized consulting services. This includes, market research, confidential background research and other services. 

In addition we have provided creation of company wide job descriptions and conducted industry specific salary surveys. Our expertise within the consulting field allows our clients to benefit from our ability to assist in optimizing their workforce productivity allowing them to meet critical business objectives. We strive to impact the business culture of an organization by bringing about change to the functional and managerial systems ensuring the cultural realignment is in line with the overall strategic goals of an organization.

Covering a wide range of specialties and industries: 
- Finance & Accounting
- HR & Administration
- IT
- Consumer Electronics
- Manufacturing
- High-tech
- Automotive
- Real Estate
- Internet
- Professional Service

To learn more info about Huntsor International, please refer to http://www.huntsor.com

Name: WilliamCharles Search Group
Description:
The mission of WilliamCharles is to place the right person in the right opportunity, creating the winning outcome for both the organization and the successful candidate. Having the right people in key positions has a profound effect on a company's success. When a client entrusts us with an assignment, we approach it with the urgency that it demands and we have proven track record of finding, attracting and recruiting the right people.

We recruit across a number of industry segments and functional specialty areas. Our focus is senior level positions in Accounting/Finance, Human Resources, Operations and General Management, Supply Chain, as well as Sales and Marketing leadership.

Our services include Retained Executive Search, Engaged Search, Contingent Professional Recruiting and Contract Placement. We share our client's commitment to having the right people in key positions and we approach every assignment with the intent of building long term relationships. Our success depends on our ability to find the best possible candidate and our expertise has been developed through working with hundreds of hiring teams since 2001.

Name: Altima
Description:
We launched Altima because we were tired of founders being underserved when it came to finding their CFO. Tired of the lack of knowledge about the role, and the transformational impact it can have on a growing business. And we were tired of the same small pool of senior finance leaders being approached for the same roles.

And so, we decided to do things differently. An agile and entrepreneurial search firm based on data, research, relationships and serious expertise.

20 years on and we’ve evolved from underdog to market leader in Europe. We now support companies along their whole growth curve from Series A to late stage venture and into Private Equity ownership. We’ve built partnerships with some of the world’s most respected funds, who trust us to find growth-driving CFOs for their portfolio. And over the last few years, we’ve expanded our operations in the US.

We’ve built our deep expertise, a vast CFO network and a team of seriously smart humans, who deliver a best-in-class product and service to our clients.

Name: Press & Associates
Description:
Executive Search Exclusive to Private Equity Value Creation

Secure proven talent—aligned to your thesis, ready to move at deal speed. Purpose-built for private equity investors and their portfolio companies.

We help GPs and their portfolio companies hire the leaders who move the needle — fast. Whether you're building a value creation team at the fund level or hiring C-suite talent to be hands on operators in one of your portfolio companies, we deliver exceptional candidates with a track record of execution in PE-backed environments.

 What We Deliver

- Operating Partners & Value Creation Hires (Tech, GTM, Finance, Human Capital, Ops)

- C-Level & Functional Leadership for PE-backed businesses

- Elite Operators to partner on diligence, transformation, or exit prep

 What Sets Us Apart

- 100% Private Equity Focus — our network is exclusively in the private equity space understanding the intracacies of what it takes to be successful and deliver on value creation plans.

- Speed & Precision — we move fast without compromising quality

- Deep Network — our candidates are known quantities, not cold leads

- Search Strategy Built for the Investment Thesis — every hire aligned to value creation

PE firms work with us when they need top-tier leadership — and can’t afford a miss.

Press & Associates is an executive search firm built exclusively for the private equity ecosystem. Founded in 2017, Paul Press has built Press & Associates into the leading search firm in Private Equity known for their professionalism, expertise, and ability to deliver on engagements to industry leading standards. 

Paul remains the sole owner and shareholder of Press & Associates and continues to build out a best in class search firm, now tech enabled and evolving to meet the changing needs of the private equity ecosystem. 

If you’re investing behind people to successfully deliver on your investment thesis , we should talk.

Description:
Cole and Company is an executive search firm based in Tokyo comprised of a strong team of professionals in their respective fields with extensive experience in assisting Foreign Companies succeed in the Japanese Market. We specialize in recruiting Senior and Middle Management executives for the Consumer Goods industry sector, which encompasses a wide range of businesses.  FMCG, Entertainment, Licensing, Retail, Advertising, digital, food ingredients and additives, logistics and supply chain, Professional consulting services for the consumer industry…if it touches the consumer in some way, we do it.

From Initial pre-entry Market research to assisting fully independently operated companies, our team has the skills and experience to answer your needs in this Market.

We are all about delivering results now and have a deep committment to treating everyone with respect and humanity.

In addition to recruiting Senior Executives, our consultants spend a percentage of their time involved in special new business development projects. Recognizing that all business rests on the skills and abilities of the people who get the work done, and that we are in a unique position to access this talent, we spend a portion of our time to create new business opportunities both in a partnership, and leadership role.

Name: JBK Associates International
Description:
JBK Associates, Inc. is an award winning, executive talent solutions organization specializing in the acquisition, management and development of senior level talent across a wide spectrum of functional responsibilities and industries. Founded in 2003 by Julie Kampf, the vision for the company since inception has been to create a full service talent solutions firm with a distinct differentiation. As a “boutique”, JBK prides itself on its “high touch/high return” philosophy and values. Our client relationships are truly partnerships, where we strive to be a trusted advisor and extension of our client team, thereby understanding the intricacies and culture of each and every client. 

At JBK Associates, the successful execution of a search assignment is the collaborative effort of the entire JBK team- we believe in everyone taking ownership for the quality of an outcomeWhen a client engages JBK Associates as their search partner, they are on the receiving end of a collective experience base of more than 50 years.

The firm has an unparalleled commitment to diversity and inclusion across all touch points of an assignment which is substantiated by metrics, and further evidenced by our own work environment. We understand that excellence comes from all perspectives, so we treat diversity as a necessity, not a nice-to-have.

Name: PU | Executive Search & Leadership Advisory
Description:
Personal Utvelgelse (PU) is a boutique advisory firm specialising in executive search, leadership assessment and organisational advisory. Since 1985 we have helped owners, boards and leadership teams make well-founded decisions about people and leadership.

Our work combines structured evaluation, behavioural insight and a clear understanding of the organisational and commercial context in which leaders must succeed. We operate primarily in industrial, production, energy, technology and private capital environments — sectors where competence, leadership and ownership ambition meet.

Clients value our Scandinavian approach: calm, analytical and honest. We prioritise clarity over complexity and quality over volume, always with senior involvement in every assignment.

PU is the Norwegian partner of Kestria, the world’s largest alliance of independent executive search firms.

Name: Ethel Executive
Description:
Ethel Executive arbetar med Executive Search, Assessment och Second Opinion. Vi hjälper både företag och individer att utvecklas genom rätt matchning och rådgivning. 

Fokus ligger på rekrytering av styrelse, VD, ledningsgruppsmedlemmar och affärsområdesledning. Våra klienter är såväl stora internationella koncerner, börsnoterade företag som ägarledda mindre företag. Vi arbetar nära styrelse, ägare och ledning vid kompetensförsörjning. 

Ethel Executive är en långsiktig samarbetspartner när det kommer till ledarförsörjning där fokus ligger på förtroende, engagemang och transparens.

Ethel Executive grundades 2021 av Emma Lindén och Louise Brondin Månsson vilka har en samlad lång erfarenhet från näringsliv, organisation och att arbeta med Executive Search.

Name: The Energists
Description: We are a specialist executive search firm operating exclusively in the energy industry. Established in 1979, we recruit for oil & gas, power & utilities and alternative energy. Filling hard to hire, high impact roles across the energy value chain is our specialty.

Name: Key Figures CFO Executive Search
Description: Key Figures helpt de strategische CEO om haar sterke CFO/FD discreet te rekruteren mits getekende NDA en enkel op retainer basis.

Name: CARRHURE Executive Search
Description:
CARRHURE is a Paris-based Executive Search and Advisory firm dedicated to the not-for-profit and NGO ecosystem.
We partner with mission-driven organisations to identify, attract, and secure leaders who combine impact, credibility, and long-term alignment.

At CARRHURE, we believe recruitment is only the beginning. Our approach is built to support sustainable growth—helping organisations strengthen their leadership capacity while staying true to their mission and values.

Our approach is shaped by five pillars:

Strategic Vision
We work closely with clients to understand their long-term priorities, organisational culture, and the real challenges behind each mandate—so we can build solutions that last.

Global Reach
With an international team and network, we access talent across borders—connecting organisations with leaders who bring diverse perspectives and deep sector experience.

Ethics & Trust
Integrity, transparency, and confidentiality guide every step of our work. We build trust with both clients and candidates through a rigorous, respectful process.

Diversity & Inclusion
We champion inclusive recruitment because diverse leadership strengthens organisations—and accelerates innovation, resilience, and results.

Partnership & Sustainability
We go beyond placements to build long-term relationships, resilient pipelines, and leadership continuity—supporting organisations that work for lasting change.

CARRHURE stands for professional excellence in every detail: executive search, assessment, and advisory—tailored to the distinctive needs of the not-for-profit and NGO sectors.


 It’s not about leadership. It’s about stewardship.

Name: Laigaard Executive Search
Description:
Laigaard Executive Search er specialiseret i Executive Search, rådgivning og organisationsudvikling for både mindre virksomheder og nogle af verdens største internationale virksomheder. 

Laigaard har gennemført mere end 900 rekrutteringer med en succesrate på over 99 % på de seneste 29 år. Denne træfsikkerhed understreger vores forståelse inden for Executive Search.

Vi fokuserer primært på search af Chairs, bestyrelsesmedlemmer, CEOs, CXOs og tunge mellemledere. Vores største styrker ligger i vores analytiske tilgang til virksomhedens udfordringer, dybe forståelse af menneskelige dynamikker og kompromisløse kvalitet. Disse egenskaber er tydelige i vores roller som headhuntere, rådgivere og coaches for topchefer i Danmark og internationalt.

Hos Laigaard Executive Search er vi dedikerede til at levere løsninger af højeste kvalitet, samtidig med at vi opretholder den integritet, som teamet er kendt for i branchen.

______________________________________________


Laigaard Executive Search specializes in executive search, consulting, and organizational development for both small businesses and some of the world’s largest international corporations. 

Over the past 29 years, Laigaard has successfully completed more than 900 recruitments, with a success rate exceeding 99%. This track record underscores our deep understanding of executive search.

We primarily focus on the search for chairs, board members, CEOs, CXOs, and experienced senior managers. Our greatest strengths lie in our analytical approach to corporate challenges, deep understanding of human dynamics, and unwavering commitment to quality. These attributes are evident in our roles as headhunters, advisors, and coaches for top executives in Denmark and internationally.

At Laigaard Executive Search, we are dedicated to delivering highest quality solutions while upholding the integrity for which our team is renowned in the industry.

Name: Odgers Luxembourg
Description:
For over 50 years, Odgers has helped some of the world’s biggest and best organizations find the senior talent to drive their agendas. We deliver only executive top level recruitments, assessment and development to businesses and organizations varying in size, structure and maturity. We do that across over 50 sectors, whether commercial, public or not-for-profit and draw on the experience of more than 400 Partners and their teams in 67 offices and 35 countries.

Our key differentiators:
-	Access to best practices: Worldwide player, we have access to knowledge, global best practices and latest trends in Executive Search sector.
-	Sectorial expertise: Strong local expertise and global collaboration when searching for specializations. 
-	In-house dedicated search:  We employ a dedicated in-house research team, and maintain a sophisticated database of key individuals, issues, and trends in the global and local markets. 
-	Beyond the expected goals: Diverse and inclusive sourcing strategy. The pool of candidates is regularly strengthened.
-	DE&I and innovation: We ensure that equitable advice and recruitment practices are a fundamental part of the search process.
-	In house assessment: In-house local psychometric testing and advisory, based on the first class worldwide HOGAN  LeaderFit assessment modules.

Name: PinkWorm Recruitment
Description:
We listen. We deliver. 

With over 20 years recruitment sector experience, PinkWorm Recruitment was founded in 2018 with a trusted Mac Book Air and bags of energy ambition and passion, to build a truly ‘People First’ recruitment, executive search and headhunting consultancy.

PinkWorm Recruitment recruit for permanent, contract and temporary openings across the UK, working with a diverse client base including large multinationals, PE backed businesses, SMEs, government and government supported organisations, non-profits and scale ups.

Well reputed for targeted headhunting for Specialist, Executive C Suite Level and Confidential roles.

___________________________________

At PinkWorm Recruitment we understand that the key to success lies in our ability to stay ahead of the curve. 

That's why we invest heavily in cutting-edge technology and innovative processes to help us scour the market and identify the most talented individuals. Whether it's smart algorithms, or leveraging our extensive network of industry contacts, we leave no stone unturned in our quest to find the best talent for our clients.

And when it comes to headhunting, we take a tailored and personalised approach, leveraging our deep understanding of the industry to identify the individuals who are the best fit for our clients' requirements.

Our expertise lies in our skill to match clients and candidates seamlessly. We recognise that successful recruitment is all about people, and so we make it our mission to build strong, trusting and lasting relationships with both our clients and candidates. 

Our core values of professionalism, openness, and exceptional client care ensures we are empowering our clients to attract, secure and retain the right talents to excel in today's fast-moving world.

To discuss your requirements, please email hello@pinkwormrecruitment.com

Name: TRANSEARCH Africa
Description:
TRANSEARCH South Africa, a member of TRANSEARCH International, is 100% black-female Empowered, providing clients with four main services: Executive Search, Market Mapping, Leadership Consulting, and Organisational Effectiveness. We have global offices and in Africa our offices are in Johannesburg, Cape Town, Nigeria, and growing.

TRANSEARCH South Africa is a dynamic and experienced executive search firm. We are well positioned to attract and place all types of senior management, C-Suite and specialised-skill candidates through our research methodology and using our well established and extensive network to validate this scientific process. 

TRANSEARCH South Africa is committed to developing long-term relationships with our clients so that we can fine tune this search process to perfection. We support clients across a wide range of industries, from FMCG and financial services to mining. We enable business transformation by upholding world-class standards when identifying and recruiting
candidates. TRANSEARCH South Africa provides you with the “right-fit” employees with the leadership potential to secure your company’s long-term success.

Striving Towards Quality Client Service - We continually endeavour to surpass client and candidate expectations. As a global member of the AESC (Association of Executive Search Consultants) we not only adhere to their ethics and standards, each of our offices conduct a quality performance review after completion of our searches. The results are published annually. We are proud to say that more than three quarters of our clients have indicated that they will use our services again and have given us the highest rating in our surveys.

Name: Mermoz Associés
Description:
Fondé en 2005, le cabinet Mermoz réunit des experts passionnés par les ressources humaines et le monde de l’entreprise. Véritables chasseurs de personnalités et de profils rares, nous sommes à la fois créateurs de rencontres et accélérateurs d’opportunités professionnelles. Notre vocation est de tisser de nouveaux liens et connexions pour accompagner la transformation des organisations et les guider vers la réussite et la performance. Ce travail exige précision, rigueur, écoute et une implication durable auprès de chacun de nos clients. Notre démarche pragmatique et sur-mesure repose sur une immersion dans l’histoire, la culture, les valeurs et les projets de votre entreprise.

Mermoz s’appuie sur quatre pôles d’expertise sectorielle :

- Industrie, négoce, distribution, agroalimentaire, télécoms, réseaux...
- Métiers du chiffre, corporate finance, fonds d’investissement, M&A, conseil-audit...
- Hospitality : hôtellerie, restauration, maisons de luxe...
- Immobilier, BTP, construction...

Au-delà de la chasse de têtes, Mermoz a élargi ses compétences en intégrant des experts capables d’accompagner la transformation des entreprises. Convaincus que l’épanouissement des collaborateurs repose sur des organisations modernes et agiles, nous nous engageons à aider nos clients à moderniser leurs structures, donner du sens à leurs équipes et coconstruire une nouvelle dynamique. Nos interventions couvrent quatre grands domaines d’expertise :

- Recrutement par approche directe (Executive Search)
- Conseil RH et organisationnel
- Coaching exécutif individuel et collectif
- Management de transition

Mermoz continue de se développer et d’évoluer. En 2021, le cabinet a intégré Tovalea, spécialiste de l’hôtellerie, de la restauration et des maisons de luxe, pour renforcer son approche de l’excellence.

Name: SpeedHunt
Description:
SpeedHunt is a premier Headhunting and Executive Search company with a proven track record of successfully assisting its clients in meeting their hiring requirements. Committed to excellence, SpeedHunt aims to provide top-quality candidates and accelerate the hiring process, ensuring that their clients can swiftly secure the best talent available in the market.

The name "SpeedHunt" embodies the company's philosophy of conducting searches with unmatched swiftness while delivering only the highest caliber candidates to fulfill their clients' needs. This dedication to expediency is complemented by their unwavering commitment to ensuring that each candidate presented aligns perfectly with the client's requirements, resulting in a seamless and effective recruitment process.

SpeedHunt takes pride in its highly experienced internal team, whose expertise and knowledge in the field of headhunting and executive search enable them to identify exceptional candidates efficiently. The team's extensive database of qualified professionals further bolsters their ability to promptly respond to client demands with candidates who possess the right skills, experience, and cultural fit.

In essence, SpeedHunt stands out as a reliable and efficient partner for companies seeking to fill key positions with top-tier talent, providing a fast, precise, and streamlined experience throughout the hiring process.

Name: Fintech HI.RE
Description:
Fintech HI.RE is your trusted global recruitment partner for the fintech, payments, and banking sectors — combining executive search precision with offshore delivery capability.

Founded in 2024 by Cliff van Tonder, a veteran of the global fintech and financial-services industry, Fintech HI.RE brings over two decades of leadership experience from firms including Zafin, Finastra, Temenos, BNP Paribas, SOFGEN and FIS.

We’re not traditional recruiters — we’re fintech insiders who’ve built, scaled, and led teams ourselves. That means we understand the complexity of hiring for transformation, whether it’s modernising core banking, building AI-first payment platforms, or scaling SaaS delivery teams.

What We Do

1 Executive Search — We connect banks, fintechs, and system integrators with the leaders who shape what’s next — from product and payments executives to transformation specialists and non-executive directors.

2 Offshore Resourcing — Through our permanent workforce in India, we give clients access to highly-skilled fintech and banking professionals who deliver speed, certainty, and value. Whether augmenting delivery squads or supporting platform modernisation, we supply dependable talent ready to perform.

Our Edge

Deep fintech and payments domain knowledge

Founder-led relationships built on accountability and transparency

“Human Intelligence” – a smarter, more personal approach to executive hiring

Fintech HI.RE Australia partners with clients across APAC to help them scale leadership and delivery capacity with precision and integrity.

Name: Ace Hires Talent Solutions
Description:
Ace Hires Talent has a primary goal of connecting visionary companies with exceptional talent through our exceptional range of services.
The founding partners and recruiters collectively possess over 20 years of experience in recruitment and executive search, with an ongoing record of success in our respective domains. The inception of Ace Hires Talent stems from our profound passion for our work and the aspiration to establish a platform where individuals who share our vision can unite. Our ambition is to uphold the utmost professional standards, a commitment demonstrated by our willingness to empathize with the perspectives of our stakeholders – including clients, candidates, partners, and employees.
Our dedication to improvement remains resolute. We will enhance our specialization and market expertise, actively engage in attentive listening to comprehend your requirements, and uphold the principles of integrity in all our business endeavors.

Name: Kanry Search
Description: Kanry is a recruitment agency that offers executive search, permanent placement, staffing, payroll, work pass, HR consulting, and EOR services in Singapore and Malaysia. Inspired by '千里' (Qiān Lǐ), meaning a long journey towards great success, Kanry is committed to strategic growth, quality, and sustainability. Kanry adheres to various standards and certifications, such as ISO 9001, Tripartite Standard, Bizsafe Level 4, and Progressive Wage Mark Plus, to ensure fair, safe, and responsible practices. Kanry aims to deliver unparalleled quality of service to its clients while creating a healthy, fair, and structured ecosystem for its people.

Name: Total Business Solutions Romania
Description:
Total Business Solutions was founded in 2000, its core business is Executive Search and, since then, is the business partner of both companies who wish to excel on the Romanian and European markets, as well as  individuals who are looking for an exceptional career.

Total Business Solutions is the Romanian Partner in the Global network of GESN, consisting of more than 60 participating countries. For further information: 
https://globalexecutivesearch.net/

Name: Full Umbrella Search Partners
Description:
At Full Umbrella Search Partners, we help organizations serious about their mission and thoughtful about how they grow by placing values-aligned leaders and crafting high-performing teams. We build people ecosystems rooted in trust, care, and long-term impact.

We partner with companies we’d be proud to work for: founder-led startups, climate tech innovators, B Corps, purpose-driven SaaS companies, manufacturers, nonprofits, and other organizations shaping a better future.

From executive search to multi-role team builds, our approach is intentional, people-first, and built to last.

Three Stats We're Proud To Share:

 We've placed 100s of leaders and founding team members across multiple industries

 We're proud to contribute to inclusive and forward thinking teams by maintaining a 80% + diversity-add placement rate

 92% + of our clients are repeat customers -- Many of them being multi-year long partnerships

Name: BALTIMORE PARTNERS
Description:
Baltimore Partners delivers bespoke recruitment and consultancy services, tailoring a direct approach to each client's unique needs. 

Our commitment to discerning evaluation ensures long-term, quality relationships underpinned by adaptability and responsiveness. 

We respect and embrace the culture and ambitions of all our partners.

Name: LeadPro
Description:
LeadPro is a global executive search firm specializing in building executive teams for growth stage and venture - backed companies.  We hire hard to source, and to recruit, leaders across Digital Transformation, Advertising & Media, Renewables, Fintech, Private Equity, and Capital Markets. 

Our global footprint,  network, and process, ensures we canvass the entirety of the market, as borders continue to dissipate, and our clients demand the most impactful executives to drive their successes.

Name: Lucent Search
Description:
At Lucent Search, we help high-growth, high-complexity businesses hire the AI, data, and technical leaders they can’t afford to get wrong — especially when the role is new, regulated, or mission-critical.

We don’t just find candidates. We act as a search partner who speaks your language, defines the role — not just fills it, and understands what’s at stake when you’re building the team behind your next breakthrough. We move fast without cutting corners, represent your brand with intelligence and conviction, and bring you the few exceptional people who can lead, deliver, and scale — not a long list of maybe-fits.

We help deep-tech innovators, digital consultancies, and mission-driven founders build executive teams in AI, data, and complex regulated domains including; AI -powered SaaS, Digital Twins, Simulation Software, Fintech, Cyber, eVTOL, ClimateTech, Energy Storage and Battery Tech, MedTech, SportsTech, Industrial Biotech, EV and Smart Mobility.

Hardware/Built Environment + Software + AI is our speciality.

Name: Lucent Search
Description:
Lucent Search is a retained executive search and leadership advisory firm specialising in leadership for AI-driven transformation in complex organisations and emerging sectors.

We work with mid-market and enterprise CEOs, private equity, business owners, and investors on roles where the ability to govern change matters more than technical pedigree alone.

AI-led transformation rarely fails because of tools. It fails because organisations are not designed to absorb it. Roles become unclear. Decision rights blur. Accountability fragments. Confidence erodes.

Our work sits at the intersection of:
• Executive search
• Organisational design
• Leadership capability
• Human behaviour

We are typically engaged when:
• A leadership role is being redefined, not simply replaced
• AI or new technology is reshaping workflows, decisions, or operating models
• Accountability and ownership are becoming unclear
• Boards and investors want confidence in long-term leadership capacity
• Execution depends on judgment, not just delivery

What we help organisations build:
• Clear definitions of effective leadership in AI-enabled environments
• Teams with the capacity to govern ambiguity and change
• Role designs that support learning, clarity, and durability
• Operating structures that reduce dependency on individuals

We work on a small number of select retained mandates each year.

Lucent Search exists to help organisations appoint leaders who can think, govern, and execute through AI-driven change, and to ensure they are set up to succeed once in seat.

Name: Borka Consulting Life Sciences Recruitment
Description:
Your Norwegian Partner for Life Sciences Search and Recruitment Since 2009.

 Borka Consulting is a boutique executive search firm exclusively dedicated to the life sciences sector. With 100% focus on search and recruitment within the pharmaceutical industry, medical devices, biotechnology, diagnostics, and the laboratory sector, we specialize in identifying and recruiting top talent for companies in this industry.

 As an independent agency, we handle fewer clients than larger firms, enabling us to provide personalized attention and tailor-made solutions. Our combined experience in the life sciences industry and recruitment since 2009 gives us unique insights into market needs.

 Through our membership in INRALS (International Network of Recruitment Agencies in Life Sciences), we connect companies with exceptional talent across the Nordics and Europe.

Based in the Oslo area, Borka Consulting offers a trusted local partnership with global reach.

Name: Humanis Talent Acquisition & Advisory
Description: Humanis Talent Acquisition & Advisory is an award-winning executive search and leadership advisory firm with local offices and deep-rooted connections in Calgary, Edmonton, Montreal and Toronto. We serve exceptional clients across North America while sourcing candidates and leadership best practices from around the world. From recruiting visionary leaders and helping businesses prosper to volunteering our time to local causes and giving back to our community - we are deeply committed to making a difference.

Name: Handz
Description:
Welcome to HANDZ!

We are a company focused on transforming the talent attraction and management market, walking hand in hand with professionals, businesses, and HR teams. We support both career advancement and business strengthening, always aiming to create consistent and lasting results.

Our mission is to connect people with their purposes, contributing to a more balanced, inclusive, and innovative work ecosystem. Whether it’s attracting top talent or enhancing professional growth, we are here to transform the journey.

Come revolutionize with us!

Name: Hunton Executive
Description:
Hunton Executive is a specialist executive search firm dedicated exclusively to life sciences and healthcare.

With more than 25 years of international executive search and industry experience, we bring deep global networks and direct access to both active and passive executive talent across biotech, pharma, medtech, healthtech, and healthcare services.

Our consultants appoint C-suite and board-level leaders for PE-backed and listed organisations, multinational corporations, public health systems, and high-growth scale-ups, delivering searches across APAC, Europe, the UK, and North America. We regularly support organisations entering new markets, scaling leadership teams, or replacing executives across multiple regions, not just Australia.

We are frequently engaged on first-in-market appointments, confidential searches, and succession-critical roles where discretion, judgement, and global reach are essential.

We partner with Boards, CEOs, and senior leadership teams to appoint executives who can lead in complex, highly regulated environments and deliver sustainable commercial and organisational outcomes. Our value lies in our ability to identify and engage leaders who are not visible on the open market, and to do so with credibility, insight, and care.

Every engagement is led by senior consultants with first-hand sector knowledge and long-standing relationships across global life sciences and healthcare markets. Our approach is targeted, relationship-driven, and rigorous.

We measure success by the quality, longevity, and impact of the leaders we place, and by the trusted partnerships we build with clients around the world.

Contact us for a confidential conversation:
 enquiries@huntonexecutive.com
 www.huntonexecutive.com

Name: Orchid Holistic Search
Description:
See our Jobs Portal: https://jobs.crelate.com/portal/orchidholisticsearch

Orchid Holistic Search is the natural choice to simplify your Leadership-Level search in marketing, operations, sales, human resources, quality or finance. Each search is like an orchid; unique and delicate in nature. Our holistic approach to recruitment symbolizes our respect for interconnectedness and dedication to companies who are doing good for people, products and the planet. That being said, most recruits are due to critical gaps in expertise and require a strong sense of urgency. Cesab Rekrytering AB är sedan 1985 en ledande aktör inom rekrytering och ledarutveckling. Sedan dess har Cesab genomfört uppdrag inom executive search, urval och ledarförsörjning i såväl privat som offentlig verksamhet.

Ett väl utfört uppdrag kan bygga på en djupgående analys och förståelse av kundens behov, förutsättningar och förväntningar i kombination med att de utförs på ett systematiskt och professionellt arbetssätt. Detta bygger också på våra medarbetares långa och breda erfarenhet inom branschen.

Våra konsulter är medlemmar i branschföreningarna ESK (Executive Search Konsulter) och HRK (Human Resource Konsulter) och följer givetvis deras regler för etik och sekretess. Samtliga konsulter har lång och kvalificerad erfarenhet från ledande befattningar í näringslivet, med stort kontaktnät inom olika branscher.

Vi har kontor i Luleå men jobbar rikstäckande med viss tyngdpunkt på Norrland.

Name: A-Search AB
Description:
Welcome to A-Search – Successful recruitments since 1991

We help companies grow strong businesses throughout the country by offering them highly qualified candidates throughout Executive Search. Our offices are located in Stockholm, Gothenburg and Malmo. (www.asearch.se)

We are a part of The Taplow Group, a worldwide network, who provides us with the possibilities to identify and recruit across the borders. (http://www.taplowgroup.com/)

We pride ourselves in identifying, recruiting and assessing leaders and experts whose experience, skills and records of success are a perfect match with our client requirements. 

We offer our customers a solid process in eight steps. From the startup meeting where we create a document of your company that we provide to our candidates. Continuing with a research within the current industry for the best talents. After our competency based interviews we present the top 3-5 candidates. If desired, we can also offer a comprehensive personality test with our psychologist. In addition, we can also provide a background check if desired. 

Diversity is a must and we at A-Search have taken several actions in order to be among the best recruiting companies within Sweden. For example, we are the first recruitment company in the world to get the Global Diversity Certification thru GDCF, which is The World Federation of United Nations Association’s exclusive global partner for engaging corporations in work on diversity issues. 

We are also one of the initiators of Diversity Charter Sweden, which focus is to ban discrimination in the workplace and commit to work towards creating diversity. It expresses a company’s willingness to improve the degree to which their workforce reflects the diversity. (http://www.diversity-charter.com/)

Name: Stanton Chase Los Angeles
Description:
Stanton Chase was founded because the execution of professional services at the large firms in our industry was suffering from a lack of purposeful, individual care. As leaders of companies start to understand the importance of meaningful connections—both with their employees as well as with their partners—the focus on helping candidates and clients form strong, personal relationships with each other became the core of what drives us.

Our goal was to create an organization where a culture of friendship and trust would ultimately become a harbinger of good business. And our desire to achieve the highest standards of professionalism in our industry would help us out-care and out-serve the competition. This fundamental belief and desire to collaborate with our teammates in an atmosphere of transparency and candor, while maintaining admiration and respect for one another, has been the real catalyst that has enabled us to grow from six offices to seventy-five offices since 1990.

What’s special about Stanton Chase Los Angeles, is that we’re a team always seeking to make a difference.  It’s a mindset and culture, focused on caring, for management of our clients and each candidate. People on our team are committed to being in constant communication with our clients, both when they need to attract the best, ‘right fit’ leaders, and beyond as their partner for introductions of resources (people and services). Truly caring about them brings amazing results. Knowledge to best represent who they are.  A sounding board. Offer programs of value to their talent. Friendships. And more.  We’ve experienced it before, and see it happening here. We’re creating and making a difference for our community.

Name: AstroTalent
Description:
AstroTalent exists to help put Man on the Moon*

And your company probably has a similar cool story.

That's why you got into the Space business in the first place. 

But you can't do it alone, and putting things into orbit isn't easy.

And yet, building the team to deliver on this, is the most unreliable part of the whole process.


You've wasted a lot of money, and a lot more time, trying to get this fixed, but after hours and hours of interviews, with candidate after candidate, you've almost given up hope.

You're now risking missing project deadlines, as mission-critical positions with key technical skills have been left unfilled for months, and you're feeling the pressure from investors.

The kicker? Your team is now overworked, overstressed, and thinking about leaving, resulting in even more gaps in your team.


This is where we come in.


Firstly, forget your crappy ChatGPT job descriptions, we want to lift the hood, take a look at the work packages, and properly define the job that needs to be done.

Then, we want to audit your recruitment processes, gut the whole thing and start over. No more spending 8 hours interviewing one candidate and still being unable to make a decision.

Next, we want to map the market for this talent and make sure that no one who could do the work gets missed, before going to market on your behalf.

And finally, we want to present you with all the options—everyone who is interested in what you’re doing and can do the work.

The result? Confidence that you’re making the best hiring decision available to you, from the market, at this time.

This entire process should take no longer than 6 weeks.


If you need to change how you're hiring and make it a competitive advantage for your business, click the "Contact Us" button at the top of the page and send us a message.


*JFK visited NASA and asked a janitor what he was doing, his reply “I’m helping put man on the moon!”

AstroTalent is here to do the same thing. Play our part in Space.

Name: SC2G
Description: Our research group focuses on a family of semiconductors called wide bandgap (GaN and ZnO) and ultra-wide bandgap (diamond, AlN and Ga2O3). Tehtävämme on lisätä työturvallisuutta putoamisvaarallisella alueella työskentelyssä. Koulutuksissamme paneudutaan riskiarviointiin, sekä oikeiden putoamissuojainten valintaan ja niiden käyttöön. Asiantuntijapalvelumme auttaa riskiarvioinnissa, putoamissuojaussuunnitelmissa, pelastussuunnitelmissa sekä työmaavalvojien koulutuksissa.

Palvelumme kohderyhmänä ovat mm. teollisuuden tuotanto,- ja energialaitokset, rakennusalan yritykset sekä huolto,- ja kunnossapito liiketoiminta.

Name: Brown and Pierce Consulting
Description:
Results. 

That's what you expect out of recruiters.

 

Your organization needs talent, which means you need a team that can navigate recruitment at the right cost, in the right timeframe, with the right candidates. Many recruiting agencies deliver transactional services, and meanwhile, that empty seat keeps holding your business back from achieving its full potential.

What if you had an expert recruiting team, invested in your success, working overtime to find you the perfect candidates?

At Brown and Pierce Consulting, we know that Quality is essential to a recruiting ethos. We provide only the best talent solutions to our clients - because every company deserves to have a world-class team.

 

We deliver the results others can only promise.

Partner with us at Brown and Pierce Consulting today, and let us prove it.

Name: Aurélie Bagot Recrutement
Description:
Je  travaille depuis plus de 9 ans dans le secteur du recrutement. Je suis spécialisée dans l'approche directe de profils. 

Je gère en parfait autonomie l'ensemble du process de recrutement.

J'ai débuté ma carrière dans le secteur de l'IT où j'ai développé des techniques de recherches et d'approche directes de profils. Depuis de plus de 4 ans je suis indépendante et j'ai eu la volonté de diversifier mes compétences métiers (IT, Digital, Industrie,Médical,Finances, BTP, Sales).

Cette polyvalence métier me permets de pouvoir comprendre rapidement les attentes de l'entreprise, de mettre la meilleure stratégie de recherche et lui proposer les candidats les plus adaptés à son besoin.

Mes clients sont variés (multinationales, agence, start-up) et je sais m'adapter rapidement aux process de la société.

Je travaille principale en full remote et utilise des outils de reporting quotidiennement.

Si vous souhaitez qu'on discute vous pouvez me contacter :
 par e-mail : aurelie.bagot.recrutement@gmail.com

Name: EMPREGO SP
Description:
Bem-vindo à Página de Empregos em São Paulo! 

Conecte-se com oportunidades profissionais vibrantes na cidade que nunca dorme! Somos o ponto de encontro para talentos e empresas que buscam construir o futuro juntos.

 O que oferecemos:

Vagas atualizadas diariamente em diversas áreas e níveis de experiência.
Conteúdo exclusivo sobre o mercado de trabalho em São Paulo.
Dicas de carreira e desenvolvimento profissional.
 Por que São Paulo?
São Paulo é uma metrópole global, pulsante e cheia de oportunidades. Descubra o dinamismo dessa cidade que nunca para e seja parte de uma comunidade profissional que está moldando o futuro.

 Conecte-se com a comunidade:
Participe de discussões, eventos e networking para expandir sua rede de contatos. Aqui, a colaboração é a chave para o sucesso.

 Como usar esta página:

Explore as vagas e candidaturas.
Participe das discussões para trocar insights e experiências.
Mantenha-se atualizado sobre as últimas tendências e oportunidades em São Paulo.
 Dicas de carreira:
Encontre conselhos valiosos para impulsionar sua carreira e se destacar no competitivo mercado de trabalho paulistano.

 Sobre nós:
Somos apaixonados por unir talentos a oportunidades, impulsionando o crescimento profissional e contribuindo para o desenvolvimento econômico de São Paulo.

 Conecte-se conosco:
Junte-se à nossa comunidade e esteja sempre um passo à frente na busca pelo emprego dos seus sonhos.

São Paulo é a cidade das oportunidades, e estamos aqui para ajudar você a conquistá-las. Vamos construir juntos o futuro profissional que você merece!

#EmpregosSP #Oportunidades #CarreiraEmSãoPaulo #Networking

Name: First30 Search Partners
Description:
Through our First30 Framework, we Identify your next hire within 30 days and deliver a world-class placement without the bloat that inflates costs and timelines. 

Unlike legacy firms that juggle 7–10 searches per recruiter, we cap at just two searches at a time—operating as an extension of your business and giving you the focus you deserve.

We’ve refined the search process to give investors and operators what they really need: fast, focused, and flexible access to transformative leadership.

Name: ElevateX Leadership Collective, LLC
Description:
ElevateX goes beyond traditional coaching or executive search. Our unique “Placement Success” model integrates three key pillars, providing full-spectrum support that respects the needs of both clients and candidates. 

Whether you’re growing and need skilled talent or restructuring with compassionate outplacement, we deliver customized strategies that uphold dignity and respect at every step.

We’re your partner throughout the leadership journey, offering:

 Personalized Coaching and Leadership Development – Fostering self-awareness, resilience, and growth for leaders and teams of any size.

 Strategic Talent Search with Lasting Impact – Every placed leader receives 90-180 days of coaching to ensure a smooth transition and team alignment, all at no extra cost to client or candidate.

 Supportive Outplacement Services – Empowering outgoing leaders with confidence, purpose, and guidance for their next steps.

Our philosophy: “Create a culture where employees feel valued on the way in and respected on the way out.” It’s not just about hiring the right people—it’s about uplifting leaders with mindset coaching and handling tough decisions with empathy.

Name: EXZEV | Executive Search
Description:
Exzev was founded in 2020 and works as an international Executive Search partner with global reach (EU • MENA • US • LATAM • Asia • CIS). 

We place C-suite executives and board members who can drive business transformation.

Each search is led personally by a senior partner. We use a structured, transparent process from profile definition to onboarding in the new role.

We know hiring a top executive is not just filling a job. It is a strategic investment in your company’s future. Our work is focused on reducing risk, speeding up growth, and building durable leadership.

Contact us to discuss how we can find a leader who won’t just occupy a seat but will move your company forward.

Name: Instinctiv
Description:
Insinctiv is a boutique executive search firm that works with local and global businesses who would like to increase diversity of thought in their leadership teams. 

We do this by using many years of experience and by being a specialist, flexible and trusted executive search partner; securing transformational and diverse leaders who can drive growth.

Instinctiv was founded by Melanie Clark who is passionate about increasing diversity of thought in future boardrooms. She and her team do this by spending time with clients and key stakeholders - to really listen and understand the vision, challenges and culture. We then work together to solve problems and find solutions.

Our bespoke executive search process ensures there is a balanced search and shortlist, using extensive mapping, market intelligence, referral partners and referencing. 

We also work with leadership, advisory, organisational design consultants, and coaches if a client may benefit from these services… prior to, or instead of, embarking on an executive search.

Name: Praeva Partners
Description:
A next-generation executive search firm.

Built for exceptional teams and trusted by ambitious companies.

Name: GB Talent Solutions - Executive Headhunters & Consultants
Description:
At GB Talent Solutions our focus is to connect top level talent with great employers, saving our clients time, money, and resources. We bring an active headhunting approach to the recruitment industry that seeks out the best of the best talent in the market and introduces them to great companies where they can add value. We look to help organizations to grow by connecting them with people that have the experience, skills, and knowledge to hit the ground running. GB Talent Solutions provides an Executive Search approach to all positions from Senior Leadership to independent contributors that make an impact to the bottom line. A top tier global search firm based in Canada that connects talent and companies across the world. In addition to search services, GB Talent solutions also provides expertise to its clients in all Talent Management services from employee engagement, performance management, investigations, outplacement services, and much more! 

Our founder Graeme Burke has built a successful career and a great reputation in search services, working with many great companies in Canada, USA, and overseas. He has worked with some of the fastest growing companies in North America and some of the most reputable employers and has made a significant impact.

Name: Bellami Executive Search

At Bellami Executive Search, we specialize in connecting top-tier talent with leading organizations to drive growth and innovation. Founded on the principles of integrity, excellence, and personalized service, we are dedicated to transforming the executive search experience.

Name: Anise Search
Description:
Organizational transformation requires bold and courageous leadership. Anise Search identifies and supports visionary leaders for nonprofits committed to changing lived realities and structural inequities that impact real people. 

Founded by Ayanna Grady-Hunt, a veteran of national and trans-national executive search, Anise Search is built upon the premise that there are many paths to leadership and that, from a historical lens, organizational hiring fences have prevented minoritized leaders from actualizing the authentic power of their voice, presence, and experience.  Anise Search specializes in identifying emergent leaders who are prepared to lead organizational change. -- leaders who bring a wealth of progressive practical experience and an ethos of disruption, inclusion, and creativity to inspire action.  

Anise Search is a holistic, people-focused firm with a theo-ethical core. Our commitments are equally to our clients and to the people we introduce to them as candidates. We are not headhunters. Far from it. Our process -- and placements -- reflect this deeply ingrained intentionality. We embrace deep complexity and nuance that generates inspiring, strategic, and moral leadership and we mentor our clients to embrace this as well.  This holistic approach is our leadership mark -- and the cornerstone of every Anise Search executive search process.

Name: Business Active
Description:
“Business Active” provides Executive Search service and C-suite recruitment for both local and international companies in Ukraine and globally. We search out talented leaders, board directors, attract independent experts, and also provide search department and division managers. We always work in the same values space: the organization and its needs – we, as a provider with its own capabilities – candidates and their solutions for the company. 
We are proud to be accredited by the Association of Executive Search Consultants (AESC), which is recognized as the organization having the highest level of quality in the industry.

Our company was founded in 2008, and since then many complex and responsible projects have been implemented. Since 2019, Business Active has been a partner of the Cornerstone International Group (CIG). This partnership allows us and our clients to work with the best world’s practices in searching and attracting managers to leadership, use a global knowledge base, as well as provide a search for the best candidates of around the world.

Cornerstone International Group is one of the largest global consulting companies with more than 60 offices worldwide.  CIG specializes in providing Executive Search and management consulting services. Every year, the group takes a worthy place in the list of the best recruitment companies in the world in Forbes.

Name: ICARE
Description:

Plus qu’un prestataire, ICARE est un partenaire engagé, qui accompagne durablement ses clients pour bâtir des équipes commerciales solides, impliquées et prêtes à relever les défis de demain.

Name: CCMS Partners
Description:
CCMS Partners is a specialized search firm primarily focusing on executive and C-suite searches for non-profit and other social impact organizations.

CCMS Partners include Dr. James McGuirk, Dr. Terrance Cahill, Joe Costa, and Michael F. Shriver. Our firm offers a unique blend of executive backgrounds and expertise in various non-profit sectors. We are deeply committed to providing the best executive search services and support possible, ensuring we bring our clients a wealth of specialized technical assistance.

What sets CCMS Partners apart is our unique advantage: our team's firsthand experience as former CEOs of non-profit organizations. This deep understanding of the sector allows us to effectively search for, identify, and attract top talent, ensuring we successfully find the ideal prospect for your organization. 

Let us assist you with your next executive search. We look forward to supporting your organization's growth and success.

Name: Mitroff Consulting & Associates
Description:
Mitroff Consulting & Associates is a highly recognized, retained executive search and recruiting firm with a proven ability to identify and deliver superior leaders across a variety of industries.

The absence of a narrow industry focus allows us to have a broad network of prospective candidates. Our clients reap the benefits of our “boutique firm” status because we minimize blockage issues which tend to challenge single industry retained search firms. Since our work spans over many industries, fewer companies are off limits to us.
 
Our clients receive better service resulting from these practices and ethics. Mitroff Consulting & Associates believes it is unethical to recruit from prior clients. Our valued clients are off limits for any current or future executive searches unless the client and the candidate openly express the desire to make a change. Rest assured your company, nor any of its subsidiaries or divisions, will be approached by Mitroff Consulting & Associates attempting to pull from your ranks. 
 
Our clients, both established and emerging companies, share our passion for excellence in the staffing of mid-level through executive officer needs. Our clients deserve the highest levels of communications and follow-up, which we provide via our accessibility, visibility, and timely interaction with all members of the executive search process.
 
Your management team, in conjunction with our collegial style, improve the efficiency and effectiveness in gaining the attention of industry-leading candidates. Traditional recruiting efforts typically are unable to approach or recruit these industry leading candidates because of potential off-limit conflicts.
