Name: Center for Financial Recruiting
Description:
The Center for Financial Recruiting works with manufacturers and finance and accounting professionals. Since 1995, we have partnered with our client companies to solve hiring challenges in 23 states and Mexico. At CFR, relationships and client service matter. We leverage our manufacturing experience to execute targeted talent searches that deliver spot-on candidates who add value to an organization.

If you are an Employer:

Are you frustrated by the volumes of replies to your ads that miss the mark? Tired of recruiters who don’t understand your industry and specific needs?

•	We probe and listen as you outline your company culture, hiring preferences and specific challenges that a new hire will face.
•	We develop a recruiting plan that is tailored to your company. We identify and evaluate exceptional talent that fits your needs, rather than submit resumes that contain keywords or titles that seem to fit a job description.
•	We facilitate the interviewing process and, as consultants with years of experience, provide pertinent feedback to improve your ability to attract top talent.
•	We mediate the sensitive negotiating phase of talent acquisition. We only present candidates whose salary expectations and career goals are in line with your hiring target. Our goal is No Surprises.

If you are a Job Seeker:

Have you worked with recruiters who “disappear” after presenting an opportunity or scheduling an interview? At CFR we believe that open, honest and timely communication is the foundation for mutually beneficial relationships.

•	We listen as you describe your experience, accomplishments and career dreams. We only present opportunities that fit your professional goals and are a step forward in your career progression.
•	We provide detailed information on our client company’s career opportunity, culture and background of the key hiring executives. We understand that jobs are much more than a description on a piece of paper.
•	We prepare you for interviews and help formulate a successful presentation strategy. We eliminate surprises on interview day.
•	We handle salary negotiations and mediate issues throughout this sensitive time. Our goal is an offer that meets or exceeds your expectations, yet provides future salary growth.

Rinalytics is a talent search firm exclusively focused on hiring AI, Data and Analytics executive talent across sectors, deeply rooted in India with a growing presence across North America.

In early 2025, Rinalytics launched it's North American venture, "Rinalytics AI Talent - North America", aiming to replicate its success in India across the United States (U.S), Canada, Mexico, Central America and Caribbean islands.

For over 13 years, Rinalytics has been helping clients hire trailblazers in AI, Data, and Analytics. We have a deep understanding of market trends, an extensive network of data experts and executive leaders, and a keen awareness of the skills and expertise required for success in the evolving AI landscape. Our mission is to partner with clients to identify and onboard visionary leaders who bring the perfect blend of experience and expertise.  

With a strong track record of navigating industry shifts, we consistently deliver quality outcomes. Our depth of expertise, thought leadership, and specialized approach ensure an exceptional client experience.

Name: Kirsch Talents
Description:
Regionale Personalberatung für Executive Search in Hightech und Industrie. 
Persönlich. Diskret. Effizient.

KIRSCH TALENTS unterstützt insbesondere mittelständische Industrie- und Hightech-Unternehmen bei der direkten und nachhaltigen Besetzung von Schlüsselpositionen. Der Schwerpunkt liegt ausschließlich auf der Personalvermittlung (Permanent Placement). Kirsch Talens arbeitet bewusst ausschließlich im Ostalbkreis und angrenzend – unser regionales Markt-, Unternehmens- und Kandidatenwissen ist dabei ein klarer Vorteil für passgenaue und nachhaltige Besetzungen.

Wir arbeiten dort, wo klassische Recruiting-Ansätze nicht mehr greifen: Bei passiven Kandidatinnen und Kandidaten, anspruchsvollen Spezialistenrollen und Führungspositionen. 

Unsere Expertise liegt in den Bereichen: Finance (Accounting & Controlling), HR, Production, Engineering & Manufacturing sowie PMO bis auf Management-Ebene. 

Der Fokus liegt auf Industrie- und technologiegetriebenen Umfeldern wie 
Mechanical- & Manufacturing Engineering, Automotive, Semiconductor, Defence, Wood & dem Baugewerbe und angrenzenden Bereichen.

Was uns von klassischen Personalvermittlern unterscheidet, ist unser Boutique-Ansatz:

Wofür wir stehen:
• Exklusive Personalvermittlung (Permanent Placement)
• Executive Search & strukturierte Direktansprache
• Active Sourcing für Fach- & Führungspositionen
• Diskrete Besetzung sensibler Schlüsselrollen

Mehrwert für Unternehmen:
• Zugang zu qualifizierten, wechselbereiten passiven Kandidaten
• Zeitersparnis durch klare Prozesse und Vorselektion
• Nachhaltige Besetzungen statt kurzfristiger Lösungen
• Authentische und professionelle Arbeitgeberrepräsentation am Markt

Unsere Arbeitsweise ist geprägt von Vertrauen, Diskretion und Effizienz. Wir arbeiten partnerschaftlich, verbindlich und mit einem klaren Qualitätsanspruch – auf Augenhöhe mit Unternehmen und Kandidaten.

By understanding the unique challenges and opportunities of emerging businesses, we provide tailored search solutions that empower companies to scale with confidence. At Connectivity, we don’t just fill roles—we build leadership teams that drive lasting success.

Name: Henry James Search
Description:
Introducing Henry James - Why us?

Best in class attraction materials: Because the best people typically aren’t looking for a move. No hit and hope advertising here.

Unique HJ Assessment: Behavioural fit not just functional. We get you aligned and define “what success looks like” before we get started.

Data driven:  A transparent and data rich process helps you make fully informed decisions.

Partner led: Your search is delivered by a partner –  not pitched and then delegated to someone more junior.

Time saved: Meet 4-6 people that you really want to hire whilst doing what you do best in the meantime.

Peace of mind:  you will be sure that you have hired the best person you possibly could and that is a great feeling!

Real Estate Specialists

We live and breathe all things Real Estate: Matching great humans with challenger brands.

C-Suite & Board appointments

Development

From C-Suite Executives to Entry-Level Hires, talent plays a pivotal role in your company’s success. We position talent placement as an essential puzzle piece for your organization, aiming for cohesion rather than force-fitting.

Contact us today [845-798-2000] to begin working with one of our awesome team members to search for the essential piece that is a cohesive fit for your organization. Managing Partner

Name: TTS Search
Description:
Our team at TTS is highly qualified and knowledgeable with over a decade of experience in finance and accounting search. We specialize in finance & accounting placements on a contingent and retained basis. 

Our commitment to customer service is second to none, whether you are a client or a candidate. We understand that it is not only skillset and past experiences that determines long-term success in each hire. We conduct a thorough survey to better understand the culture and leadership style of each hiring manager and candidate to ensure a great match.

Our techniques and vetting process were acquired through our vast experience in the retained search industry. This is where our founders perfected the art of the interview. We spend the time up front to make sure each candidate has the skills needed to hit the ground running.

TTS Search provides a variety senior level  searches ranging from CFO, CAO, VP of Finance, Controller, Accounting Manager, Financial Reporting, FP&A, Treasury, Internal Audit, External Audit, IT Audit, Tax (Federal, SALT, International), to ERP Implementation.

At TTS, your satisfaction is our number one priority. We are committed to helping you build a superior leadership team that will create sustainable competitive advantages for your organization.

Name: Abaco International Partners
Description: ABACO International Partners was founded in 2008 and is a retained executive search firm specializing in upper management, leadership, C-Suite and Board of Director positions for companies in the Manufacturing, Technology, Energy, EPC, CPG and Industrial Process industries. Our clients are headquartered across the US and we also support international companies with HQ outside the US who are growing and expanding their operations in the US. Our search projects are conducted by our experienced partner level professionals. We take special care to ensure our candidates fit with our client's culture by applying behavioral science methods and we provide developmental guidelines based on the Hogan Leadership Assessment to assist with onboarding the new executive after the search. We are advance certified in Hogan Leadership Assessments and apply the Hogan Methodology to our executive search and board process. We are passionate about educating executive professionals who are interested in serving on public or private Boards of Directors and offer educational workshops to help individuals prepare everything they need to serve on their first public or private board. Please contact us for more information. We'd love to be of service!

Name: MuraTalent SA

Our Mission: Precision, Speed, and Sustainability

Understanding that trust is the cornerstone of any meaningful engagement, we dedicate ourselves to fostering enduring partnerships with our clients. It's more than just business; it's about creating a foundation of mutual respect and understanding.

At MuraTalent SA, we're more than a consulting agency—we're your trusted partner in building the future.

Te invitamos a considerar trabajar con nosotros en las siguientes situaciones:

Cuando existen posibilidades de mejora en tu empresa.

 Cuando hay un problema que resolver de manera eficiente y efectiva.

Durante el lanzamiento de un nuevo proyecto que requiere una gestión experta.

Al realizar cambios significativos en tu empresa que necesitan una planificación cuidadosa.

Para potenciar un área específica que requiere experiencia especializada.

Cuando necesitas organizar algún aspecto concreto de tu empresa
de manera más efectiva.

En HAZME estamos comprometidos en ofrecer resultados tangibles y duraderos. 

Nuestra reputación se basa en la satisfacción de nuestros clientes y en nuestro historial de éxitos comprobados. Permítenos ser tu socio estratégico en la búsqueda del éxito empresarial.

Name: LE MENTORIUM
Description:
RH Afrique est une agence de recrutement spécialisée dans la recherche de stages et d'emplois en Afrique. Nous aidons les étudiants et les jeunes diplômés à trouver des opportunités de carrière dans des domaines variés, en mettant l'accent sur les emplois bien rémunérés. Nous travaillons également avec des employeurs potentiels pour les aider à trouver des candidats qualifiés pour leurs offres de stage et d'emploi.
Notre agence est composée d'une équipe de professionnels expérimentés en recrutement et en gestion de carrière. Nous sommes passionnés par notre travail et nous nous engageons à aider nos clients à atteindre leurs objectifs professionnels. Nous sommes spécialisés dans la recherche d'offres de scène et d'emploi dans des lieux exceptionnels en Afrique, offrant ainsi des opportunités uniques à nos clients.
Chez RH Afrique, nous sommes convaincus que la recherche d'un stage ou d'un emploi ne doit pas être une tâche difficile et stressante. Nous nous engageons à offrir un service personnalisé et de qualité à nos clients, en les aidant à trouver des offres correspondantes à leurs besoins et à leurs compétences. Nous sommes également engagés à protéger la confidentialité des données personnelles de nos clients et à respecter les normes de sécurité web.
En sélectionnant RH Afrique, vous choisissez un partenaire de confiance pour votre recherche de stage ou d'emploi en Afrique. Nous sommes là pour vous aider à trouver votre place sur le marché de l'emploi africain et à atteindre vos objectifs professionnels.

Name: JAHWEH EXECUTIVE SEARCH

Que tal tomarmos um café e falarmos melhor?

Name: Pinoy Leader
Description:
Pinoy Leader is the first Talent Partner of its kind, dedicated to sourcing, hiring, and developing exceptional Filipino talent for leadership roles. We believe in Nurturing Talent and Placing Leaders.

At Pinoy Leader, we go beyond traditional recruitment. We offer a holistic approach that includes:

* Talent Identification: Sourcing top Filipino talent across various industries.

* Leadership Development: Providing customized coaching and one-on-one interactions with Senior Industry Leaders.

* Strategic Placement: Matching exceptional candidates with the right organizations.

Combining our deep understanding of the Filipino market with a commitment to excellence, we help organizations build high-performing teams and empower Filipino leaders to reach their full potential.

Let’s ‘Re-define the ratio’ of Filipino's in leadership roles together!

Name: Accelerated Search Partners, Inc.
Description: We're a Cincinnati OH based executive search firm consistently recognized as one of the top 10 executive search firms in the greater Cincinnati area by the Cincinnati Business Courier

Name: Schamberger & Partners s.r.o.
Description: We commence each search by cultivating an in-depth comprehension of the prerequisites, experience, and competencies essential for achieving success. We invest the effort to gain insight into your company, workplace dynamics, operational methods,  enabling us to identify candidates poised for excellence within your organization.

Name: Global Executive Connections
Description:
Finding the right executive talent is critical to your company's success. That's why we offer unique executive search and recruitment services that combine the attention of an in-house team, the expertise of an agency, and the affordability of freelancers.

At Global Executive Connections, we specialize in connecting top-tier sales talent with companies eager to thrive and expand. Our mission is to help businesses achieve remarkable growth by identifying, attracting, and placing sales professionals who are not only exceptional at what they do but are also the perfect cultural fit for your organization.

What sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to understanding your unique business goals and the specific sales roles you need to fill. We're not just a recruitment agency; we're your strategic partner in building high-performing sales teams that drive revenue and business success.

Our experienced team of recruitment experts meticulously handpick candidates who possess the skills, experience, and passion needed to exceed sales targets and propel your company forward. We also prioritize candidates who exhibit adaptability, resilience, and growth mindset, ensuring they can evolve with your company's changing needs.

Whether you're a startup looking to establish your sales force, a growing business seeking to expand your sales team, or an established company in need of fresh sales talent, Global Executive Connections is here to empower your growth journey. We provide you with a steady stream of potential hires who can help you drive revenue, boost market share, and outperform your competition.

Partner with Global Executive Connections and unlock the potential for unprecedented growth. Let's connect you with sales professionals who will not only meet your immediate needs but will also become valuable assets in your ongoing journey to success. Together, we'll create a sales force that accelerates your business to new heights.
Employment Agency License No.: 23S1937

Name: P5 Consulting Services, LLC
Description:
P5 Consulting Services, LLC was founded in 2004 by Don and Marylou Pritchard, bringing together a deep passion for Agriculture and Civil Engineering/Construction Management with decades of practical experience.What began as a niche recruitment service has since grown into a trusted resource for staffing, executive search, and innovative retention solutions across industries. Our mission has always been simple: Connect the right people with the right opportunities while ensuring long-term success. 
     Grounded in the solid work ethic instilled since childhood, Don and Marylou have built P5 with a reputation for quality client service, personal attention, and ethical standards. Our approach is grounded in real-world experience and the latest industry knowledge, keeping us at the forefront of staffing needs.

     What Sets P5 Apart From Everyone Else? 
     Both Don and Marylou were raised on family ranching operations. Marylou began working soon after high school in Public Works. This unique upbringing gives them an unparalleled understanding of the agriculture and civil engineering industries. 
     With decades of industry experience behind them, they don't simply understand the needs of the role you're trying to file - they have lived it.
     We welcome all inquiries in confidence - please call or send us an email! 

     P5's Approach
     "We understand that each client is unique. From organizational priorities to company culture, every placement requires a deep understanding of the factors that drive your business. With a wide perspective, deep understanding, and a commitment to personal service, we offer tailored solutions that go beyond the basic checklist."  

     Evidence? 
     Our success is demonstrated by our impressively high rate of repeat business with individuals from 2004 still on our active client list.

Name: Medora Executive Search
Description:
At Medora Executive Search, our mission is to guide business and HR leaders through their most critical executive hiring decisions. We specialize in performing in-depth market analyses to provide leaders with insights into key players and industry trends, leading to immediate hires or proactive pipelining for external succession plans. By delivering a comprehensive view of the talent landscape, along with essential data on role positioning, candidate expectations, and the qualifications that distinguish top candidates, we empower business leaders to make swift, informed decisions.

Business-minded, strategic research fuels the strength of a candidate pipeline. We believe the quality of that research is rooted in a deep understanding of organizational design and guided by business financials. This philosophy, combined with our expertise in global candidate sourcing, ensures that we engage the best suited candidates for our clients - those with the right blend of functional experience as well as the appropriate scale and scope of responsibility to excel within unique and complex business environments.

Name: Power Executive People
Description:
Power Executive People is a boutique executive search firm.  We have a successfully tested mechanism, 'the Motivation and Values Approach' which allows us to find your business a leader who can create sustainable success.

We specialise in Executive and C-Suite leadership roles in niche industries and for medium sized enterprise.

Name: Leonard Partners
Description:
Fondé par des dirigeants pour les dirigeants, Leonard Partners est un cabinet de recrutement de cadres de haut niveau, pour les secteurs d’activité de l’industrie, des services, du conseil et de la tech. 
Notre méthode de recherche s’appuie notamment sur notre communauté unique de cadres executive : le Club Leonard.
Bureaux : Lyon, Paris, Annecy.
Fonctions : CEO, COO, CPO, CTO, et toutes fonctions opérations et gouvernance, pour ETI, Groupes et PME.

Name: Ormond James
Description:
Ormond James, founded by Aaron Mathieson, is a legal and executive search firm specialising in senior lawyer and partner level search for leading law firms. They also provide senior in-house counsel and executive search services for corporations and government departments. 

Ormond James is committed to providing clients and talent with an experience that is built on relationships and transparency, tailoring each search process to the aspirations of candidates and the unique requirements of their clients.

With an extensive track record in the corporate and private practice markets, Ormond James have built extensive client relationships with partners and key stakeholders globally. Their long-standing relationships with executive and lawyer candidates, across diverse practice areas and industry, enable them to facilitate introductions with talent that may not be accessible elsewhere.

Name: Barker Owen
Description:
We’ve built Executive Search capability for world-class companies, partnering highly ambitious leaders. Barker Owen is a boutique search firm inspired by that experience, operating as a trusted extension to modern internal hiring teams - delivering searches cross-functionally and globally.

We know clients require flexible and broader partnering they can rely on. We focus on developing fewer, but deeper partnerships that leverage our full expertise as former Talent leaders too.

Name: FlowerBridge
Description:
Chez FlowerBridge, nous sommes spécialisés dans le recrutement par approche directe de profils expérimentés, couvrant tous les métiers et secteurs. 

Notre mission est d'assurer une parfaite adéquation entre les compétences des candidats et les besoins des entreprises, d’un point de vue non seulement technique mais aussi (et presque surtout) culturel, favorisant ainsi une meilleure intégration au sein des équipes et contribuant à la réussite globale de l’entreprise. 

Nous aidons les candidats à découvrir de nouvelles opportunités professionnelles, leur permettant ainsi de progresser et de s'ouvrir à de nouveaux horizons. Pour cela, nous menons des entretiens approfondis avec les parties prenantes de l’entreprise afin de comprendre son organisation et sa stratégie, aussi bien sur les plans macro que micro, et d'analyser l'environnement économique et culturel. 

Notre cabinet accompagne les entreprises tout au long de leurs processus de recrutement, en apportant notre expertise méthodologique et notre connaissance du marché. Nous évaluons non seulement les compétences techniques des candidats, mais aussi leurs qualités comportementales et leur potentiel de développement. 

Chaque candidat.e bénéficie d'un accompagnement personnalisé durant tout le processus : préparation aux entretiens, débriefings, écoute et conseils, et négociation. 

 Contact : emaline.bareau@flowerbridge.fr

Name: CONREC SEARCH GROUP
Description: Executive Search services for the built environment and industrial sectors. Operating globally supporting private equity, public, private and family owned enterprises. Founder has 23+ years' proven experience in helping company's secure impactful leadership talent.

Name: Legacy Staffing and Consulting Group
Description:
Legacy Staffing and Consulting Group is here to be an industry disrupter. With us, you have access to a variety of business services in one location. We provide recruitment, consulting and coaching services to meet a variety of business needs. What's even better is that we customize all services to the specific needs of our clients so you only pay for what you need and nothing else. Here are the services we currently provide:

Recruiting/Talent Acquisition
Business Consulting
Business Analytics
Process Improvement
Sales Training/Consulting (For Teams)
Sales Coaching (For Individuals)
Leadership Training

In addition to providing these services, we are also partnered with experts from other industries and specialties. We will happily guide potential clients to the experts that will help them reach their goals. Our mission is to help others succeed. If you want to take your business to the next level, reach out to us.

Name: TCHG Executive Search
Description:
TCHG Executive Search is committed to offering a distinctive and innovative method for Talent Acquisition, Special Project Staffing, and Leadership Consulting, all centered around Transformative Leadership. This means cultivating leaders who inspire their teams, drive change, and create a lasting impact on their organizations. 

We've created and perfected a candidate selection process that prioritizes the well-being of both the candidates and clients. Our approach involves forming solid partnerships with client companies, achieved by gaining a deep understanding of their requirements, job prerequisites, and performance expectations. Our team frequently engages with top-tier executives, from Fortune 100 giants to small private businesses. This collaboration aims to create tailored recommendations that address specific client needs or business challenges.

Name: Velocity Talent Group
Description: Velocity Talent Group is a top staffing agency and executive search firm. We are uniquely skilled in head hunting your next great hires.  Your team can keep processing applicants and referrals, we will go find the best talent and bring them to you.  We are also going to coach your interview team on best practices and bring you market data.

Name: Nomos Recruitment Solutions
Description:
Le cabinet Nomos propose des solutions sur mesure pour vous aider à trouver les meilleurs candidats.

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour tout projet de collaboration.

Name: Lauraniel  | Your partner for accelerating business growth
Description:
At Lauraniel Inc., we believe growth begins with the right people.
As a specialized executive search and talent acquisition firm, we partner with growth-driven companies to identify, attract, and secure the leadership talent that powers transformation.
Our clients rely on us not just to fill roles, but to help them choose and execute the right talent acquisition strategy for their unique business needs.

We deliver four complementary talent strategies designed to accelerate organizational success:
1. Executive Search: Targeted recruitment for leadership roles critical to executing company strategy.
2. Team Builds: Deployment of specialized, high-performing teams that add capability and momentum.
3. Acquisition Introductions: Strategic connections that enable companies to enter new markets or scale rapidly through acquisitions.
4. Interim Placements: Experienced leaders who bridge gaps, stabilize operations, and drive results during key transitions.

Our mission is simple: to empower companies with the talent, teams, and partnerships that accelerate business growth.

Lauraniel Inc. — accelerating your business growth.

Name: Fruition Talent Group
Description: Fruition Talent Group is a people business. We're an international multifunctional, executive search firm who partner with start-up, mid-cap and enterprise organisations as well as their investors. We unearth  outperforming, diverse  talent to enable start-up or mature businesses to achieve their core growth aspirations.

Name: Sport Executive
Description:
Sport Executive is a leading executive search and coaching organisation with decades of experience in the Sports industry, at an Olympian level, board level and corporate level. Our ontological coaching and multitude of accreditations and psychometric tools are what sets us apart.

This deep industry insight has led to the creation of the Athlete's Edge candidate assessment methodology, which ensures best fit top talent and a mitigation of bias. 

We exist to drive organisational performance for leading sports organisations.

Name: The Executive Edge, Inc.
Description:
Welcome to The Executive Edge, Inc.!

At The Executive Edge, Inc. – TEEI – we’ve been in the Retained Executive Search business for more than 25 years. Formerly the Philippine Partnership of Amrop Global, we are a team of vastly-experienced Consultants & Research Specialists, led by our Founding Partners.

TEEI continues to handle every Executive Search assignment with the same values that have founded our success: driven by results and client satisfaction, guided by a Code of Ethics, all based on the highest quality work, strict confidentiality and the utmost professionalism.

We’re immensely proud that our proprietary comprehensive search processes have been responsible for our industry leading 90%+ Retained Business Rate.

Clients include MNCs, local conglomerates, SMEs and start-ups. Through our experience interacting with executives and successful partnerships with diverse clientele, we have built an unmatched network of executive talent and a robust bank of executive resources.

We are loyal business partners committed to over-delivering for clients and protecting interests of all stakeholders, so we’re thrilled to connect with you and look forward to helping you to further business success.

Name: General Equities
Description: General Equities is a leading executive firm, offering expertise in executive search and talent-focused consulting solutions. Leveraging our global network, we evaluate, identify, and execute transformative strategies to drive positive change for businesses. Trusted by Fortune companies across various industries, we utilize data-driven AI methodologies to recruit elite leaders, foster diversity, and elevate team performance.

Description: Amaroc Inc. is a specialized search and consulting firm dedicated to meeting the unique requirements of construction enterprises and diverse sectors within the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) industry. Our clientele includes industry leaders specializing in High-Tech Manufacturing, Mission-Critical, Water/Wastewater, Heavy Highway, Infrastructure, Healthcare, Utilities, and Renewable Energy Projects. Our services include Retained Search, Contingent Search and Talent Acquisition Consulting.

Name: XTALENT
Description:
We are a high-touch executive search and leadership advisory firm with a mission to connect and develop entrepreneurial leaders who drive transformation and create sustainable impact and growth.

We excel at connecting purpose-driven, global-minded, emerging leaders, executive-level and board-ready talent with forward-thinking organizations.

Additionally, we facilitate the expansion of Eastern European companies into international markets by connecting them with strategic talent, partners, clients, and investors. 

At the same time, we support the repatriation of Eastern European professionals from the diaspora by offering them meaningful opportunities at home.

We believe purpose is the best indicator of future behavior, performance, and fit, serving as the cornerstone of exceptional leadership and organizational success.

Rather than simply matching a profile with a job description, we focus on aligning the individual purpose with the purpose of the role/organization.

Name: Action Black
Description:
Action Transportes é sinônimo de um alto padrão de atendimento. É uma empresa preocupada 24 horas em atender bem seus clientes. Um atendimento voltado ao público corporativo: executivos, empresas e multinacionais seja em transportes, viagens, traslados ou receptivos, tendo a pontualidade sempre presente.
Formada por uma excelente equipe totalmente profissional e qualificada que oferece toda atenção, segurança e conforto, tudo isso com atendimento bilíngüe sem nenhum custo adicional.


Action Transportes é uma empresa que supera expectativas através de um atendimento personalizado e ágil, onde toda a atenção está voltada em proporcionar aos seus clientes satisfação e eficiência nos serviços prestados.

Name: Bon Talent Executive - Cabinet de conseil Executive Search
Description:
Bon Talent Executive est un cabinet de conseil en recrutement de dirigeants (Executive Search) dédié aux entreprises qui veulent conjuguer performance, culture et impact.

Notre conviction : recruter un dirigeant ne s’improvise pas, c’est une décision stratégique où l’erreur coûte cher.

Nous intervenons avec une méthodologie rigoureuse et une compréhension fine de vos enjeux business pour identifier le leader qui fera la différence.

Vous bénéficiez d’un interlocuteur unique, garant d’un accompagnement de proximité et d’une mission menée de bout en bout.

Notre promesse : des shortlists courtes, pertinentes et équilibrées, pensées pour accélérer votre décision et maximiser la réussite à long terme.

Nos clients : PME, ETI, filiales de groupes et fonds (portefeuilles PE) en phase de structuration, croissance ou transformation. Notre posture : exigeante, claire et engagée — pas de « push CV », mais des solutions de leadership adaptées à votre réalité terrain.

→ Échangeons sur vos enjeux stratégiques et trouvons ensemble le leader qui transformera votre organisation : maxime@bontalent-executive.fr

Name: Vose Executive Search
Description:
Vose Executive Search is a specialist executive search firm focused on senior-level recruitment within the consumer sector. We work with ambitious brands across the UK, Europe, and the United States to build leadership teams that drive real transformation and long-term growth.

Our expertise spans fast-moving consumer goods, consumer packaged goods, quick service restaurants, retail, and e-commerce. We partner closely with our clients to understand their business challenges, culture, and ambitions, delivering exceptional candidates who are ready to lead in dynamic and competitive environments.

As a boutique search firm, we offer a high-touch, insight-led approach that combines deep industry knowledge with a strong network of top-tier talent. Our work includes permanent executive search, talent benchmarking, and leadership advisory, all tailored to meet the evolving needs of our clients.

With decades of experience behind us, we pride ourselves on delivering results with integrity, precision, and pace. Our goal is simple: to connect great businesses with the leaders who will shape their future.

For those seeking a true partner in executive recruitment, Vose Executive Search brings the expertise, commitment, and strategic vision to make a lasting impact.

Name: CAP GPS
Description:
CAP GPS est une société spécialisée dans l’ingénierie des ressources humaines, dédiée à l’accompagnement des entreprises dans la gestion de leurs talents et la transformation de leurs organisations. Grâce à une approche méthodologique innovante et sur mesure, nous offrons des solutions adaptées aux enjeux spécifiques de chaque entreprise, pour optimiser la performance individuelle et collective.

Nous intervenons dans des domaines variés tels que le recrutement, la mobilité professionnelle, l’accompagnement des talents, la gestion de la carrière et la transformation RH. Notre objectif est de permettre aux organisations d’atteindre leurs ambitions grâce à une meilleure gestion de leur capital humain.

Nos expertises :
- Recrutement et développement des talents : Trouver les bonnes personnes pour les bonnes missions, avec une approche humaine et personnalisée.
- Gestion de la mobilité professionnelle : Accompagner les collaborateurs dans leurs parcours professionnels, en favorisant l'évolution interne et la mobilité.
- Transformation et stratégie RH : Aider les entreprises à repenser et à renforcer leur stratégie RH pour répondre aux évolutions du marché du travail.
- Formation et développement des compétences : Concevoir des parcours de formation sur mesure pour développer les compétences clés de vos équipes.

Nos consultants et partenaires, mettent à votre disposition leur savoir-faire et leur compréhension des enjeux sociaux et économiques pour vous accompagner dans la construction d’un avenir professionnel pérenne et performant.

Pourquoi choisir CAP GPS ?
- Une approche humaine et personnalisée de l’accompagnement RH
- Une expertise reconnue dans la gestion des talents et la transformation des organisations
- Des solutions innovantes pour répondre aux défis du marché du travail

Rejoignez CAP GPS et développez le potentiel humain de votre entreprise !

Name: ND Executive Search
Description:
ND Executive Search was formed when a group of experienced search professionals came together to revolutionize how leaders are discovered, prioritizing diversity and inclusion in talent acquisition. By marrying our passion for the social sector with our expertise in Executive Talent Acquisition, we are able to partner directly with non-profit organizations, charitable foundations, socially responsible businesses, and social enterprises to ensure they have the talent they need to thrive.

We are proud to be a certified minority owned and led business. We are deeply committed to diversity and inclusion, we are consistently leading searches with our AI technology-based tools, and we amplify our search by utilizing our vast cross-sector networks. We leverage decades of experience brought by our advisory board mentors to cater to the unique needs of our clients. 

Our team brings experience leading successful searches for high-performing executives. We have developed a deep functional knowledge and a thorough understanding of the social sector, board service, professional experience and civic engagements. Through intentional focus and passion for mission-driven organizations, we are energized and empowered to develop a custom search and assessment program for each client. We find you leaders who best align with your values, and fit your organization’s unique needs.

We believe in breaking the status quo of Executive Search with our unbiased approach - reach out now and let our results speak for us!

Name: LARA - Laboratorio di Analisi e Ricerche Ambientali
Description: Il Laboratorio di Analisi e Ricerche Ambientali LARA dell'Università degli Studi di Napoli Federico II svolge importanti, e sempre più attuali, ricerche nell'ambito della mitigazione dei fenomeni di inquinamento ambientale. Nello specifico, si occupa del trattamento di acque, della gestione di rifiuti solidi urbani, della bonifica di siti contaminati, del recupero di energia da prodotti di scarto e della mitigazione dei cambiamenti climatici tramite processi di cattura e stoccaggio della CO2.

Description:
We're not your average search firm. We're your trusted partner, working closely with you to understand your unique needs and goals. We're all about creating a tailored experience that leads to successful placements. At TLNT8GNT we uphold the highest standards in executive search, connecting infinite international talent with infinite opportunities and your unique needs. 
Our innovative 360-cycle recruiting approach ensures a personalized and comprehensive recruitment process that's tailored just for you. We believe in the power of international infinity talents which means that the skills we’re looking for are cross borders, creative changemakers with an infinite mindset. Energy, drive, persistence, judgment, and self-insight are examples of traits we look for in all our assignments. We're experts at identifying and harnessing those strengths. It's all about finding the perfect fit between candidates and positions based on their killer power skills. 

We are committed to a relentless effort to increase the diversity and inclusive culture of boardrooms and leadership teams. As our mission, it gets us up in the morning and drives us through the day. At TLNT8GNT, we believe in making a positive impact on society, and it's at the core of everything we do. We strive to create meaningful change and contribute to a better future.

Experience the difference – where creativity, expertise, and social responsibility converge. It's time to rock your career like never before. Let's do this! Join us as we shape the industry, today and tomorrow. Join us as we shape tomorrow while helping your business grow with the right infinity talents!

Name: Confidence Executive Search
Description:
Confidence Executive Search, basé à Paris et présent à l’international, est un cabinet de conseil spécialisé dans la recherche de Dirigeants et d’Experts de haut niveau.

Son intervention porte sur le recrutement de Dirigeants : postes de CEO, DG, membres de Comex/Codir et niveaux N‑1 Comex/Codir ainsi que des Membres de Conseil d’Administration.

Nos interventions s’adressent aux grands groupes internationaux, aux grands groupes familiaux, aux sociétés cotées du CAC 40, du SBF 120 ainsi qu’aux ETI en forte croissance ou en pleine transformation, acteurs clés de l’économie et de l’innovation. Dans une relation de partenariat et de confiance, nous les accompagnons dans leurs enjeux stratégiques de leadership et de gouvernance. 

Animé par une véritable dynamique entrepreneuriale et une forte capacité d’innovation, nous proposons des approches sur mesure et de haut niveau, conçues pour générer un impact durable dans un environnement économique en constante évolution.

Name: Impactful Search
Description:
Impactful Search is the preferred executive search partner and thought leader for identifying board members, c-suite, and executive talent for the consumer economy. 

Impactful Search provides a world-class consultative and immersive experience for investors and companies facing a critical business inflection point such as scale, transformation, or sale.

BRANDS - RETAIL - MANUFACTURING - DISTRIBUTION - CONSUMER TECH - PROFESSIONAL SERVICES  - MARKETPLACE &  PLATFORMS

Food, beverage, beauty, wellness, personal care, pet, home, lifestyle, luxury goods, fashion, consumer technology, tech, retail. 

Impactful Search is part of the @ForceBrands family, powering the most innovative consumer brands through strategic hiring since 2007.

Name: Renato T. Amador - Technology, Social Impact, Nonprofit Recruiter
Description:
Renato’s executive search practice sits at the intersection of social impact and technology. Based in Washington, DC and Chicago, he recruits functional, technical and commercial leadership for mission-driven organizations and emerging technology companies.

Clients value Renato’s 20-plus years in retained search and his nuanced approach to identifying and assessing leaders with hybrid experience. Renato has been successful in recruiting candidates with a blend of both corporate and nonprofit experience. His placements are skilled in business relationships and stakeholder management.

Renato identifies talent with commercial, scientific, technical, and subject matter expertise. He recruits for C-Suite, capacity building, go-to-market, operations, HR, and IT leadership roles. Renato works with cultural, educational, environmental, healthcare, and social services institutions seeking to leverage technology. He also partners with companies in the social impact and tech-for-good sector who employ innovations in XaaS, connectivity, data & analytics, digital transformation, and robotics.

Renato holds a Master of International Affairs degree from Columbia University and a Bachelor of Arts in Political Science from the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign.

At BGG Enterprises, we specialize in connecting diverse talent with top-tier organizations. Our mission is to drive equity and inclusion in the workforce by providing comprehensive staffing solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients.

Connect with us to learn more about how we can support your organization’s growth and success.

About Starect Services:
Empowering Talent, Elevating 
Starect Services is a full‐spectrum people solutions firm, specializing in transforming talent strategies to power business success. We partner with organizations across industries to find, develop, and transition talent—helping them build stronger teams, drive growth, and adapt to change.

What We Do
We offer end-to-end human capital services, including:
Recruitment, Talent Acquisition & Executive Search
Sourcing and hiring the right people for roles across levels—entry, mid, senior, leadership.
Executive search for strategic leadership positions, ensuring cultural fit, skills, network, and market knowledge.
Building employer branding, leveraging networks, and using modern sourcing methods for efficiency and quality.

Learning & Development / Training Programs:
Designing and delivering customized training programs to upskill employees: leadership development, technical skills, soft skills, onboarding, etc.

Management Internships:
Structured internship programs to bring in fresh talent.
Mentoring, performance tracking, exposure to real-world projects.
Internship → potential full employment pipeline.

Our Mission & Values
Mission: To enable individuals and organizations to realize their full potential through strategic talent solutions, continuous learning, and empathetic transitions.
Core Values:
Integrity – Transparent, honest, ethical dealings with both clients and candidates.
Excellence – Strive for high quality in every placement, program, and interaction.
Empathy – Understanding people’s journeys (candidates, employees, clients) and offering support.
Innovation – Use new tools, data, feedback to improve how we source, teach, and transition.
Partnership – We see ourselves as partners, not vendors: collaborating closely with clients & candidates.

Focus on Long‐Term Impact – We care about success beyond the hiring moment—how people grow, adapt, deliver, and contribute.

Name: NL SYNERGIES
Description:
Nous sommes plus qu’un recruteur : un partenaire stratégique des dirigeants, des DRH et des DAF, engagé à sécuriser les recrutements sensibles qui façonnent la performance et la pérennité des organisations.

 Notre Mission
Être aux côtés des entreprises pour transformer leurs enjeux RH en leviers de croissance durable.

Nous apportons des solutions de recrutement concrètes et sur-mesure, permettant aux dirigeants de se concentrer sur leur développement, tout en s’assurant de disposer des bons talents, aux bons postes, au bon moment.

Notre ambition : attirer, sélectionner et fidéliser les profils à haut potentiel, pour créer de la valeur, renforcer la compétitivité et construire avec nos clients un avenir solide et ambitieux.

 Vos Préoccupations
 6 dirigeants sur 10 considèrent que la pénurie de talents constitue leur premier frein au développement.

Recruter dans les fonctions Finance, Gestion, Audit ou RH, c’est souvent :

Faire face à un marché tendu et hautement concurrentiel.

Lutter contre le manque de visibilité de son entreprise auprès des candidats.

Gérer la pression du time-to-hire face à des besoins critiques.

Anticiper les enjeux de fidélisation et d’engagement des collaborateurs recrutés.

Sans accompagnement expert, les risques sont réels : erreurs de casting coûteuses, perte de compétitivité, ralentissement stratégique et fragilisation des équipes.

 Nos Solutions
Chez NL Synergies, nous proposons des stratégies de recrutement à forte valeur ajoutée :

Un processus rigoureux et structuré, qui sécurise chaque étape du recrutement.

Une approche directe et confidentielle pour identifier et attirer les meilleurs profils, même passifs.

Des solutions sur-mesure adaptées au contexte : création de poste, remplacement stratégique, renfort temporaire ou accompagnement d’une transformation organisationnelle.

Des résultats mesurables : recrutements durables, intégrations réussies et impact immédiat sur la performance.

We specialize in supporting lower middle-market private equity firms, search funds, and growth equity investors as they scale operations and professionalize in the face of "must-deliver" situations.

In 2024, we launched a pilot program extending our services beyond NSCP’s portfolio. Over the past year, we have completed double digit executive searches, multiple software and systems implementations, and established an overseas staffing operation in Latin American through an exclusive partnership

Given the overwhelmingly positive results, we formally launched Micro-Cap Solutions to provide:

Executive Search – identifying top-tier leadership and key hires
Outsourced Corporate Services – such as operations, finance, and HR solutions
HR Consulting – organizational strategy and talent optimization

Unlike traditional firms, we don’t just find talent—we help businesses build the people, processes, and infrastructure they need for sustainable growth.

Nous sommes deux chasseurs de têtes IT - Erwan & Faustine - qui ont décidé de mutualiser leurs compétences et de travailler en binôme, c'est dans cette optique que Claritee est née.

Nous avons choisi l’intelligence collective comme force de travail afin d'accompagner au mieux nos clients et candidats, c'est pourquoi nous élaborons toutes les stratégies et tous nos postes à deux.

Notre approche repose sur le partage de connaissances et une complémentarité de nos expertises.

Cette synergie nous permet non seulement de combiner nos réseaux et expertises, mais aussi de garantir une rapidité de réponse, une grande disponibilité, et d'avoir deux interlocuteurs fiables dédiés à vos objectifs de recrutements.

Notre spécialisation : la recherche de cadres informatiques depuis plus de 7 ans.
Plus particulièrement : les métiers relatifs à l'Infrastructure ; Data / BI et à la Sécurité / Cybersécurité.
Contrats des profils recrutés : CDI
Nos clients : grands groupes industriels, retail, transport, bancaire, luxe. 

Notre méthode : un travail minutieux et sur-mesure où la qualité est centrale.

Le recrutement dans l'informatique nécessite un travail de recherche et de compréhension de l'écosystème qui compose l'IT et les domaines qui en découlent.

Il est important d'appréhender au mieux l'environnement technique de nos clients,  leurs projets, la culture d'entreprise, les objectifs, les ambitions, les points faibles afin de les connaître en profondeur et d'avoir des informations concrètes.

Une attention particulière aux sens de mots et des technologies ainsi qu'à rétribuer les bonnes informations - pertinentes et concrètes - aux candidats.

La qualité primera toujours sur la quantité pour nous.

Notre objectif est d'être utile et d'aider à la réalisation des objectifs professionnels de chacun.

Afin d'en savoir plus sur notre approche et notre méthode : https://www.claritee.fr/ ou n'hésitez pas à nous contacter directement afin d'échanger.

Name: Blackshaw Partners, LLC
Description:
Who is Blackshaw Partners? 

Simply put, Blackshaw Partners’ mission is to identify, attract, and deliver great leaders that will shape organizations and drive success across any industry. We understand that leadership can make or break a company - and that the right leadership can transform an organization. 

Since 1976, Blackshaw Partners has successfully completed over 2,000 executive search assignments around the globe for blue-chip multinationals, high-performing start-ups, and private equity firms. We also have extensive experience placing cross-cultural candidates in Japan-based and European companies doing business in North America.

Blackshaw Partners is proud to be ethnically diverse and majority female, with fluencies in several languages. Our clients span the globe, and we are experts in building a diverse, dynamic workforce. Headquartered in Frisco, TX, our partner offices are in Tokyo, Hamburg, Atlanta, and Daytona Beach. 

No matter where you’re located or what industry you're in, Blackshaw Partners will uncover future potential and deliver the right leaders to drive you towards your goals. We’re ready to help build your team. Let us find the right executive for you. Visit our website at blackshawparters.com to learn more.

Name: Hjertaker Aaberg AS
Description:
Hjertaker Aaberg AS er et ledende rekrutteringsselskap med dype røtter i norsk næringsliv tilbake til 1980 tallet. Med over 40 års erfaring innen rekruttering til både offentlig og privat sektor, har vi bygget en solid plattform for å hjelpe virksomheter med å tiltrekke seg de beste lederne og spesialistene. Selskapet er grunnlagt av Per Inge Hjertaker, en av Norges mest erfarne rekrutteringsrådgivere, i samarbeid med Trond Sandvik og Andreas Aaberg. Vår visjon er å etablere et sterkt nasjonalt nettverk av konsulenter med lokal tilstedeværelse i Norges største byer. Med kontorer i Oslo, Drammen, Kristiansand, Bergen, Trondheim og Tromsø, er vi strategisk posisjonert for å bistå våre kunder på tvers av sektorer.

Vi er spesialister på rekruttering av toppledere, ledere, mellomledere, fagspesialister og styremedlemmer, og tilbyr skreddersydde løsninger innen leder- og teamutvikling, styre- og lederevaluering i forbindelse med endring/ fusjoner, coaching og krisehåndtering. Vårt mål er å skape varige verdier for våre klienter ved å sikre tilgang til de mest kompetente lederne og spesialistene. 

Vi kombinerer beste praksis fra HR og Management Consulting med en analytisk og strukturert tilnærming. Vår prosjektbaserte metodikk sikrer en effektiv, sikker og presis rekrutteringsprosess, der vi tilpasser oss våre kunders unike behov og forretningsstrategi.

Hjertaker Aaberg er dedikert til å styrke norsk næringsliv gjennom målrettet og strategisk rekruttering. Vi bygger våre tjenester på kjerneverdiene kvalitet, innsikt og tett samarbeid–verdier som sikrer at vi finner de riktige kandidatene som kan drive virksomheter fremover.

"40 år med endring gjennom riktig rekruttering"Vårt slagord reflekterer vår lange erfaring og dype forståelse av markedets utvikling. I løpet av fire tiår har vi ikke bare vært vitne til, men også aktivt bidratt til endringer i norsk næringsliv gjennom presis og strategisk rekruttering. Vi vet at riktig talent på rett sted er en nøkkel til suksess.

Name: LINQE Advisory
Description:
LINQE, established in 2022 by its founder, Mirja Linke, is a pioneering company that specializes in catalyzing, moderating, and managing meaningful connections. The name "LINQE" derives from the founder's birth name and is artfully combined with the letter Q. This letter symbolizes quality, interconnection, and source, making it an apt representation of the company's essence. Furthermore, the rareness of Q in the German language, with a frequency of only 0.02%, underscores the exceptional nature of the connections that LINQE forges.

LINQE's unique value proposition lies in its ability to bring together individuals, resources, and expertise that may not be easily discoverable in isolation, resulting in superior outcomes. The company's approach is both sensitive and pragmatic, emphasizing the importance of understanding the needs, expectations, and interests of all stakeholders in order to discover and unleash the best potential. LINQE creates sustainable solutions that generate meaningful impact and drive progress.

In addition, LINQE is committed to identifying hidden potential in personal careers, thus aligning itself with the broader mission of empowering individuals to achieve their aspirations. With its focus on empathy and pragmatism, LINQE is a forward-thinking enterprise that takes a human-centered approach to creating positive change.

Zelf ben ik dubbel MSc afgestudeerd en heb ik een uitgebreide achtergrond in Private Equity, Investment Banking en Executive Search, waardoor ik uitstekend gepositioneerd ben voor het vinden én het maken van de juiste match. Met JL Executive Search kijk ik niet alleen naar kwalificaties op papier, maar juist ook naar de unieke persoonlijkheden en ambities die een kandidaat met zich meebrengt.

Met diepgaand begrip van de sector en passie voor het samenbrengen van bedrijven en talent, streef ik ernaar om een buitengewone meerwaarde te bieden. Bij JL Executive Search draait het om het creëren en onderhouden van persoonlijke en duurzame samenwerkingen.

Dit alles doe ik met persoonlijke aanpak, op betrouwbare wijze en met volledige toewijding.

Jeroen Looman

Not the “best available.” The best-aligned.
These are the professionals who know how to lead, influence, and execute—and who naturally elevate the people around them. They’re rarely on the market, often highly selective, and not responding to job boards or generic recruiter outreach.

That’s where we come in.

We design every search around your business inflection points. Because this isn’t just about hiring, it’s about what that hire will unlock: stalled revenue, internal alignment, or future scalability.

As a women-owned firm and champion of cognitive diversity and belonging, we approach each engagement through a human-centric, psychologically informed lens. Because great hires aren’t just about qualifications—they’re about connection, purpose, and timing.

We go deep where others stay surface.
Our outreach strategy is designed to spark genuine conversation, earn trust, and attract high-caliber candidates who normally ignore recruiter messages.

When hiring feels high-risk or mission-critical, we make it easier and more effective than going it alone.

Our team has worked with over 6,000 Catholic schools, partnered with more than 90% of dioceses across the country, and supported nearly 100 religious communities and ministries, giving us unmatched insight into the challenges and opportunities facing today’s Catholic institutions.

We specialize in three core service areas:

Talent Solutions – From executive search and talent acquisition to succession planning and providing fractional leadership on demand, we help Catholic institutions identify and engage mission-aligned leaders. Our thorough, insight-driven approach equips hiring agents and committees to make values-based, forward-looking decisions rooted in stewardship.

Leadership & Team Development – We provide coaching, mentoring, and team development programs that strengthen communication, align leadership teams, and cultivate mission-driven cultures built to last. Leadership is more than a role—it’s a discipline of growth and service.

Strategic & Organizational Solutions – We guide Catholic institutions through operational assessments, organizational design, governance support, and strategic planning. Our work fosters alignment, sustainability, and clarity—helping institutions move their mission forward with confidence.

At ACELA, relationships come first. We are trusted partners, not transactional vendors. Our mission is to walk alongside leaders and organizations—not just to solve problems, but to help them thrive.

Formed through legacy. Built for leadership. Propelled by purpose and vision.
We are ACELA Solutions—Advocates for Catholic Education, Leadership, and Advancement.

Mon accompagnement en quatre points :

•  𝗹’𝗲́𝗰𝗼𝘂𝘁𝗲 𝗮𝗽𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗲 : comprendre les attentes, les besoins, les valeurs et projets de mes clients et candidats. Plus nous échangeons sur vos attentes respectives, plus nous créons les conditions pour les faire concorder !

• 𝗹𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗿𝘂𝘁𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝘀𝘂𝗿-𝗺𝗲𝘀𝘂𝗿𝗲 : j'adapte ma démarche à votre besoin spécifique dans une réactivité optimale. Nous définissons ensemble les bases de notre partenariat pour l’inscrire dans la durée et la confiance.

• 𝗹𝗮 𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗲́𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 : je garantis un respect de la confidentialité pour identifier les candidats non visibles sur le marché.

Name: Mindquest Consulting
Description:
At Mindquest Consulting, we are dedicated to identifying and recruiting exceptional leaders who can drive innovation and foster growth. As a premier executive search firm, we offer a comprehensive range of specialized services designed to meet the diverse needs of our clients. These services include retained executive search, where we conduct tailored searches to find top-tier executives for permanent leadership roles, and interim CXO search, providing experienced interim executives to fill critical leadership gaps during transitional periods.

We excel in industry mapping, offering a comprehensive analysis of the talent landscape to identify and attract the best candidates. Our independent reference checks ensure thorough verification of candidate backgrounds and references, maintaining the highest standards of integrity and reliability.

Additionally, we assist companies in optimizing their organizational structure through organizational design and restructuring services, helping businesses enhance their performance and adapt to changing market conditions. We also focus on performance management and process enhancement, working with organizations to improve their effectiveness and achieve their strategic goals.

We serve a wide array of industries, including finance, healthcare, manufacturing, retail, technology, and telecommunications. This diverse industry expertise allows us to understand the unique challenges and opportunities within each sector, providing tailored solutions that drive success.

Renowned for our values and ethics, Mindquest Consulting has built a reputation as a trusted partner for businesses looking to secure top leadership talent. Our commitment to excellence and dedication to client satisfaction have established us as a leader in the executive search industry.

Name: Earlihire
Description:
Tired of job hunting feeling like a one-sided chase? At Earlihire, we're flipping that script for India's millions of job seekers and pros. Founded in 2020 as a full-stack HR platform, we're your go-to hub for everything from ATS-proof resumes to cosmic career nudges—making companies come to you instead of the other way around.
We keep it candidate-first: every tool designed backwards from your real pains, ethical to the core (no ghosting, no fluff) so we scale sustainably without burning out. Our LinkedIn community (10k+ and growing) is where job hunters, working pros, recruiters, and companies swap stories, spark genuine referrals (one profile highlight = 50+ warm intros), and build lasting networks. B2C for that personal spark, expanding to B2B so employers snag talent without the hassle.
Here's our toolkit to equip you for the win—no job guarantees, but smoother journeys and stronger spotlights:

Resume Evaluation: ATS scan + 1-page feedback to dodge rejection traps.
Resume Writing: Custom builds with revisions—your story, recruiter-ready.
Career Astro Services: Kundli insights on job timing and vibes.
Profile Highlight: Sponsored post on our page + profile tweaks for max reach.
Personal Branding Video Reels: 60-sec clips that turn views into DMs.
Salary Negotiation Coaching: Templates + 1:1 call to own your worth.
Job Seeker Mental Wellness: 4-session pack for mindset resets.
Executive Search for Enterprises: Retainer model for top hires.
Blue Collar Workforce Hiring: Bulk matches for SMEs.
Payroll Management: Recurring ease for small teams.
Tie-ups for Upskilling & Lead Gen: Partners like TimesPro/Emeritus for courses that boost your edge.

In a 2025 world of AI layoffs and endless scrolls, we're here to make careers feel like homecomings—clear, confident, and chased. Follow for daily tips, astro alerts, and success spotlights. DM for a free resume scan or collab—let's make you the superstar they can't ignore.

Name: Séverine Licciardo Recrutement
Description:
Un recrutement peut changer le destin d’une entreprise comme d’un candidat. Tout l’enjeu est de créer la bonne rencontre.  Je m’appelle Séverine Licciardo et je suis convaincue – parce que je l’expérimente chaque jour – que derrière chaque recrutement, il y a bien plus qu’un CV.  
Depuis plus de 8 ans, j’aide les organisations à bâtir des équipes engagées et performantes. Dans les secteurs en tension où l’urgence s’invite dans beaucoup de recrutement, j’ai contribué à transformer le recrutement en levier de croissance, en maximisant le bassin de candidats et en créant des solutions adaptées aux besoins réels. On m’a souvent décrite comme un catalyseur de changement, capable d’allier rigueur et énergie positive.
Mes valeurs sont simples : engagement, authenticité, collaboration et proximité. Mon rôle est de créer des liens de confiance et d’accompagner chacun – dirigeants, équipes RH et candidats – pour trouver la juste adéquation entre talent, culture et projet.
Aujourd’hui, en tant qu’indépendante, je me positionne comme une partenaire stratégique : 
Les entreprise sans RH : Vous déléguez vos recrutements de A à Z et gardez le focus sur votre croissance.
Les entreprises avec RH : Votre équipe recrute plus vite et plus juste grâce à un renfort flexible.
Candidats : Vous trouvez l’entreprise où vos talents s’épanouissent vraiment.

Name: Summit Executive Resources LLC
Description:
Founded in 2009 Summit Executive Resources is redefining the executive search industry. We prepare and position executives for new leadership opportunities in a diverse mix of industries, including  technology, financial services, consumer packaged goods, and professional services, addressing their unique business challenges. Clients rely on us to guide them through the intricacies of C-Suite, private equity and board member recruitment, compensation and compliance with tightening SEC regulations, and mapping new pathways to executive and board placement and retention. We develop and tailor services to the exact needs of our clients. 

Unlike traditional executive search, we represent the executive - much like a personal agent. Our world-class assessment methodology helps us determine individuals' leadership characteristics, personality and skills so we can position them for success. On the employer side, we cultivate relationships with leading companies and funding sources gaining critical insight into their expectations and cultures. We understand both sides of the equation and we are able to find the perfect fit. This process dramatically shortens the hiring cycle and increases the chance of a satisfying and successful experience for all.

Name: Executive Search Asian Partners (ESAP)
Description:
About ESAP
The Executive Search Asian Partners (ESAP) is a strategic alliance uniting leading executive search firms across Asia and Europe. Founded on principles of collaboration, trust, and shared professional standards, ESAP empowers clients to access a wider talent pool and deeper market expertise than any single firm could provide alone.

Our Mission
At ESAP, we aim to redefine cross-border executive search. We do this by combining the deep local knowledge of our partner firms with a truly global perspective on leadership needs. This unique model allows us to deliver agile, tailored, and culturally attuned solutions to multinational clients navigating increasingly complex markets.

What We Offer
1. Broader Talent Reach – Through our network, clients gain access to high-caliber leaders across diverse industries and geographies.

2. Deeper Market Expertise – Each member firm brings in-depth local insights, ensuring that search strategies are contextually relevant and effective.

3. Trusted Collaboration – Our alliance is built on long-standing relationships and shared commitments to quality, integrity, and discretion.

Our Vision
By bridging continents, industries, and cultures, ESAP aspires to set a new benchmark for excellence in executive search—helping organizations secure the leadership they need to thrive in a globalized world.

At Naari, we are dedicated to reshaping the leadership landscape by focusing exclusively on bringing women into leadership roles. Name: Takt Consulting
Description:
Welcome to Takt, where expertise meets excellence in Global Executive Search.

As an expert headhunter, my mission is to help small to medium-sized companies like yours find top-tier talent that aligns with your organization’s professional, personal, and long-term goals. I delve deep into your company’s unique characteristics to ensure that the talent I connect you with is truly the best fit. My passion lies in finding excellent matches.

With over 20 years of experience in corporate recruiting and high-level executive searches across various sectors globally, I bring diverse expertise to the table. Having lived and worked in four different countries, I have cultivated a vast network and a deep understanding of different cultures. This international experience, combined with my hard work and industry knowledge, underpins my successful track record.

My background includes tenure at prestigious firms such as Egon Zehnder, Korn Ferry, and Oliver Wyman, where I have successfully placed candidates in key regions, including the US, Canada, Latin America, Europe, and Asia.

Nothing brings me more satisfaction than finding the perfect match between exceptional talent and your company's needs. I am dedicated to understanding your organization, the positions you are looking to fill, and the teams involved. By working closely with both candidates and hiring teams, I gain a comprehensive understanding of their strengths and aspirations to discover the ideal match.

Talent Empowerment: We believe in the potential of every individual. Our comprehensive training programs, career development resources, and personalized coaching services ensure that job seekers are not only prepared but also confident in navigating the dynamic job market.

Employer Success: We partner with organizations to understand their unique needs and culture, delivering customized workforce solutions that drive business success. Technological Innovation: In an era of rapid technological advancement, we are at the forefront of integrating AI and machine learning into our recruitment processes. These technologies enable us to provide more accurate job matches, streamline hiring workflows, and deliver actionable insights that enhance decision-making.

Diversity and Inclusion: We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce. Our initiatives and partnerships promote equal opportunities, ensuring that talent from all backgrounds can thrive and contribute to their fullest potential.

Let's get real: 98% of our roles are filled successfully, and we maintain a 96% retention rate. Why? Because we do what others won't - we dig deeper, push harder, and use cutting-edge science to predict long-term compatibility before you make that hire.

Stop playing it safe with traditional hiring methods. Our Revive X-Edge process combines job evaluation, scientific behavioral assessments, and advanced technology to cut through the noise and find your perfect match. And here's the kicker - we're so confident in our process that we offer up to 1-year free replacement policy.

 Energy: From Drilling Supervisors to C-suite Executives, we're building the teams that drive Canada's energy leadership.

Why Choose Us?

1.	We eliminate the guesswork from hiring
2.	Our scientific approach saves you precious interview time
3.	We protect your investment with our industry-leading replacement policy

Founded by Amber O'Brien, we're not just filling positions - we're building lasting partnerships that transform organizations. Ready to stop settling and start excelling?

Nossa missão é apoiar tanto empresas quanto profissionais em momentos decisivos, oferecendo soluções personalizadas para otimizar o alinhamento entre as necessidades do mercado e o potencial dos talentos.

Com uma abordagem centrada no indivíduo, a Meu Rumo se dedica a entender profundamente o perfil de cada cliente, seja ele uma empresa em busca de talentos internacionais ou um executivo em transição. Para os profissionais, oferecemos um suporte completo na recolocação de carreira, proporcionando ferramentas essenciais para navegar pelas complexas mudanças do mercado de trabalho.

Nossos serviços incluem:

Avaliação de Perfil e Habilidades: Analisamos minuciosamente o perfil profissional, identificando fortalezas e áreas de desenvolvimento, para proporcionar um caminho claro de evolução.

Orientação e Planejamento de Carreira: Desenvolvemos estratégias personalizadas para que nossos clientes, seja em transição ou buscando novos desafios, possam atingir seus objetivos com clareza e segurança.

Preparação de Documentos: Ajudamos na criação de currículos impactantes, cartas de apresentação e perfis profissionais, destacando as melhores qualidades e experiências de cada cliente.

Treinamento para Entrevistas: Simulamos entrevistas e preparamos nossos clientes para que enfrentem os processos seletivos com confiança e alto desempenho.

Desenvolvimento de Marca Pessoal: Auxiliamos na construção de uma marca pessoal forte e autêntica, posicionando nossos clientes como líderes em suas áreas.

Networking e Estratégias de Busca de Oportunidades: Orientamos sobre as melhores práticas de networking e de prospecção de oportunidades, ampliando a rede de contatos e maximizando o alcance profissional.

We believe that you shouldn’t have to settle for mediocre service or rushed hiring decisions. Instead, let us lead you to the exceptional talent that meets your strategic goals.

With a 95%+ success rate, our results speak for themselves. We've helped startups blossom into success stories and supported seasoned firms in bolstering their teams, underscoring our commitment to integrity and honesty.

Name: WARREN & MORRIS LTD.
Description:
Warren and Morris Ltd., founded in 1983, provides retained and contained executive search services to early stage and rapid growth companies, as well as organizations involved with technology or new product convergence. For over 40 years, we have successfully placed executives with broadband/cable operators, cable/satellite and OTT networks, wireless service providers, digital media content/streaming service providers and technology ventures.  We’ve also worked with numerous new ventures including organizations in the Security and Home Automation, Manufacturing and Technology Firms.  We partner with Founders, VC's and Board of Directors' and Senior Executives on their early stage ventures. We are experts at filling senior level positions across all functional areas....

HOW WE WORK

The success of every engagement begins with discovery. We invest deeply in understanding your business model, culture, growth strategy, and competitive landscape. This enables us to represent your organization precisely and to identify leaders who not only meet the technical profile but also fit your operating environment and leadership culture.

We do not rely on job postings or inbound applicant flow.
 We actively source, network, and recruit proven, currently successful leaders who are not on job boards and who rarely respond to open searches. These are the candidates who can step in, lead immediately, and create value.

Our search philosophy is rooted in:

Quality over quantity

Direct outreach and referral-based sourcing

Thorough vetting of leadership capability, track record, and cultural alignment

Presenting only a small slate of high-caliber finalists

The result is straightforward:
It only takes one — the right one. That is our specialty. 

GIVING BACK
As a Veteran-Owned firm, Warren & Morris Ltd. has long supported organizations advancing Veteran employment, community development, education, ecological conservation, and industry advancement.

Je travaille dans des différents secteurs tels que le Conseil, l’Industrie et l’Ingénierie, l’Energie, l’Environnement, les Life Sciences, la Technologie, la Distribution, ainsi que l’Aéronautique. 

Grâce à ma connaissance des enjeux propres à ces domaines, je cherche à fournir des solutions de recrutement adaptées et pertinentes aux besoins de chaque entreprise.

Un recrutement réussi est avant tout une histoire humaine, une rencontre. C’est pourquoi je place l'écoute, la transparence et le conseil au centre de mes relations clients et candidats. 

Au-delà de la connaissance technique des métiers : chaque talent, qu’il soit en recherche d’un nouveau poste ou en pleine évolution de carrière, mérite une approche humaine, respectueuse et personnalisée. 

Mon processus rigoureux repose sur une communication fluide et une totale transparence, garantissant ainsi une confiance mutuelle à chaque étape. 

À chaque mission, je m'engage à trouver le bon équilibre entre compétences, leadership et culture d'entreprise, pour que le recrutement soit une véritable opportunité de croissance, et non simplement une fonction à remplir. 

Au-delà de la simple recherche de profils, mon objectif est de créer des liens qui matchent !

Name: Fyne-cls
Description:
Propositie: Partner in beslissende momenten. Wanneer de continuïteit van je bedrijf moet gaan rusten op nieuwe C-level schouders. Wij begrijpen wat er op het spel staat. De nachten wakker liggen. De keukentafelgesprekken. Het gevoel dat je je levenswerk moet loslaten. Daarom doorgronden wij eerst je erfgoed en toekomstdroom. Geen
intake, maar begrip. Geen algoritmes, maar menselijk vakmanschap. Geen cv-match, maar cultuurfit. Zo vinden wij de leider die jouw waarden niet alleen begrijpt, maar versterkt. Want doorgeven is meer dan overdragen.

Missie: Fyne ontzorgt ondernemers bij hun meest emotionele beslissing: het overdragen van C-level verantwoordelijkheid. We begrijpen wat er speelt bij groei, verkoop of opvolging. Van eerste gesprek tot succesvolle onboarding. Wij maken van een zorgelijke transitie een geruste toekomst. 

Visie: Fyne wordt dé vertrouwde partner voor familiebedrijven en groot-MKB die hun core business willen beschermen tijdens leiderschapswisselingen. In een markt vol generalisten en grootmachten, kiezen ondernemers voor Fyne omdat wij als een
vertrouwde adviseur naast hen staan.

Identiteit: Wij zijn gedreven door nieuwsgierigheid naar wat ondernemers hebben opgebouwd. We combineren de scherpte van een strateeg met het geduld van een vakman. Geen haast, wel urgentie. Geen compromissen, wel oplossingen. Dit is wie we zijn: kritisch waar het moet, betrokken waar het kan, onvermoeibaar tot het klopt.

Mentaliteit: Vertrouwen is ons kapitaal. We bewaken het als een bankier zijn kluis. We denken in toekomstscenario's, niet in snelle winst. Handelen vanuit overtuiging, niet uit opportunisme. Want wie het vertrouwen van generaties draagt, kan zich geen misstap veroorloven.

Name: Holbrook Search Group
Description:
Executive search is our business. That is why the Holbrook Search Group team brings years of expertise and a time-tested recruiting process to find talent with the perfect combination of skills, experience, and cultural background to fit your strategic role.
Our process starts before the search, by spending time with our new clients in their environment and meeting with their leadership team, to ensure thorough technical and cultural understanding. This time meeting with the client organization might seem like an unnecessary extra step to our competition, but we believe it to be critical to ensure we can appropriately assess candidates.
We conduct a comprehensive evaluation of the position and where it sits in the organization. We also evaluate any nuanced skills necessary in the right candidate that might extend to team relationships, historical expectations, and less clearly defined aspects of the business.
