 We connect people, know-how, and technology across four key areas:

 Process Outsourcing

 We take over selected client processes, ensuring their smooth execution and cost optimization. The client provides the infrastructure, while we handle work organization and personnel management. The service can function indefinitely and does not impact the company’s direct employment structure.

 Temporary Staffing

 We provide fast staffing solutions for seasonal, urgent, or replacement needs. Employees are formally hired by our agency, and the client manages daily work organization. This flexible model allows efficient workforce management and offers the option of directly hiring proven employees later on.

 Permanent Recruitment

 We identify and recruit qualified specialists and managers tailored to the client’s needs. Thanks to our expertise and extensive network, we also reach candidates who are not actively seeking new opportunities.

 Consulting & Contract Analysis

 We offer advisory services including contract analysis and preparation, support with work and residency legalization for foreign employees, and ongoing assistance in labor law and employment matters.

 Business Support & Networking

 We organize industry events, business meetings, and collaborate within ecosystems, enabling knowledge exchange, networking, and cooperative growth among companies.

Name: Dieck Executive Search, Inc.
Description:
What sets Dieck Executive Search apart? 

Any search firm can find candidates looking for jobs. What separates Dieck Executive Search from other global executive search firms, ("Head Hunters", if you like) is the ability to uncover world-class talent that are not looking, and highly effective in their jobs, engage them, and make sure it's the correct fit.

Dieck Executive Search is a retained executive search firm that understands and empathizes with the challenges faced in recruiting world class talent to your team. We have over 25 years of experience navigating successful searches for our client companies throughout the United States as well as internationally.

Finding the right fit is only part of what we do.

Once the successful fit is found and the offer is made and accepted, Dieck Executive Search doesn't walk away and start a new search for another client. At the end of the day, the search process is part science, and part art. The most promising candidate can wake up one night and decide that it's a wrong fit, or the client can do the same thing. After all the hard work identifying the candidate, background checks, interviews, negotiation and offer acceptance, will the candidate be successful?

To insure a successful placement, Dieck Executive Search has a proprietary process to ensure the candidate and the retained client are not only a good fit, but a successful one. Feel free to call us for more details and references.

Name: Silk Road Board and Governance Institute
Description:
The Silk Road Board & Governance Institute is an expert platform for the formation and implementation of advanced corporate governance standards and international practice of boards of directors (boards) in public and private companies of the “Silk Road” countries of Central Asia.

Objectives of the Institute are the following:

1.	Design of regional corporate governance standards based on best global practices and the cultural and business characteristics of the Silk Road countries.

2.	Training of personnel for the implementation of modern practices of corporate governance and board work.

3.	Expert support for shareholders, boards, and management of private and public companies in launching and optimizing the work of the Board and developing corporate governance models.

4.	Increasing confidence and strengthening the reputation of the region as a reliable partner for attracting global capital, intellectual and technological resources.

Mission: 
 
To contribute to the prosperity and sustainable development of companies in the Central Asian region through corporate governance tools and international board best practices.

Institute's activities include the following: 

•	An annual International Business Summit dedicated to issues of corporate governance and board practices  

•	Regional studies on the practice of developing corporate governance and boards 

•	Dissemination of relevant international research and best practices

•	Specialized training programs for members of boards, shareholders, senior management, and experts

•	Advising companies on the formation of corporate governance models; launching and evaluating the performance of boards; selection of independent directors; seminars and specialized sessions on current trends and corporate governance practices

•	Furthering dialogue between business, government, and regulatory bodies on issues of corporate governance.

Please feel free to contact us for further details.

Name: Kariéra bez bariér
Description:
Jsme tým odborníků z Úřadu práce ČR a Ministerstva práce a sociálních věcí ČR, který se společně podílí na projektu podporujícím zaměstnávání lidí s postižením.

Pokud jste člověk s postižením a chcete pracovat, nebo zaměstnavatel, který chce nabídnout pracovní příležitost člověku s postižením, rádi vám poradíme, jak na to. Tak neváhejte a obraťte se na některého z našich 130 poradců. Naše poradce najdete na úřadech práce. Poradci pro zaměstnavatele působí na krajských pobočkách úřadu práce, poradci pro klienty jsou na kontaktních pracovištích po celé ČR.
Služby v oblasti poradenství a konzultací jsou poskytovány zdarma.

Naším cílem je pomoci lidem s postižením získat a udržet si zaměstnání. Podporujeme rovněž zaměstnavatele v začleňování těchto lidí do pracovního procesu na otevřeném trhu práce.

Naše služby jsou určeny lidem s postižením, kteří mají zájem o práci nebo již pracují.
Pro využití služeb poradců není nutné, abyste byli registrováni na úřadu práce v evidenci uchazečů o zaměstnání, evidenci zájemců o zaměstnání ani v evidenci osob se zdravotním postižením. 

Mohou se na nás obrátit také zaměstnavatelé, kteří zvažují zaměstnat nebo již zaměstnávají lidi s postižením. Zaměstnavatelům poskytujeme komplexní informace o zaměstnávání lidí s postižením, včetně možností finanční podpory a praktických rad.

S kým vás můžeme propojit 
•	Zaměstnavatelé v soukromém i veřejném sektoru
•	Zaměstnavatelé na otevřeném i chráněném trhu práce
•	Subjekty, které se hlásí k principům sociálního podnikání
•	Nestátní neziskové organizace
•	Sociální služby
•	Ergodiagnostická centra
•	Vzdělávací zařízení a školy
•	Zdravotnická zařízení
•	Sociální partneři (obce, kraje a další subjekty)
•	Česká správa sociálního zabezpečení

Name: Prolaurum
Description:
Prolaurum tiene como propósito acompañar la transformación global resultado de un dramático cambio de paradigmas en todos los campos del comportamiento, enfatizando que es imperativo recuperar los valores éticos, las mejores prácticas y el compromiso para dar respuesta a clientes, empleados, proveedores, accionistas y la comunidad.

Prolaurum participa por experiencia y convicciones en el desarrollo de una economía sustentable para las futuras generaciones. Brindando solución a los requerimientos de la Gestión del Talento desde esta posición “idealista”, al unir con “nuevas reglas” nuestras capacidades regionales y equipo humano. 

Prolaurum es la síntesis de 25 años de práctica de un grupo de consultores senior provenientes de firmas internacionales líderes en Executive Search. 

Prolaurum nace como una boutique fuertemente orientada al sistema Cliente, Candidato/a, Consultor, (CCC) considerando a este modelo como el único y verdadero activo de la práctica profesional.

Prolaurum (por los laureles) es la unión de pares en una red, sin intereses oportunistas, con el compromiso de demostrar que sí se puede sostener una ecuación de relación de ayuda , responsabilidad social y negocio, que privilegie el respeto al individuo, organizaciones y comunidad en su conjunto.

Name: the ProFound group
Description:
ProFound has redefined the landscape of talent acquisition for entrepreneurial, rapid-growth firms in the renewable energy and clean technology sectors. Our approach is built on the principles of sustainability, transparency, and efficiency, ensuring that we deliver top-tier talent while maximizing your investment.  

Here's how:

Sustainable Search
At ProFound, we believe there’s a smarter way to help firms hire talent. Our unique hourly billing model means you only pay for the time and resources we use, providing a cost-effective solution that can be tailored to your budget. Whether you hire one or ten candidates, your costs remain the same, predictable and manageable.

Exclusivity and Confidentiality
We prioritize exclusivity and confidentiality by working with select clients per industry or market segment. This ensures no competing interests and allows us to focus entirely on your best interests. Our deep commitment to understanding your vision, culture, and values fosters long-term trust, loyalty, and mutual respect.

Talent Mapping and Transparency
ProFound maps the universe of available talent to meet your specific requirements. You have real-time access to our proprietary database, offering you insights into search progress and results. All information and activity developed during the search are your property, ensuring complete transparency.

Expertise and Efficiency
Utilizing ProFound’s proprietary screening tools, we submit only the most qualified candidates for your consideration. This saves you time and accelerates the interview process. We provide comprehensive overviews of candidates' qualifications, availability, compensation requirements, and any competing opportunities.
 
Join ProFound Group and experience a new era of talent acquisition designed to support your growth and success.

Description:

For Companies:
We work closely with you to identify and attract talents who not only possess the necessary skills but also share your values and vision. By adopting a holistic approach, we ensure that every candidate we propose fits seamlessly into your team and contributes to its longevity. Our goal is to help you build strong, harmonious teams where each member finds their place and Ikigai, thereby enhancing your organization's overall performance.

Our Commitment:

Join us for a unique recruitment experience.

Name: Ken Clark Partners
Description:
Founded in 2015, soon after the dissolution of Ken Clark International (KCI), Ken Clark Partners (KCP) provides executive search and related consulting services to companies in Life Sciences industries in the United States and Europe.

Industry product practices include: Medical, Pharmaceuticals; Biotech; Diagnostic; Scientific and Laboratory; and Consumer Healthcare Products and Services.  Industry services practices include: Contract Research; Contract Development; Contract Manufacturing; Contract Testing; and Logistics and Distribution.

The company maintains its global headquarters in Chapel Hill, North Carolina with regional offices in Dusseldorf, Germany and London, England.

KCP focuses on recruiting passive and immediate impact candidates for executive level positions that require the direct, personal recruiting efforts of an experienced, senior consultant to include research, contacting and motivating interest, evaluation, referencing and verification, employment offer negotiations, and assimilation.

KCP also conducts consulting projects such as Talent Mapping, Management and Leadership Assessment, and Organization Comparison studies.

Ken Clark himself has completed over 300 BOD, CEO, COO, and President search projects since 1996.

Description:

Description:

Additional services include Fractional HR vertical, which provides customized HR solutions expanding outside of search. The firm also provides subscription-based talent mapping and research services. 

Based in Greenwich, CT, Archer partners directly with business owners to help achieve the very best in talent outcomes. We look forward to sharing more about our capabilities.

Description:
Nikolajsen & Partners Search Group er et dynamisk og kompetent headhunterfirma, grundlagt på et solidt fundament af dybdegående branchekendskab og et omfattende netværk af kvalificerede kandidater. Med over to årtiers erfaring fra Automotive Business og et velrenommeret ry inden for Financial Services, har vi udvidet vores ekspertise til at omfatte en bredere vifte af brancher og specialområder.

Siden etableringen i 2017 under navnet Autosearch har Nikolajsen & Partners demonstreret en vedvarende evne til at levere skræddersyede rekrutteringsløsninger, der præcist matcher virksomhedernes behov med de bedste talenter i branchen. Med en personlig og hands-on tilgang til hver opgave, sikrer vi, at både virksomheder og kandidater oplever en transparent og værdiskabende proces.

Vi lægger stor værdi i at være på forkant med branchetendenser og bruger innovative rekrutteringsmetoder for at sikre de mest effektive resultater. Hos Nikolajsen & Partners er vi stolte over at have bygget langvarige relationer med både virksomheder og kandidater, hvilket vidner om vores engagement og succes inden for headhunting og rekruttering.

#Executivesearch #Recruitment #ClimateTech #Sustainability #InsureTech #FinTech #Carbontech #ESG #GRC #SaaS #AI #Globalgrowth #cybersecurity

AI.Consulting est bien plus qu'un simple cabinet de recrutement. Nous sommes des partenaires dédiés à la croissance de votre entreprise, en vous aidant à intégrer les talents qui feront la différence. 

Chez AI.Consulting, notre équipe de professionnels combine une expertise approfondie des secteurs et des métiers avec une véritable maîtrise de la détection des talents et de l'évaluation des compétences.

Name: JIG.World - Jobs in Germany
Description:
JIG.World (Jobs In Germany) ist eine Organisation, die Beratungsdienstleistungen für Lebens- und Arbeitsgenehmigungen im Ausland anbietet. Mit 25 Jahren Erfahrung und einem hochqualifizierten Team bietet JIG Ihnen einen professionellen Service.

Unsere Expertise richtet sich besonders an junge Menschen und Einzelpersonen, die eine Karriere im Ausland anstreben. Wir unterstützen Sie nicht nur bei der Expansion ins Ausland, sondern auch bei der Auswahl Ihres Zielortes und in jeder Phase Ihres Auslandsaufenthaltes.

VERTRAUEN ist unser Grundprinzip, basierend auf unserer umfangreichen Erfahrung in Deutschland.

Unser Team, das sich auf kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung und Spezialisierung in den verschiedenen Berufszweigen der Region konzentriert, ist bereit, Sie bei den großartigen Karrieremöglichkeiten in Deutschland zu unterstützen.

Die Planung Ihrer Zukunft wird Ihnen helfen, bessere und weiterführende Ziele zu erreichen, beruflich voranzukommen, Ihre Vision zu erweitern und Schwierigkeiten leichter zu überwinden. Während Sie dies auch in Ihrem Heimatland erreichen können, bietet Ihnen das Ausland die Möglichkeit, den Status eines Weltbürgers zu erlangen.

Wir bei JIG streben danach, mit unseren Werten und unserem positiven Ansatz jederzeit Ihr Vertrauen zu verdienen. Unabhängig davon, wo auf der Welt Sie sich befinden, können Sie uns jederzeit kontaktieren, um sich über Erfahrungen und Arbeitsmöglichkeiten im Ausland zu informieren und unsere Dienstleistungen in Anspruch zu nehmen.

Bitte beachten Sie, dass JIG keinen Einfluss auf die Entscheidung über Ihre Aufenthaltserlaubnis hat. Diese Entscheidungen werden ausschließlich von Konsulaten und Botschaften getroffen.

Description:
AlteredPixel Solutions is an Executive Service Solution designed to align with

difficulties we offer our C-suite expertise to help you achieve your goals.

Name: Logistica Partners, LLC
Description:
Logistica Partners delivers management talent for companies seeking key executives and directors with the expertise to enhance efficiencies, reduce costs, and increase revenues organically or by acquisitions. We identify, attract and deliver executives with exceptional track records in their respective industries leading teams where supply chain, logistics, manufacturing and production is the mission, critical to drive the company’s bottom line.

Over 75% of the talent pool consists of high achiever, passive job seekers. These are fully employed, busy, highly valued professionals who are leading their teams to accomplish big objectives for their companies and not actively pursuing a job change. Most companies looking to hire an executive are not engaging this large, untapped segment of achievers when recruitment efforts lean mostly on job boards and traditional staffing agencies.

Targeting high achiever, passive job seekers requires a strong advocate for your company, in this competitive executive marketplace, to attract and deliver the best qualified candidates. We have a 98% success rate of placing the best qualified candidates driven by our superior vetting process, extensive network, specialized expertise, and industry experience. Our first step to achieve this is to learn and align with your goals resulting in delivering the right candidates who are vital to growing your business.

We identify, attract and deliver executive candidates for the following positions:
– Chief Operating Officers
– Presidents
– Chief Information Officers
– Supply Chain Management
– Logistics Management 
– Operations Directors
– Supply / Demand Planning Directors
– General Managers
– Board of Directors / Advisors
– General Partners for PE and VC
– Operating Partners
– Strategic Advisors

When you are ready for the right type of talent, we’ll tailor our executive search toward finding you the right candidates, experienced and proven, to lead and win for your company.

Description:
Navarro&Fraile es una consultora de Executive Search, fundada en 2024 por Luján Fraile y Ana Navarro. Con más de 15 años de experiencia combinada en grandes corporaciones y consultoras de primer nivel, nos especializamos en la búsqueda de posiciones de middle y top management.

Nuestro enfoque principal es impulsar la profesionalización y crecimiento de compañías medianas y grandes. Nuestra habilidad reside en entender la singularidad de cada organización y adaptarnos a sus culturas y contextos, a la hora de buscar talento. 

Desarrollamos relaciones de confianza con clientes y candidatos, que nos permiten conocer en profundidad sus inquietudes, intereses, problemáticas y necesidades, y así ser más asertivas para detectar perfiles, y garantizar una alta tasa de éxito en las incorporaciones.

Nuestros clientes nos eligen por nuestra visión estratégica, nuestro compromiso,  el seguimiento personalizado de los procesos y las relaciones de confianza que construimos.

Name: talentU
Description: Our mission is to connect outstanding talents with leading companies, so that together they can achieve remarkable results and drive innovation in the industry.

Name: Cheatham & Associates LLC
Description:
We are a full-service woman-owned executive search firm, specializing in finding top talent for organizations including but not limited to allied health, community and technical colleges, liberal arts, engineering, art and design, and aerospace. Our team of experienced recruiters has a proven track record of identifying and placing the best candidates for our clients. We focus on building long-term relationships with both our clients and candidates, ensuring that we provide exceptional service throughout the entire recruitment process. Waarom kiezen organisaties voor BFF Executive Search?

 50% snellere doorlooptijd dan het branchegemiddelde
Dankzij geavanceerde technologieën en een efficiënte aanpak vinden wij de juiste leiders gemiddeld twee keer zo snel als traditionele executive search bureaus.

 Diepgaande markt- en branchekennis
Met jarenlange ervaring en een breed netwerk begrijpen wij de uitdagingen binnen diverse sectoren en weten we precies welke leiders het verschil maken.  

 Persoonlijke aandacht & maatwerk  
Elke organisatie is uniek. Daarom luisteren we goed, denken we mee en bieden we oplossingen die aansluiten bij uw specifieke behoeften en cultuur.  

 Focus op duurzame en toekomstbestendige matches 
Wij kijken verder dan het cv. We selecteren leiders die niet alleen vandaag passen, maar ook bijdragen aan de groei en ontwikkeling van uw organisatie op lange termijn.  

 12 maanden garantie op iedere plaatsing  
Wij geloven in de kracht van onze matches. Daarom bieden we een garantieperiode van 12 maanden: mocht een geplaatste kandidaat binnen deze termijn vertrekken, starten we kosteloos een nieuw searchtraject.  

Wij vinden leiders die het verschil maken. Ook voor úw organisatie.
Bezoek onze website [www.businessfuturefit.com](https://www.businessfuturefit.com) of neem contact op en ontdek wat wij voor u kunnen betekenen.

Description:
At ExecRx, we believe the right leadership can change the trajectory of a company — but it doesn’t always need to be full-time.

We help health innovation companies access fractional medical and scientific executives and advisors — top-tier physicians and scientists from leading universities — at the right dose, at the right time.

Our network includes professionals with deep experience across more than 30 fields and 20+ areas of expertise, from clinical research and regulatory affairs to AI/ML, device development, and health technologies. 

Over 90% of our experts are associate professors or higher; most continue to practice, teach, and advise at the forefront of medicine and science.

ExecRx makes it possible for growing organizations to:

  • Access specialized leadership quickly (typically in under 6 weeks)
  • Reduce hiring costs by 40–60%
  • Accelerate research, development, and commercialization timelines

Strengthen credibility through affiliations with top-tier experts

We handle the full process — from defining the technical need and fractional scope, to placing the right leader and ensuring ongoing fit and performance.

Our model works because it’s built on precision, flexibility, and relationships.

By matching the exact expertise a company needs — in the right capacity — ExecRx delivers results that are both measurable and scalable.

Whether you’re a health tech, med device, digital health, or clinical research organization, ExecRx gives you access to the leadership you need to move faster, grow smarter, and build with confidence.

ExecRx — Right Expertise. Right Dose. Right Time.

Name: Chilmark Advisors
Description:
Executive transition can seem stressful or daunting. Often referred to as Reverse Headhunters, we generate direct access to the people who have the power to hire or appoint you to the board. With effective methodology, powerful tools, and personal coaching, we can guarantee you meet your transitional objective.

Everyone has his or her own version of this scene: sitting in front of the computer and scouring through sites, such as Monster, Indeed, and The Ladders, for opportunities, copying and pasting a carefully-authored cover letter, addressing it to the right person, attaching the resume, sending out the e-mail, and feeling the frustration of knowing that thousands of others are answering the same postings. The responses are few and disappointing, but you find it difficult to break out of this repetitious, passive, and unimaginative approach to your search.

We believe that tapping into the less competitive, executive employment and board seat market is essential and that highly targeted direct mail and follow-up is the fastest and most effective way to reach decision-makers. This does not mean blindly canvassing your business cards and sending resumes to everyone in your community. It does, however, mean obtaining contacts from those who may be able to help you find a suitable placement. One of the greatest advantages of networking is the access you have to the “hidden” market. We believe that custom direct mail, supported by a compelling cover note, succinct resume and a follow-up voice message, directly to the decision maker, is the fastest and most effective method of generating interviews.
Hidden executive positions and board seats are obviously more difficult to uncover. Consequently, there are typically fewer applicants for these openings than for advertised positions. Contacting the person, to whom you would directly report, affords you the opportunity to get ahead of the game by applying for the position first.

Tyto znalosti potřebuji nejen ke své práci, ale také předávám tyto znalosti dál — klientům a jejich týmům, podle jejich konkrétních potřeb.
Konzultace v oblasti řízení mi umožňují pružně reagovat na požadavky klientů, pomáhat s definováním jejich vizí a očekávání v projektech. Mám zkušenosti i s procesním poradenstvím v oblasti change managementu, rozvoje manažerských kompetencí, analýzy vzdělávacích potřeb a také s projekty v oblasti #outplacementu (průvodce změnou) a #kariérového poradenství.

Name: Helium Search
Description:
Fewer Engagements. Better Relationships. Stronger Hires.

Helium Search was founded to serve as an alternative for growing firms who are looking for a custom and personal solution to filling roles within their organizations. With the simple idea that stronger relationships can be built by limiting the number of engagements we take on, we’re able to give our clients’ searches the dedication and attention needed to fill key positions with top talent at unmatched speeds.

Every engagement we take on comes with a dedicated search consultant who interfaces with both clients and talent in the marketplace, serving as a single point of contact for both. This approach allows for a smoother, more streamlined interview process and ensures that key messaging doesn’t get diluted from Point A to Point B. It also gives us the opportunity to look beyond the bullet points on a candidate’s resume and the copy on a company’s website to assess fit, alignment and overall  chemistry within the hiring organization. 

Is our “less is more” approach unique? Yes. Are we leaving money on the table by chasing relationships instead of transactions? Probably. Are we more proud of the final product that comes from our work? Absolutely.

If you’re looking for something that bucks the norm in executive recruiting (while adding a bit of personality to the process) we’d love to hear from you.

Our recruitment process is marked by precision and industry-specific focus:

1. Client Consultation: We conduct thorough consultations to understand the unique staffing needs of our clients across diverse industries.

3. Candidate Sourcing: Leveraging our vast network and specialized search methodologies, we identify candidates with expertise across different sectors.
4. Screening and Evaluation: Our rigorous screening process includes in-depth interviews, skills assessments, and reference checks, ensuring a comprehensive evaluation of each candidate's suitability for the specified roles.

Name: PMM Management Consultants
Description:
PMM Management Consultants was the German branch of Peat, Marwick, Mitchell & Co., a predecessor of KPMG and later, after the formation of KPMG, the executive search affiliate of KPMG. The US parent company boasted some very prominent figures of executive search, among them Lester Korn and Richard Ferry who worked in the executive recruitment department of the Peat Marwick Mitchell accounting firm and left to form Korn Ferry in 1969. 

PMM Management Consultants operated out Hamburg, Düsseldorf, Frankfurt and Munich being a leading executive search and assessment firm in Germany as was documented on their website: 

"PMM Management Consultants is one of the leading Executive Search and Selection companies in Germany. Being in business for 20 years, we employ more than 45 people. Our consultants, assisted by researchers, assistants, and administration staff, conduct more than 250 assignments annually.

PMM Management Consultants deals with the search and selection of first and second level managers and the recruitment of professionals. Depending on the requirements, we search for candidates by direct approach, by advertisements, by internet or we combine these search methods. We offer comprehensive recruiting management on request – as an external or internal consultant.

If required, we conduct remuneration surveys, management audits, assessments and personality tests. In addition, we also support our clients with our know-how in other HR topics. By working with our cooperation partners, we conduct professional personnel searches on an international level."

The international PMM network operated on all 5 continents with 60 offices around the globe.

After its acquisition by TMP.Worldwide, the brand name of PMM was deactivated and some senior partners created PMCI (www.pmci.de) as its successor.

Name: TalentCastr
Description:
TalentCastr was a mobile / webcam enabled on-demand online video interviewing enabled virtual campus recruiting service and US / Canada / United Kingdom / European Union ecosystem of campus Diversity-oriented, Consulting, Investment and Entrepreneurship clubs and Consulting, Marketing and Venture Capital firms that increased the geographical reach, diversity and inclusion, and time / cost efficiency of campus recruiting efforts.

In addition to enhancing the reach and effectiveness of firms' talent acquisition operations via an automated online video enabled case interviewing platform, TalentCastr allowed organizations to crowdsource strategic insights and innovations from MBA students, non-MBA graduate students and undergraduates via online and offline case competitions. 

In 2010, TalentCastr worked alongside the One Laptop per Child Association (OLPC), the IXL Center for Innovation and Excellence, and the Hult International Business School Consulting Club in launching the first Global Case Challenge, attracting MBA students, non-MBA graduate students and undergraduate students from top universities and colleges across the globe. 

Since 2010, the Global Case Challenge event has grown into what has been described as “the world’s largest crowdsourcing platform for social good”.

While it was a great first-time startup and learning experience for many involved and moreover a great deal of fun and source of positive memories, I (Michael Angelicola - the Founder) failed to adequately monetize the venture quickly enough to support the desired management team despite their gracious and impactful impact efforts and as a result, sunsetted the venture in 2010 and while painful at the time, I am grateful for the experience and perspective gained for the team and myself and will apply this to future ventures.

Structural Technician

Refinish Technician

Non-Structural Technician

Estimator

Mechanical Technician

For collision repair shops, this means:

Faster hires that reduce customer wait times

Consistent production flow and fewer delays

Transparent pricing: our fee is always 10% of the candidate’s annual salary

For technicians, this means:

Nationwide opportunities that match your skills

Freedom to make life-driven career moves — like relocating closer to family, advancing your career, or finding a better shop culture

Access to employers who understand your value

At SkillShelf, we don’t just fill vacancies — we help shops run smoother and help technicians find the right fit for their future.

Shops run smoother. Techs find better fits. Everyone wins.

Name: BOARDED
Description:
Boarded is a strategic platform and membership-only community designed to bridge the gap between innovation and experience in the defense, national security, cyber, and space sectors. We connect forward-thinking organizations with a curated network of senior executives and advisory board leaders, each bringing deep expertise gained from distinguished careers across the Armed Forces, government services, cyber security, and the broader global ecosystem.

Our mission is to accelerate the growth and strategic development of companies by enabling them to leverage the insights, leadership, and networks of proven industry experts. From stealth-mode startups to publicly listed enterprises, Boarded empowers clients to achieve their goals through tailored advisory engagement and informed executive guidance.

Beyond serving companies, Boarded also supports senior leaders seeking to transition from military, public sector, and government careers into commercial and advisory roles. Through bespoke coaching, structured transition programs, and strategic introductions, we help executives redefine their career trajectory and contribute their expertise where it matters most.

At Boarded, we believe innovation thrives when guided by experience and we exist to make that connection happen.

Boarded is committed to upholding the highest standards of equality, inclusion, and anti-discrimination. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, age, religion, disability, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic.

Membership to Boarded is strictly by invitation only. Selection is based solely on relevant professional experience, expertise, and alignment with our mission to support innovation and leadership across the defense, national security, cyber, and space sectors. This ensures that our community maintains the highest level of credibility, insight, and impact.

Name: SoughtHire
Description:
Great missions require great operators.

For organizations transforming lives and communities, the stakes for leadership are incredibly high. You face a unique challenge: you cannot afford to hire a leader who lacks the "hard skills" to scale your operations, but you also cannot hire someone who doesn't fundamentally align with your "heart."

At SoughtHire, we believe you shouldn't have to compromise.

We are a specialized retained search practice dedicated to finding Executive Leaders and Strategic Function Heads who possess both the competence to lead and the character to serve.

Who We Serve We partner with organizations that value structure, clarity, and impact—including non-profits, social enterprises, and mission-focused health and education sectors.

Our Approach We are not a volume shop. We maintain a lean client list to ensure every search receives principal-led attention and true partnership. We don't just match resumes to job descriptions; we match human beings to organizational cultures.

Our Promise to You:

Intentional Precision: We measure success by accuracy, not the stack of resumes on your desk. We filter the noise so you meet only the most viable candidates.

Whole-Person Approach: A resume tells you what a leader has done; we dig deeper to understand how they behave. We assess values and history to ensure a lasting fit.

Competence + Purpose: We find the "bilingual" executive—the leader who is fluent in both strategic execution and mission stewardship.

If you are looking for a leader to champion your purpose with clarity and capability, let’s talk.

Email recruit@soughthire.com

Name: White Bridge Advisors & Co.
Description:
White Bridge Advisors & Co. is a boutique advisory firm headquartered in Dubai, focused on strong and long-lasting partnerships.

We specialize in supporting family offices, wealth management and investment firms, and high-growth ventures by identifying, attracting, and securing exceptional leaders across a variety of verticals.

Our approach combines global reach, local precision, and trusted networks. We act as a trusted advisor, bridging talent and opportunity with confidentiality, discretion, and measurable impact.

We know how difficult it is to find the right recruitment partner because we have been on both sides of the table. Companies need more than a service provider; they need a trusted partner with whom they can build an honest, long-term relationship. We help those organizations build teams from the ground up, knowing exactly the kind of leadership they need and the people who will drive their vision forward.

Recruitment is not about filling vacancies — it’s about building companies. You can have the right brand, the right mission, the right business plan, the right product… but what are all those things without the right people?

We work as a partner, a single trusted point of contact. As the right hand to top management, we help our clients grow and improve through people. We understand their culture and their perfect fit because we operate as a member of their team — not as an external provider.

Every company is different, and every role is unique. That is why we work in a truly bespoke, boutique way, tailoring our approach with precision and care.

Our mission is simple: once you start working with us, you will never need another recruitment partner. We commit to long-standing relationships, guiding our clients with discretion, precision, and unwavering dedication. We build this trust by focusing on accountability, excellence, and results.

Wolfe Advisory is a boutique executive recruiting firm built exclusively for accounting and finance. We partner with growth-minded companies that need leaders they can trust, not résumé volume, recycled candidate lists, or guesswork.

Technology helps us surface the right candidates faster; judgment ensures the right fit.

Every search is tailored. Every candidate is deeply vetted through technical, behavioral, and leadership evaluation. And every placement is made with long-term impact in mind.

We specialize in businesses that are scaling, restructuring, or entering their next phase of growth, moments when financial leadership matters most. From private-equity-backed companies to founder-led organizations, we help build finance teams that bring clarity, control, and confidence.

For candidates, Wolfe Advisory provides discreet access to leadership opportunities where your experience truly moves the needle. For companies, we remove hiring noise and replace it with precision, speed, and accountability.

No mass recruiting.
No junior hand-offs.
Just focused, founder-led search — powered by technology, guided by experience, and measured by outcomes.

Wolfe Advisory is built for companies that take accounting and financial leadership seriously.

We specialize in identifying and recruiting passive candidates—elite employees who are not actively seeking a job but would consider one that they see as a career-advancing opportunity. 

These passive and those actively seeking new opportunities, but we have thoroughly vetted, allow employers access to a broader, more talented, and committed talent pool that leads to higher-quality and better job-fit employees, reduced time-to-hire, and enhanced employer branding. 

Until a reciprocated interest is expressed, we are not transparent with a candidate's name or the companies they worked for or had previously worked for. Even then, before releasing this information to anyone, we get written permission from the candidate. We understand passive candidates, and many active job seekers prefer to control who knows of their openness or desire to explore the nexsteps in their careers. Our methodology allows for this.

Name: Personaldienstleistung talention Personal
Description:
Ihre Personalsuche – Unser Auftrag
Mit uns an Ihrer Seite, haben Sie die Möglichkeit Ihre Personalsuche nach geeigneten Fach- und Führungskräften schneller und effektiver umzusetzen.

Wir nutzen lieber die Zeit, um mit der Suche und dem Finden von geeignetem Personal zu beginnen und überzeugen lieber durch Taten als durch Worte.
Wir setzen auf die Schnelligkeit und Effektivität, welche uns die digitale Welt zu bieten hat und nutzen diese konsequent aus.
Neben digitalem Recruiting nutzen wir zur Personalgewinnung die Zusammenarbeit mit selbstständigen Recruitern, Headhuntern und Arbeitsvermittlern. Außerdem haben wir Zugriff auf einen umfangreichen Personalpool. Dadurch können wir Ihnen innerhalb kürzester Zeit zur Deckung Ihres Personalbedarfs verhelfen.
Wir arbeiten bundesweit und sind auch zu ungewöhnlichen Zeiten als Ansprechpartner verfügbar.

Wie läuft die Personalsuche mit uns als Partner ab?

Zuerst teilen Sie uns ihren Personalbedarf mit, dazu können Sie das untenstehende Formular nutzen, uns eine E-Mail schreiben oder anrufen. In einem ersten Gespräch definieren wir gemeinsam, welchen Personalbedarf Sie bis wann, mit welchen Mitteln und zu welchen Konditionen gedeckt haben wollen.

Gerne können Sie uns auch gleich ein Anforderungsprofil zur besetzenden Stelle übermitteln. Nach dem wir alles Vertragliche geregelt haben gehen wir aktiv für Sie auf die Suche. Dabei übernehmen wir sämtliche Aufgaben innerhalb des Rekrutierungsprozessen, so dass Sie sich ganz auf Ihre tägliche Arbeit konzentrieren können. Wir übernehmen von der Stellenausschreibung, Abgleich mit unseren Bewerberpool über Bewerbermanagement, Vorauswahl der Bewerber bis hin zur Terminabstimmung für Vorstellungsgespräche alle Aufgaben.

Description:
Humberside Search and Rescue (HUMBSAR) strives to deliver a first-class, professional search and rescue service whenever and wherever needed. This is made possible by the dedication and enthusiasm of our volunteers, who commit to regular training, exercising, and operational duties, demonstrating their unwavering commitment to our shared goal.

The team will be an entirely voluntary lowland search and rescue team providing vital search and rescue services to Humberside Police and its partner agencies. The team will be deployed by Humberside Police to assist with search operations, deploying our qualified search technicians to locate vulnerable missing persons.

HUMBSAR is fully supported and funded by HFR Solutions CIC, a local community interest company specialising in emergency response and workspace safety. HFR Solutions’ mission is to make the Humber region a safer place to live and work. 

Our volunteers will receive training in accordance with National Policing Search Standards, ensuring they are equipped to operate in line with the National Police's Concept of Operations and common minimum standards for search and rescue procedures.

Coming soon. Contact HUMBSAR@hfrsolutions.co.uk to find out more.

Our work has shaped the success of companies at pivotal moments of growth, transition, and scale.

Our focus is intentional and narrow. We do not operate as a generalist firm. We work only in sectors where national security, sovereign capability, and advanced technology intersect, and where leadership quality has an outsized impact on mission delivery and long term value creation.

Executive search in this market is materially different. It requires credibility across government, industry, and capital, an understanding of regulatory and security environments, and the judgment to operate where discretion is non negotiable. Dion Partners was built specifically to operate at this level.

We are engaged on C suite and board level searches where conventional approaches are insufficient. These include first time executive hires, founder succession, leadership inflection points, and roles operating at the boundary between government and industry. Our mandates are often confidential, complex, and strategically sensitive.

Dion Partners operates as a true boutique. All engagements are Partner led, highly selective, and executed with absolute discretion. Clients work with us not for coverage or volume, but for precision, insight, and outcomes.

Name: PT Bahana Mega Prestasi
Description:
PT BAHANA MEGA PRESTASI, perusahaan penempatan pekerja migran Indonesia (P3MI) yang didirikan pada tahun 2007, telah berhasil menyediakan layanan penempatan di Taiwan dan menambahkan Dominika sebagai negara penempatan baru. Fokus penempatan di Taiwan mencakup sektor-sektor seperti pabrik, industri, perawatan lansia, pembantu rumah tangga, dan peternakan ayam. Sementara itu, Dominika menjadi tujuan baru dengan sektor pekerjaan melibatkan tenaga konstruksi, tenaga ahli, dan operator alat berat. Kesuksesan PT BAHANA MEGA PRESTASI diakui oleh lembaga-lembaga lokal, nasional, dan internasional melalui studi perbandingan, menegaskan reputasinya sebagai perusahaan yang terpercaya dan inovatif di bidangnya.

Untuk memastikan perekrutan pekerja migran yang berkualitas, PT BAHANA MEGA PRESTASI telah mendirikan 7 cabang, 3 pusat pelatihan kerja (BLK – LN), dan beberapa lembaga pendidikan kejuruan (LPK) di berbagai wilayah. Kerjasama dengan pusat pelatihan kerja pemerintah juga terjalin untuk beberapa profesi tertentu. Cabang-cabang, pusat pelatihan, dan lembaga kejuruan berperan dalam perekrutan, seleksi, dan pelatihan pekerja dari berbagai daerah. Semua kegiatan ini dilakukan dengan manajemen yang kuat, memastikan proses yang tepat waktu, pengendalian terhadap pekerja dalam pembelajaran di daerah, dan menghasilkan pekerja terampil, profesional, serta disiplin yang bertanggung jawab atas pekerjaan mereka di negara penempatan.

Name: JobSure Virtual Assistants
Description:
JobSure Virtual Assistant: WE'RE NOT YOUR ASSISTANT. WE'RE YOUR OPERATIONS PARTNER.

Let's be honest: Traditional executive assistant services are broken.

They offer to "help with admin" and "manage your inbox."

But your problem isn't that you need help checking email.

Your problem is that your business has outgrown you, and you're drowning trying to keep up.

WHAT ACTUALLY SOLVES THIS

Not another person to delegate tasks to.
Not someone to "take things off your plate."
Not a glorified scheduler.

What solves this: Operational infrastructure that works without you.

THAT'S WHAT JobSure VA BUILDS

We're not interested in becoming your personal task manager.

We're interested in building the operational systems that let your business scale beyond your personal capacity.

THE QUESTIONS WE ASK

Not: "What's on your to-do list?"
But: "What's blocking your business from running independently?"

Not: "What can I take off your plate?"
But: "What systems are missing that make you the bottleneck?"

Not: "How can I help you get through today?"
But: "How do we build infrastructure so tomorrow is easier?"

WHAT WE ACTUALLY DO

- Identify operational bottlenecks (usually: you)
- Build systems to remove those bottlenecks
- Execute operations with zero hand-holding
- Document everything so it's repeatable
- Create operational independence

THE RESULT

Your business moves forward whether you're available or not.
Your team stops waiting on you for everything.
Your operations scale beyond your personal bandwidth.
You finally have space to think strategically.

WHO THIS IS FOR

This isn't for everyone.

This is for founders who are:
✓ Ready to stop being the business bottleneck
✓ Willing to delegate real authority, not just tasks
✓ Serious about building scalable operations
✓ Done with band-aid solutions

No fluff. No generic VA services. Just operational systems that work.

www.jobsureva.com

Name: Value Centric Talent
Description:
A strategic partner for private equity and select corporate clients, specializing in sourcing top-tier corporate officer talent to drive value creation.
The essence of value-centric talent management lies in recognizing employees as instrumental assets contributing to organizational success. This approach aligns talent with the company's strategy and value creation plan.
In contrast to the transactional nature of the traditional search model, we believe in a more insightful and tailored approach. Our departure from the conventional dialing-focused industry norm is rooted in our commitment to understanding the unique needs essential for supporting our clients' value-creation agendas.
While major firms and boutiques adhere to business models conflicting with client interests, our approach resolves alignment issues. Drawing from our experiences as a partner, CFO candidate, and client purchasing retained search services, our model ensures harmony between our goals and those of our clients.
Central to our philosophy is the belief that human capital's value is pivotal to generating shareholder value. To optimize outcomes, we advocate for a systematic approach that complements our clients' needs, providing valuable functional expertise.
In our role as a client partner, we advocate for an integration of art and science, blending creativity with experience to address complex human capital challenges.

Name: Maja Assine - One Woman Army
Description:
One Woman Army | Headhunterka | Konsultantka kariery | Ekspertka ds. CV

Jestem headhunterką i konsultantką kariery, a moją misją jest wspieranie osób w realizacji zawodowych celów. One Woman Army to marka, którą stworzyłam, aby pomagać zarówno kandydatom, jak i firmom w skutecznym odnalezieniu się na rynku pracy. Pracuję samodzielnie, ale wszechstronnie – jestem Twoim wsparciem w rekrutacji, planowaniu kariery i budowaniu profesjonalnego wizerunku.

Co robię?
- Pomagam firmom znajdować idealnych kandydatów, a kandydatom – odnaleźć wymarzoną pracę. Dbam o każdy etap procesu, od analizy potrzeb po dopasowanie idealnych osób do organizacji.
- Pomagam zdefiniować zawodowe cele, odkryć mocne strony i przygotować strategię działania. Dzięki współpracy ze mną wiesz, co zrobić, aby efektywnie zarządzać swoją ścieżką kariery.
- Tworzę profesjonalne CV i profile LinkedIn, które przyciągają uwagę rekruterów. Pomagam opowiedzieć Twoją zawodową historię w sposób, który wyróżni Cię na rynku pracy.

Łączę doświadczenie, empatię i praktyczne podejście. Działam w wielu obszarach rynku pracy, oferując kompleksowe wsparcie dostosowane do indywidualnych potrzeb. Współpracując ze mną, masz pewność, że każda wskazówka i narzędzie jest dopasowane do Twojej sytuacji.

We speak the language of both science and business — enabling us to surface selectively active candidates who are not visible on job boards but open to the right opportunity when it aligns with their mission and values.
 What We Offer:
Executive Search – C-level, VP, and Director placements across R&D, Clinical, Regulatory, and Corporate functions

Specialized Scientific Recruitment – Scientists, Medical Directors, Translational Leads, Program Managers, and more

Contract Staffing & Interim Talent – Rapid access to consultants, contractors, and functional experts

Build-out & Project-Based Hiring – Team scaling for new programs, site expansions, and clinical trial launches

Confidential & Difficult-to-Fill Roles – We thrive where internal teams hit roadblocks

Whether you are a Series A startup building your first team or an established biotech expanding pipeline capabilities, Pravenza Group is your trusted partner in finding the talent to realize your vision.

Let’s connect and explore how we can support your next critical hire.

Name: CLIMATE Tech Executive Search
Description:
We are a disruptive executive search startup dedicated to finding the greatest persons who will create a better world for our children. These people will create efficient solutions to clean up, decarbonize, cool down our Planet.

Motivation is more important than skills because you can integrate know-how into your brain faster with the heart than intellect.
Everything we do is benevolent because we need good people who feel joy, find meaning in order to rise to the challenge in an efficient way.

NEUROSCIENCE PROCESS
1. We profile you to understand who you are and how you function under stress and at your best.
2. We evaluate your failures and results. A repressed failure will become your worst enemy. A failure that is accepted, cleaned up, transmuted, integrated becomes a strong and powerful talent.
3. We give you case studies to reveal your talents because a position in line with your talents makes you gifted and fast.

WE NEED
1. Write a disruptive motivation letter so be creative and straightforward. 10 lines are enough. Use your heart instead of your mind.
2. Make a list of 10 skills that would be relevant for your success in the mission you apply.
3. Choose 3 experiences (10 lines each) that are in line with the needs of our client in this way: 
3.1. The name of the position and its duration.
3.2. The objective you had to reach. 
3.3. The means and skills you have used to succeed in the mission.
3.4. The results you achieved and why it was important for you to succeed in this mission.

NB: you can send your linkedin profile to give us a big picture.

SEND
PDF format
To: climate.tech.exec.search@outlook.com
With the reference code in the subject.

REMEMBER
The most important thing is to find joy and meaning.

Name: Linton Howard Executive
Description:
POWER - A New Model of Executive Recruitment

POWER, or Process Outsourcing With Executive Recruitment, is Linton Howard's innovative new service offering that addresses the problems with traditional recruitment models.

Full service Executive Search normally costs between 12.5% and 25% of the salary package on offer for a role, usually with a significant upfront payment and then a fee balance on successful placement.

There is no logic in this model, which encourages your Search Consultant to exert pressure on you to hire particular candidates, so that they can earn their success fee.

Linton Howard has developed a new model, where you retain control of your spend on the hiring process, saving considerable $$$.

If you have an Executive/Senior Management role to fill, you can outsource all or part of the process to an expert Executive Search consultant at Linton Howard, on an hourly fee basis, thereby controlling your spend and taking ownership of critical aspects of the process as you wish.

Rarely does this amount to more than 6% of the total salary package.

Linton Howard takes ownership of any or all (at your discretion) of the many components of the hiring process, from Position Description and advertising right through to reference checks and onboarding. 

If you prefer the traditional full service model, Linton Howard still offers this at a rate that is very competitive.

Name: Pro Interlink
Description:
Beyond Boundaries: The Unconventional Path to Exceptional Talent

In the world of recruitment, conventional wisdom suggests that specialisation in a particular industry is the key to success. However, at Pro Interlink, we challenge this notion, believing that the true essence of headhunting lies in understanding the intricacies of a role and identifying individuals with the perfect blend of skills, experience, and character.

Picture this: a global marketplace where industries evolve, and talents transcend boundaries. At Pro Interlink, we step into the shoes of our client companies, not confined by industry silos but driven by the commitment to find the perfect match for each unique position.

While industry-focused headhunters may boast extensive databases, we acknowledge the dynamism of the professional landscape. People change roles, industries intermingle, and innovation sparks in unexpected places. That’s why our approach extends beyond a rigid database reliance. We cultivate a keen instinct that goes beyond matching a job specification to a resume.

Imagine a world where your talent solution provider doesn’t just find candidates; they unearth the right fit. At Pro Interlink, we pride ourselves on meticulous (re)search, transcending industry lines to uncover the exceptional individuals who align with your unique challenges.

Our success is rooted in agility and flexibility, a testament to our ability to navigate diverse sectors worldwide. We’re not just headhunters; we’re architects of tailored talent solutions.

As industries grapple with the universal struggle of attracting the right people, we offer a paradigm shift. Choose Pro Interlink as your preferred talent solutions provider, and let us redefine success together – because in our world, talent knows no boundaries.

Description:

My expertise lies in building diverse and inclusive leadership teams, with a focus on connecting women and Latinos to executive roles across the U.S. and Latin America. I’m also a keynote speaker and contributing author to Extraordinary Latinas, Vol. II, sharing insights on topics like diversity in leadership, the Latino economy, and advancing women in the workplace.

Let’s connect to discuss leadership hiring strategies, career growth, or building inclusive organizations. Together, we can transform leadership for a better future.

Our expertise bridges scientific innovation with the people who bring market-shaping ideas to life.

• Executive Search Expertise in medical aesthetics, dermatology, regenerative medicine, and biosciences

Who We Serve
• Regenerative medicine startups & manufacturers
• Bioscience & Biotech organizations

At Ever Hire Group, we don’t just offer customer service—we deliver a high-touch Client Experience that consistently leads to one response:

Name: AIMS International Switzerland
Description:
AIMS International is a global leadership advisory firm driven by a singular belief: exceptional leadership empowers organizations to achieve extraordinary things. Since 1992, we've partnered with clients across 70+ countries, providing bespoke solutions that cultivate transformative leaders and inspire sustainable growth.

Our expertise spans a comprehensive suite of services, including:

- Executive Search: Identifying and attracting the best leadership talent globally.

- Leadership Development: Equipping leaders with the skills and foresight to navigate today's complex business landscape.

- Talent Management: Building robust talent pipelines and cultivating a culture of growth and development.

- Board Services: Strengthening boards with diverse perspectives and strategic guidance for enhanced governance.

- Family Business Advising: Navigating the unique dynamics and complexities of family-owned businesses.

At AIMS International, we believe in the power of human connection. Every client engagement is a collaborative journey, built on clear communication, shared goals, and a deep understanding of your unique needs. Our team of 500+ experienced partners, consultants, and professionals are invested in your success, acting as trusted advisors who champion your vision.

With a presence in over 70 countries, we offer a truly global perspective, connecting our clients with the best leaders and talent worldwide.

Name: Laroze Partners Executive Search
Description:
Laroze Partners is an Executive Search firm specializing in C-level and senior leadership recruitment.

Based in France and operating internationally, we support CEOs, CHROs, investors and leadership teams with their most strategic hires:
– General Management & Business Unit leadership ;
– Sales & Marketing leadership ;
– Finance & Strategy leadership ;
– Sustainability, ESG & Transformation roles ;
– Tech & Digital leadership.

Our approach
We work exclusively through direct search, combining in-depth market knowledge, rigorous assessment and a truly tailored methodology for each assignment. Discretion, transparency and impact are at the heart of our work.

What makes us different
– Boutique positioning: limited number of mandates, strong Partner involvement.
– Recognised expertise in Tech, B2B services, healthcare, retail and industry.
– 360° support: role definition, market mapping, leadership assessment and onboarding follow-up.

Laroze Partners is committed to building high-performing, sustainable and engaged leadership teams.

 Feel free to reach out to discuss your current or upcoming leadership hiring needs.
